---|---|---
* * *
## The Broken System
What we're watching isn't politics-as-usual, it's a demolition derby of democracy. The car's on fire, the driver's drunk, and somehow half the crowd is still cheering.
Reed Galen and I traced how the hell we got here.
And why Democrats, in their infinite wisdom, keep tripping over their own di...shoelaces, yes, shoelaces, that's what I was gonna say--at the very moment history demands some serious combat boots.
Reed and I come from different teams: he once wore the GOP jersey, I have worn a Democratic one. But even from opposing sidelines we saw the same thing: the empty husk of a system increasingly failing most Americans.
Institutions that once worked for middle-class families? Gone.
Gutted, or sold to the highest bidder. Rent control, unions, actual government investment in regular people replaced by Uber jobs and GoFundMe health care.
So now you've got families making six figures who still can't afford daycare or college for their kids. Working people counting pennies at the grocery story, and feeling that any time now...tonight they're gonna party like it's1929.
Meanwhile the D.C. crowd treats this like terrible weather--an unfortunate natural occurrence, but hey, what can you do?
Oh and don't forget to pass that multi-zeroed campaign check from the Lambda Lambda Lambada founding member over there dressed in incel chic, Zuckerberg.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d09001f8-08a7-4fe4-8d39-0a3c602283e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.R8d3tyk3lrSUzKTffmGbejAFIrEwBKYyWB7OPeLRnac?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175119916)
* * *
## The Anger That Fueled Trump
Leave people to rot long enough, and shockingly they'll get kinda pissed and vote for the guy with a blowtorch and a bullhorn even if he is hte world's biggest asshole.
That's Trump. Not a genius, nor a savior--I'm not even convinced, necessarily, a homo sapien. But a helluva rage vessel.
Trump didn't build anything; he channeled the fury build up by decades of economic policies that legalized and promoted predatory, self-enriching, job-destroying, end-stage capitalism.
Decades of status-quo politicians had to bulldoze towns, emptying them of people faster than Stephen Miller's five-head emptied itself of hair. They, quite purposely, shipped jobs that sustained our working and middle classes--the strongest the world had ever seen from the 1930s-80s--overseas.
Working-class Americans were left to pick up the pieces of broken careers, broken families and broken dreams. As they stared into the abyss and alcoholism, opioids, and other self destructive behaviors.
Don't get me wrong, they had and have agency, they're not free of blame. Think of what Native Americans and Black Americans have been put through in this country.
But my point is **no American** should ever be abandoned at the altar of some already-rich asshole. Or so that locust farm known as Walmart could ooze into town-after-town suffocating every small business, entrepreneur and market in its path.
As Reed said: if you've got nothing left to lose, you'll take the angry guy. Even if the angry guy's an orange, semi-coherent con artist who can't spell "constitutional" without a Sharpie.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d09001f8-08a7-4fe4-8d39-0a3c602283e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
## Democrats Need A Message!
This is where my blood pressure spikes.
Democrats have the most obvious villains in human history. Absolute f*king weirdos Elon Musk and Peter Thiel. Two right-wing, wealth-snorting wankers building rocket ships that crash--with our money--and a huge _digital panopticon to spy on all humans in America_.
All while working with and/or closely advising Trump to cut SNAP benefits and tear up your health care--**which will kill 50,000 more Americans each year**.
Yes, you read that right: **kill**. [Backstabbing billionaire bigots hoarding yachts the size of Silicon Valley with the funds ripped from Americans](https://substack.com/redirect/642cd4a4-ee86-47e8-8b7a-0feb76002a19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) now needing to skip insulin doses.
_This is what we call, in the business: building a contrast._ It should be easy.
These are comic-book supervillains who quite literally have supported and worked closely with [President ](https://substack.com/redirect/78fa606b-94f4-4a2e-8156-6997bb089d20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[increasingly crazier Gary Buse](https://substack.com/redirect/78fa606b-94f4-4a2e-8156-6997bb089d20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[y](https://substack.com/redirect/78fa606b-94f4-4a2e-8156-6997bb089d20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to take money _out of our pockets_. Endlessly greedy droogs who, to quote Vishnu from The Bhagavad Gita, can rightly be described as "I am become Death, destroyer of worlds."
And what do Democratic congressional leaders do?
They mumble about "protecting subsidies." No villains. No heroes. No explanation of how this hurts you, who's doing it, why it's happening and who is gonna stop them no matter what it takes (with the exception of one great ad by Bernie Sanders and AOC).
Just oatmeal. Pure oatmeal. And oatmeal doesn't win knife fights.
* * *
## The Stakes: Fascism or Reform
Reed asked the big one: Is Trump just a buffoon, or an actual existential threat? Here's the answer: YES. Mussolini, Idi Amin, Pol Pot--all considered buffoons during their rise...until it was no longer funny.
[Trump threatening generals to pledge loyalty to ](https://substack.com/redirect/e5ba9aea-94c8-4ad3-ba10-c6ea7c712f8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[him](https://substack.com/redirect/e5ba9aea-94c8-4ad3-ba10-c6ea7c712f8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ instead of the Constitution? That's fascism. That's the playbook.
And Democratic Leaders respond by clutching "institutional norms" like a toddler hugging a broken toy while the house burns down.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.R8d3tyk3lrSUzKTffmGbejAFIrEwBKYyWB7OPeLRnac?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175119916)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/65982c5e-3895-44a2-ba3c-1dd376f72623?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## What We Need
We've been here before. FDR in the 1930s looked at a system in ruins and rebuilt it from scratch. He made government matter again, by reforming institutions that could be reformed and creating whole new institutions that hadn't existed to protect people. That built an enduring coalition that lasted for a half century.
That's the kind of boldness Democrats need right now. Tie economic justice to saving democracy, it's not difficult, [Trump and his billionaires are trying to destroy both](https://substack.com/redirect/ca0b31ab-e5fb-4ee1-94d6-be87e53f29be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Stop chasing every dumb Republican culture-war shiny object. Lead with wages, jobs, health care, housing.
Sherrod Brown gets it. Mallory McMorrow gets it. Hallie Shoffner gets it. Graham Platner gets it. And Democratic Leadership needs to get out of the way.
* * *
## The Bottom Line
The templates are there. History is screaming our name. The villains are gift-wrapped -- creepy tech bros with too much money, weird obsessions, draped in Trumpism and with zero conscience.
All that's missing is the courage to fight and to message the match. Without it, Democrats won't just lose another election. We may lose the whole damn republic.
So here's the deal: Democrats must be presured every minute of every day to support the best candidates, the ones with vision and charisma, not the ones with whom the champagne-flute crowd feels most comfortable in a room.
If you're _as sick of waiting for them to grow a spine as I am_ , then join us, amplify the message, and help force their hand. _**[Subscribe to Blue Amp--because raising hell is the only way we win.](https://substack.com/redirect/b445abab-f4cf-4062-8cf2-32bbfb0f2df5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
--Cliff

Watch/read how it went down! | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- The Broken System What we're watching isn't politics-as-usual, it's a demolition derby of democracy. The car's on fire, the driver's drunk, and somehow half the crowd is still cheering. Reed Galen and I traced how the hell we got here. And why Democrats, in their infinite wisdom, keep tripping over their own di...shoelaces, yes, shoelaces, that's what I was gonna say--at the very moment history demands some serious combat boots. Reed and I come from different teams: he once wore the GOP jersey, I have worn a Democratic one. But even from opposing sidelines we saw the same thing: the empty husk of a system increasingly failing most Americans. Institutions that once worked for middle-class families? Gone. Gutted, or sold to the highest bidder. Rent control, unions, actual government investment in regular people replaced by Uber jobs and GoFundMe health care. So now you've got families making six figures who still can't afford daycare or college for their kids. Working people counting pennies at the grocery story, and feeling that any time now...tonight they're gonna party like it's1929. Meanwhile the D.C. crowd treats this like terrible weather--an unfortunate natural occurrence, but hey, what can you do? Oh and don't forget to pass that multi-zeroed campaign check from the Lambda Lambda Lambada founding member over there dressed in incel chic, Zuckerberg. | | ---|---|--- The Anger That Fueled Trump Leave people to rot long enough, and shockingly they'll get kinda pissed and vote for the guy with a blowtorch and a bullhorn even if he is hte world's biggest asshole. That's Trump. Not a genius, nor a savior--I'm not even convinced, necessarily, a homo sapien. But a helluva rage vessel. Trump didn't build anything; he channeled the fury build up by decades of economic policies that legalized and promoted predatory, self-enriching, job-destroying, end-stage capitalism. Decades of status-quo politicians had to bulldoze towns, emptying them of people faster than Stephen Miller's five-head emptied itself of hair. They, quite purposely, shipped jobs that sustained our working and middle classes--the strongest the world had ever seen from the 1930s-80s--overseas. Working-class Americans were left to pick up the pieces of broken careers, broken families and broken dreams. As they stared into the abyss and alcoholism, opioids, and other self destructive behaviors. Don't get me wrong, they had and have agency, they're not free of blame. Think of what Native Americans and Black Americans have been put through in this country. But my point is no American should ever be abandoned at the altar of some already-rich asshole. Or so that locust farm known as Walmart could ooze into town-after-town suffocating every small business, entrepreneur and market in its path. name: Team Spanberger
subject: You deserve an explanation...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor

We're in the home stretch, Peter.

[_**Please, before midnight, will you make your first contribution to elect Abigail Spanberger as Governor of Virginia? name: Team Rayfield
subject: BREAKING: We won!! Judge sides with Oregon to block illegal troop deployment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Rayfield
body:
Today a Trump-appointed federal judge sided with our lawsuit to stop the President's attempt to move military troops to our state |
---
| | Friend, Keeping our communities safe is my top priority – the same can’t be said for our President. When President Trump illegally called in federal troops to invade our state, we took him to court just 6 hours later. Today, **a federal judge granted our request for a Temporary Restraining Order to block Trump’s attempted military deployment.** Judge Immergut wrote in her ruling that stopping this troop movement, “goes to the heart of what it means to live under the rule of law in the United States.” [**We won!**](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=29ccc09e5b&e=1768325bd4)

This fight has just begun. We know Trump and his cronies will keep pushing the limits and we expect an immediate appeal. Together we have to hold him accountable and draw a line in the sand. If you can [give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=06d51afaa6&e=1768325bd4)[ to the cause](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=a727f29214&e=1768325bd4)**,** **we can work together to stop Trump’s illegal activity**. As a community we can protect the safety, rights, and freedom we all deserve. I’ve never been prouder to be an Oregonian working on behalf of everyone in our great state. We are stronger than Trump realizes. Join me and [make a contribution today](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=98b2bb8e2a&e=1768325bd4) – let’s make him regret picking this fight with us. Your Attorney General, Dan

subject: They want me to stop Read my response
body:
After we released our investigation of a former DOJ Investigator, Glenn Prager, clearing his conscience by revealing what he knew about the Epstein case, I expected a swift but honest response from the Department of Justice. They attacked our source’s background and integrity, which is ironic given that, for over a decade, the FBI and Department of Justice have refused to disclose any information about an investigation that has been closed for decades.

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zogfsu3phhfhs2naibo7t866e3ansj5ol622qm48_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob4c5h2bs)
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zepbudmpuhvr5u8g64el9hr1h0047s0ki90o6hig_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob4c5h2bs) Dear Patriot,

After we released our investigation of a former DOJ Investigator, Glenn Prager, clearing his conscience by revealing what he knew about the Epstein case, I expected a swift but honest response from the Department of Justice.

Their response was swift, but dishonest and manipulated to discredit my team's reporting at OMG.

[**I 'm asking for your help to fight these attacks, so I can go even harder to expose the truth.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdcpqci5i5vqsj32jpj9bbe0dijt99n7d4p3rea8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob4c5h2bs)

**They attacked our source 's background and integrity**, which is ironic given that, for over a decade, the FBI and Department of Justice have refused to disclose any information about an investigation that has been closed for decades.

In the video, **Prager discussed the flight logs from Epstein 's plane to his island**. If the DOJ wanted to prove Prager to be a liar, all they have to do is release the flight logs and PROVE Bill Clinton was not on the flight with children.

Will they do that?

**Of course not.**

They aren't just protecting powerful people:

**They are protecting the darkness that slithers in the
****deepest recesses of government and the Deep State.
****THEY ARE PROTECTING THE CIA.**

And I fear that's who is going to be coming for me next. But I will not slow down. [**Help me push even harder for the truth with a donation today.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlgi0evkkmmf418fdeujf6dfutlrdbt94c3uiouo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob4c5h2bs)

In our video, Prager discloses that**Epstein worked for both the CIA and Mossad.**

Think about that.

If the federal government admitted that they were part of a child trafficking ring to collect dirt on the world's most powerful . . . what would you do?

What would good Americans across the country do?

**They would demand the total end to the CIA and the entire Intelligence Community that is responsible for a string of atrocities going back decades.**

By continuing to cover this story, **I 've become the biggest threat to the CIA**.

And I'm already feeling the heat.

While I can't get into it, **my phone rang late last night with heavy pressure for me to back off**.

This is my response:
**MY PRICE IS MY LIFE**

What is yours?

If you want me to back away, please, pretend you didn't read this.

**If you stand by me and want me to keep reporting the truth** , then please, [**donate today to fund our investigations and send a clear message that you stand with the truth**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu4f43eij86k87id17mhgn4chpjscq9m7babcemo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob4c5h2bs).

We stand together, or I fall alone.

Thank you for all that you do.

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4q8pf51og5hq0pk9lbfegq1cekkbfck81meveho_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob3c3h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9vcmo76sca1rke2id9bce70pc1vltuno98havro_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob3c3h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zot2uamt404ldor9pa3arkqcip09nprjhrl1t2r0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob3c3h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zotn5l04m1retkm5no856iaftcnfjrses1e0pig0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob3c3h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd6gabosijb47riffd9vj1562clh2mg3cp2e6t0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob3c3h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdl5u2lknb2gblnbrd5rlartuc9fboaamq4fep6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob3c3h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z707i4lvn9ubt5rdopkqv67p60lvqf6a7dquouug_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob3c3h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6vua2k5ntdjvb628lv5cmd9cakgfve2aekhurgg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob3c3h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5lacirtt78lunjbpm11pjmr4oukgl148cl07f50_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob3c3h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News

subject: President Trump just delivered a scathing indictment of Shutdown Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
“We don't want to give illegal aliens the health care of Americans.”

President Trump just delivered a SCATHING INDICTMENT of Shutdown Democrats - read:[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6qfbtd2g4eas806mk0722m1leg9i9af2vtd2hp8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob4c5h2bs)"We don't want to give illegal aliens the health care of Americans... [Democrats] want to destroy health care in America by giving it to millions and millions of illegal aliens. And there's not money for that. Nobody has money for that." These words from our President perfectly capture the Democrat Party and make it clear who stands where:
Republicans are on the side of the American People. Democrats are on the side of illegals. Plain and simple.
**Nearly every House and Senate Democrats voted to shut down our government because they want to keep illegals on taxpayer-funded healthcare.**
This is a disgrace. It's a total betrayal of YOU.
[The Democrat Machine is blaming all of this on Republicans and are holding the American People hostage until they get their way, and right now they are pinning the blame on everyone but themselves.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkp7v4e2717uvfek1co0pkp6ueidafjd0pqm0bm8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob4c5h2bs)
Radical Democrats and the Fake News were so excited about the Government shutdown that CNN and MSNBC both displayed a countdown on the screen like it was New Year's Eve!
Right now we need every single American Patriot to stand tall against this national lie!
The Democrats have chosen to sacrifice the livelihoods of hardworking Americans in favor of illegal aliens. Now it's time for every single one of us to choose what side we're on:[HOUSE REPUBLICANS
](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjoij79v07bch9fp880mn4envuiko7vqlqjl5f2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob4c5h2bs)[SHUTDOWN DEMOCRATS
](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zorhldt9tbpi6sjtj2g7i0ea59qqu3of2jtudo38_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob4c5h2bs)They think the American People are with them 100% but we are ready to show them just how wrong they are.
Respond [here](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zeqra2bg7aot4buv858etpphr4q52tvk02ek9n4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob4c5h2bs) before 9 PM.
For Freedom,
House Republicansvia Team Scalise
* * *
\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_ \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsjj2req8aq6a6654cis915m662kn0mp545sn8no_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob4c5h2bs) If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!
**We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:**[ DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN NOW
](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2za9v615t22c7454u0mbd39fhvqg2foopesle8gcg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob4c5h2bs)| | |

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The People’s Pardon Of Rudy Giuliani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcaa19ls8ha460q8ig99927o09lonbovcr15iei8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob2c9h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za287mkkg5j10hjccgiieni1qt8kchisp2hange8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob2c9h2bs)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---
[**So please, help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me. **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjg9o0m4lb4dib9qhucqk7lq5ar02rekgs1sog0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob2c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4c8mnl735k2hs4jh39ukjkvehgrq5po87qkfa70_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob2c9h2bs)
__
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zds9og15642p2f377770k05s6p0bvi7ag8if7qk8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob2c9h2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znuoqsg3uslgk7ei8nk038hteaeu0ruleagmi770_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob2c9h2bs)

name: Zach Nunn
subject: Family farms are in danger
body:
Do you support family farms?

---
| | | | | | | Untitled Document | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi05qu9qh6jt3e2v9ea8ir49fijprtvmjqlm7vi0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob1cph2bs)
---
Patriot,

The heart of Iowa is at risk.

Family farms are under threat--and the next generation of farmers is feeling the squeeze.

Expanding farm safety nets and fixing outdated regulations are critical to keeping farms family-run and in Iowa's hands.
_Farming isn 't just a business--it's a way of life, passed down from generation to generation. Family farms feed our communities, sustain our local economies, and carry Iowa's proud traditions forward._ | [**STAND WITH FAMILY FARMS >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi15q1ja000jrr7chl979nmap1bk633pecki3b2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob1cph2bs)
---

**As your Congressman, I 'm fighting to ensure farming remains a family business. **

It's about more than crops and livestock--it's about families working side by side, building a legacy that lasts. Our rural communities, local economies, and Iowa way of life depend on it. That's why I urgently need your voice.
**DO YOU AGREE THAT WE MUST KEEP FARMING A FAMILY BUSINESS?** [**YES >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8qoqtsngkoipne2tcqs0513kr8bs8q6ied38ag8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob1cph2bs)
---
[**NO >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrm9p60lre4vuiu6ke6h96b4ddkrbuoi8a99t83g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob1cph2bs)
---

Time is critical--every voice counts. Take action today to protect Iowa's farming legacy for generations to come, Patriot.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh30bqo7b43q7spctr1s34r6uv40tjaaj0m45fvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob1cph2bs)
[**GO ON RECORD >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi20b643eeld6d02seup6m9j787l59iq3etc30ug_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdim1ob1cph2bs)
---

Thank you,

Congressman Zach Nunn

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.

name: Navy SEAL Derrick Van Orden
subject: My mom didn’t raise a quitter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I need every America First Patriot reading this to step up and read this email.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAwNV9EUy1ZTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MjA2MDktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMDVfRFMtWUwuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzIwNjA5LTI4OTkifQ/IeGbEe7fNRc7d4QQ2wIfXg)Peter,
I've never been one to shy away from a fight.
Whether overseas as a Navy SEAL or right here at home defending conservative values in Congress, I have always stood on the front lines, ready to serve, lead, and protect the country I love.
**_Now, I'm in the political fight of my life._**
Cook Political Report labeled my race a toss-up, and the radical Left believes they can buy this seat and flip Wisconsin's 3rd Congressional District blue.
**Let me be clear:** that's not going to happen.
_Not on my watch. _
_Not with your help._
Democrats are furious that I've stood with President Trump every step of the way. They're pouring money into my opponent's campaign because I don't play by their rules.
And I REFUSE to quit.
They want to shut me up because I called out Biden's failures, and the Left’s attempt to rewrite our history and redefine gender, family, and morality.
**But I didn't run for office to cozy up to the D.C. elites. I ran to serve the people and protect the country I risked my life for.**
This race will come down to the wire, and every dollar counts.
[I need every America First Patriot reading this to step up and pitch in today. Your support could make the difference between victory and defeat.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTAwNV9EUy1ZTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3MjA2MDktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEwMDVfRFMtWUwuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzIwNjA5LTI4OTkifQ/NCsIqT3C1Q1VUhS1CHxPcA)[SEND HELP NOW

Thank you for your kind support,
Derrick Van Orden U.S. Congressman (WI-03) Navy SEAL (Ret.)| |

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The People’s Pardon Of Rudy Giuliani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmrn6djk06ce8hri6vvu2iqk12blf3uscie5u28o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdhm4o36cph2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqqnhm5dh39d2p2cjug5ace3o6f9o90qb6o6m7do_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdhm4o36cph2bs)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---

clean_body: My last chance. My Hail Mary. | Friend, Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice... As a matter of fact, it’s my last resort. You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – and KNOW – was RIGHT. The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses! No viable pardon from the President. No protection. No cavalry coming over the hill. But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful force absolutely can: THE AMERICAN PEOPLE. So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU. My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — — calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES. ...And we’re nearly there! name: Zach Nunn
subject: Keep Farming a Family Business
body:
Do you support family farms?

---
| | | | | | | Untitled Document | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr024mkfk9p3064709kq6ihl9vk536tp5uhu8p2g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdhmaor2c3h2bs)
---
Patriot,

The heart of Iowa is at risk.

Family farms are under threat--and the next generation of farmers is feeling the squeeze.

Expanding farm safety nets and fixing outdated regulations are critical to keeping farms family-run and in Iowa's hands.
_Farming isn 't just a business--it's a way of life, passed down from generation to generation. Family farms feed our communities, sustain our local economies, and carry Iowa's proud traditions forward._ | [**STAND WITH FAMILY FARMS >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgh98nnmmr979uq9pogrhl3l2jouoabsnsv23pbg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdhmaor2c3h2bs)
---

**As your Congressman, I 'm fighting to ensure farming remains a family business. **

It's about more than crops and livestock--it's about families working side by side, building a legacy that lasts. Our rural communities, local economies, and Iowa way of life depend on it. That's why I urgently need your voice.
**DO YOU AGREE THAT WE MUST KEEP FARMING A FAMILY BUSINESS?** [**YES >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv6ingpmncfpl16ntg5ldo92uiu1mep9knjr8g0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdhmaor2c3h2bs)
---
[**NO >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zov3uqmqdekd61jif2rjcbbkep6f5cin3jtqc5sg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdhmaor2c3h2bs)
---

Time is critical--every voice counts. Take action today to protect Iowa's farming legacy for generations to come, Patriot.

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7r7lt444uh7qe98v5rq12sl9b9l0ltk2fbh2gt8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdhmaor2c3h2bs)
[**GO ON RECORD >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z75nmm9n756edg1dajfhrj9auu3rnccf49gg4ogg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdhmaor2c3h2bs)
---

Thank you,

Congressman Zach Nunn

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: We are Charlie Kirk
body:
Charlie Kirk didn’t just live a full life...

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zohhfiapug6reko9p3fivkg0bmunqm3f2oblb2gg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdhmaor6c9h2bs)
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk didn't just live a full life... He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with truth. With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above all, to point people back to God. And in the end -- _Charlie gave it all._ No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he started.Friend, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind -- _and the calling that now belongs to us._ **We made this tribute to honor the man who gave everything ... And to remind the world that his mission will press on:**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6hug5scbo7tmnkvfgcpisff10v7mptclig0p5g0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4sdhmaor6c9h2bs)
---

---
All of us will miss Charlie. _None of us will ever forget him._ For Charlie, \- The Turning Point USA Family

body:
U.S. Border Patrol [agents shot an armed woman](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL_O3CAQxJ8Gd5yAA_8pKNK4-9KmtNZmfSbCrAV75_jtIyeP8BUrrTSjn2bm19f0BTHF_PoJO3peacp41oTMWKa44FGIsTK_S66fSAkzwwKTUcZJraRyU4CYrsk2wa-IBp8Net25oXV927tm8_2grXbrHJRrO90NPRoIT1zatp-7VfdN9DdNK3Wftfah3WBmN6y9gq4FZ4VVGCJTefymmHnDNV30wfJYaG-S35iPKp4_hBmFGfN1UOVbEma8wcKMWgkzKivM-K7y7vf_m6kELPIALpQkvDBzlXUjYnnSDlnGLJctLvAiCStjkbzhJU8sKGf6g-E2zJdcoNzEpvhwnDGlWNtOWPXaIaZ_Gflbw368-RsAAP__JiKMrA) on Chicago's South Side on Saturday after an anti-Immigration and Customs Enforcement mob rammed their vehicles and attempted to run them over, according to the Department of Homeland Security.

# Sunday, October 5, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1947, President Harry Truman [delivered the first televised presidential address ](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQgOGnMVuQMT4Dg4dWLVKHVOpQdUQXfA6OHBzZRyLevkpfocO_fsP_c5yOGGJYz594Jcs-TSs9SiRmylOY6ZYTU2He8lruIUVaGWeclFRwaORBwuQwxH3SlbOeSFFbkW06GAz0podqsUMLZnZamx4MdApBgjKd9Ngbja2EKtin1kj5TGtdNzCoEwy-l9gZBC20JBc45fqSwsoL-binO-V6Ttcq2oX5VkT7ItQo1Linjbf6REKN5R2_Lub1ePj-EO3oCXnLJNq3smAmV2Xrbo8QYyimE1qerxjiH8n_-nC36jcAAP__ASNvwA)from the White House, urging Americans to reduce grain consumption to help feed starving Europeans. Each state has its own charming small city--and a new list ranks the best in the country. [Check today's _Top Stories_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOozAQRk9jOkfGsQ0ULrahy7ZbojEMYVYDjuwJKLdfZa_wF1_1Se9J789jegAxHc_fsGOUNU8HXpVRBMtEM75KFqwi73LUkzLjITDDZI31ujXa-GkB4s_kmiWuiBbvDca280Pwfeh9s0VvAoTg1qWHtA5tSkNy924AXEwCnNeG4pfWGvOdc-7W-sEmP6y9gS6Ad8oZXEhyuf3NdMiGK3_yieU2573huIm8qrr_UnZUdryAGWV7p--r7IjLW9kxYRV95VJF1x2Y9UxCWLVkzXSipkPZsQ2-b5sSl9dFzFRDp5x57kD83yQ_ynNG-y8AAP__p4R6Pg) to see if your favorite small city made the list. ## Trump to Federalize Illinois Guard
U.S. Border Patrol [agents shot an armed woman](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL_O3CAQxJ8Gd5yAA_8pKNK4-9KmtNZmfSbCrAV75_jtIyeP8BUrrTSjn2bm19f0BTHF_PoJO3peacp41oTMWKa44FGIsTK_S66fSAkzwwKTUcZJraRyU4CYrsk2wa-IBp8Net25oXV927tm8_2grXbrHJRrO90NPRoIT1zatp-7VfdN9DdNK3Wftfah3WBmN6y9gq4FZ4VVGCJTefymmHnDNV30wfJYaG-S35iPKp4_hBmFGfN1UOVbEma8wcKMWgkzKivM-K7y7vf_m6kELPIALpQkvDBzlXUjYnnSDlnGLJctLvAiCStjkbzhJU8sKGf6g-E2zJdcoNzEpvhwnDGlWNtOWPXaIaZ_Gflbw368-RsAAP__JiKMrA) on Chicago's South Side on Saturday after an anti-Immigration and Customs Enforcement mob rammed their vehicles and attempted to run them over, according to the Department of Homeland Security. Agents were on routine patrol near 39th Place and South Kedzie Avenue when 10 vehicles boxed them in and rammed their SUVs. They fired defensively at a female suspect who attempted to run them over. The suspect was[ also allegedly armed](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu2zAMRb9G3hRIsuXYg4cUhYEO7w3t0NGgJSpmoUiBqMT13xd-v9CBAEECF_ec3x_LB1CkdP-EB0415CXhzhFrxbKQw2fJFbnWV0n8phwxVXCwGGWs1Eoqu3igeCxd46eAaLBtcNJXO_Z26AfbbJMeFASPyg9am2EMqlvXoQ1rP6qgbd82NJ1pWqlzuq67aDua1Y5hUHDtwXaiU-ip5nL5kynVDUM88hvLxeVHE6et1ieL9ibMLMy87_vlwen8CTNjki8WZj6hhJm_dr-xZDhYkkMJd0yVJSXpNnJwz5Jf66uscs1_0Z_39ThBHRSWwLJiYsqJJbKDCBWFmaHI201__vyRN9HO2ZEX7fdvp1Pc-ReWZ1Mm_9wpRuL-Kjp1fwDFr_b1v5S_J_MvAAD__8pilnM) with a semi-automatic weapon. No officers were seriously injured, and she drove herself to a hospital for treatment. Both [the White House and Gov. JB Pritzker](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAMhp8mdEEhkzBQpLiGbq-9EpnEgO9CghLPoN2nP7GvsIUbf9Yn__-fj_kDKFLafsOBjtc8J7xqRGYsM3k8S2aszK-S6ptyxMTgYdZKW9kpqewcgOLnbJrgVkSNjwZd97Rjb4d-sM3uvBkU2n4JRqmux8EuY1hHH-Bhl0WvQ0PutnVK3WOMaTs76sWO66Dg2YM1wigMxLm0fzMl3nGNn_mNpfX5aKLbmc8qHr-EnoSerutq_VLvFDcXevI7ediy0NO9FHo6C_HXPyySy-s4JYSDElUuwJSTXDFggUhfKClGSpmqTN8IotxeUII88Fiw3KqmuHBe913tn8Ko7QCK33_xj8p8O_0_AAD___sZjPw) confirmed that the Trump administration plans to federalize 300 Illinois National Guard members amid rising tensions in the state.
## Supreme Court OKs Policy Shift
The Supreme Court cleared the way on Friday for the Trump administration to [revoke a temporary legal protection](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLtuhDAURL_GdEZ-8ihcRIroNm1KZMxlcWRsZF_vir-PyC-kmG40o3O-H_PD-uDj88seYHBLc4R3CYAIefYOzpwQCmLNsbx8ChDROjsLJjTljDI9r9aHa1bNajYAAbIBw3s9dnroBt3sxrFFgtuUFL3kahmUGJlclFw7GO2w9o039xpn7I5SquV6FIset4HZvrNaEcVg9Zhy-5N8xB22cKUX5NalowlmRzwLkR9ETERMzrY3QXvZPaW7QcRUCy31zHAAdalmpAGwUMz1OKngjEulpWx3PAKR07M6l2pEyER-8iab9Xz7EHzpeqLY87A-_B3jv2y9jPgNAAD__6Q3fg4) for around 300,000 Venezuelan immigrants in the U.S. In its latest emergency order, the high court stayed a lower court ruling from September, which stated the Trump administration [wrongly terminated an 18-month extension](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ_GdI6MsQEXLrahy7ZbIq8Zktn1n-yBKPfpr8gr3GKkkUb65pzvz329OwyYHr9dBEt7XhO8WgAiqCt6KDUTNKKjpnZiDpDIebdKITXvBRd63RyG96q6ze4AEoYObD9pM-p5nHX3tMZNsnde-3kWcjZinGS_G68NaG_ULjq0F60X4hql1K3XRv7VZp-Fm0anFVMCNqRcb_8yJnrCHt75hHrzOXbBPolKY8MvJhcml_QuudF1YnK5wEwuvWByEQOTy9H41Y_JpR2lQgTu81GJuxDyq3GqRyzcbRETp8wbVSx8g5IrOcKc-EeHv9bG95ojH4T4z09I8HVAcIlHfFSX6PrQVbuVF4aAbZyYEo_oMHwy049En1Z-BwAA__-duJOR) of temporary protected status for the migrants. Over the summer, the Trump administration won emergency appeals on immigration, research grants, and federal layoffs. [The Supreme Court will convene](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3unDAQxJ_GdEbG2HwULtLQXdqUaDHL3UYGI3vBurePyCv8i5FGGmlG8_vzml9AgY73b9jR8RbnA0sOyIxpJo9nioyZ-UpHvikGPBg8zFppKxsllZ1XoPCdTbW6DVFjW6Frejt2dugGW33c2JllXExvt37oQCtoVQNKjctmVQurr8g9bY1Sj4wxdWNHvdhxGxT0HVgjjMKVOKb6b6SDP7iFb7wx1T7uVXAf5jOL9pfQk9BTKaX2S35ePLnQ02OFnvJ1JtxR-ngllgcWyZh2maMnCJJyvjBLTtd-yjMG8oRZJrwJi9BTldx6FgqBctcLo947UPi_zz-Cdjv9LwAA__9L_oMd) on Monday for its new term with cases on conversion therapy, redistricting, gun rights, and transgender athletes.
## Kavanaugh's Would-Be Assassin Gets 8 Years
A California [man who tried to assassinate](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQhZ8Gd0RAwI4Lim3o7rZbWuMwjrlLwGLGjvz2K-8r3OJUR_rOz5-v6QtSTuX1G97oealTwQ9lZMY2pSdurTIS894KHalmLAxPmIwyTmollZsipHxOtot-QTR479DrwY29e_QP160enMEh9svsoh7dPQ79rDSM89POugejuuQvmlbqkrX2pt1oZjcuDwVDD84KqzAmru32XVPhFZd81gPb7VnfXfYr80bi_kuYIEwo51aJL0uYcIGFCVoJE9RdmLCTvPYJE-aGzPIvHFBgf60kP3XPUc4ogQiIUpEvZJLfO7G80uRDngiNZCpya4lqESZ0zcftk3JO1A_CqtcbUv7fi3905uHNvwAAAP__NO6I3A) Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh in 2022 received an eight-year, one-month federal prison sentence and a lifetime of supervised release on Friday. The sentence imposed by a Biden-appointed federal judge fell far short of the 30 years to life requested by federal prosecutors. The Justice Department said it [will appeal the sentence](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGuozAQxvHTmG4iY2xCCopt3L1tt0QDjJN569jIHoK4_Yq9wiumGukn_b8_X9MXcuT0_I1vGiXkKdFRI4lQmXihrWShKrKXVD-cIyXBBSejjYNWg3bTihzPyTbrGIgMdQ2N7d09ejf0g2teY9_Nc2sHZ2kxZEkvhN2gDQYkHTqyDY-X1mp9nbX21rqHmd0jDBrvPTqrrKaVJZfbd-YkLwrxzB8qtyW_mzi-RLaqul_KeGV8Ordc5Xop4y9YGd9qZby2yvi9wtWnjEeRXBKd8KREBSNs-IY5p5Wh4llhzd9wcIyA20YY4cgU9hhP4FT3EHhhSgKVklBaCEIucOQ9rjAT_MUPJtyfL8BasVZOyvimjOt2iVz7u7L6-UaO_xPkR7t_RvMvAAD__8KUmjY). As part of his guilty plea, [Nicholas Roske admitted to](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSpCAYBOCnwQwLGVAnILjEbC690GLgV_85BAp-tebtt2Zr32CDTr_u6n-P-WExYFz_2h0MLWmOcNUARFBmdJBLIqhER4n1xBQgknV2lkJq3gku9OwthvesGm8WAAm3Bkw36Huvx37UzWbcIJ9CKj3acVl63z21FFqNt0U6aV0vGjQfrRPiE6VU2-m7fOr7Mgo79FYrpgR4pFTaV8JIGyzhnU4orUt7E8xGlCu7_WFyYnK6rqt9HZXQQbumk8kpZcvklAuTU0S3pWArL6n-B14hEkQHnn84DrhuxN9gS-W5YE2RWyLYM4Hn-1E8FF6PXGAH7tJRiP8UNcX4fGEIWPuBKbHuFsP3OvrVpaeRXwEAAP__m1WO5Q) flying from Los Angeles to Dulles with a firearm and ammunition before Deputy U.S. Marshals saw him exit a taxi outside Kavanaugh's home. In explaining her sentencing decision, the judge [expressed doubts about the government's contention](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAURL_GdEa2sQ0ULiJFdJsmilIiAxfwxmsj37us-PuI9wuvmGqk0Zzz9zE-fIghbb_8CxyteUzwwQhEUMYww1EyARK9S8Iz5AiJ_OxHJZThUnBhxsWHeI26WtwKoKCpwMnW9NZ0tjPV7lYtJjtPol1BQjNpK4USulWd1KJZpKyCu9ekEHe01rU0vZpMv3bCt9YbzbSAJVAu9TOHRDus8conlHrOryq6nehA1vxgamBq8NN8E9Rbvmumhj-_mRqeb6QwA58KEPF__vTJv7cduUf0iCFxhESQZlh4xy_wBflRAubE1ICUy8WaISys-SmVlX2rramKW45PiDGgbZkW28uH-HWJvuXxdOp_AAAA__-fDobX) that Roske would have carried out the attempted assassination if he hadn't seen the U.S. Marshals stationed outside Kavanaugh's residence.

**Whatever happened to Kenny Rogers Roasters?** In the early 1991, country music legend Kenny Rogers teamed up with former Kentucky Fried Chicken executive John Y. Brown Jr. to launch Kenny Rogers Roasters, a chain specializing in wood-fired rotisserie chicken. At the time, America was shifting toward “healthier” fast food options, and roasted chicken felt like the perfect alternative to greasy fried buckets.

The restaurants were brightly lit, casual, and family-friendly, and by the mid-1990s, the chain exploded to over 350 locations worldwide and was even parodied in a famous episode of _Seinfeld_. [But the flame burned out quickly](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb8Gb1iAwcYDQxdv6drRejGPmBZDBC-x8vdV-gsd7nSlc6TzdVkvEFPMt0840FEoa8azJSTCusYN77UQNqJHze0ZS8JMsMGqhDJcCi7M6iGm16o77wKiwqFDJyczj8aO1nS7A6FQo5R2mPR1s5sIdpq3QXkYgoZguujeNCnEe1rrXppZXc0crIBpBKOZFugjldp_l5hpx5Be5Ym138rRJbcT3RsbPphamFrO8-wPaDv6983UIufRipGphXbkj0wleU71QTsvgf9gzi9eyw1r47VAI6yNqaWrzt_PmFJs48S0uB0Q05-P_hXp6dRvAAAA__-sfHvN). By the late ’90s, competition from Boston Market and supermarket rotisserie chickens squeezed them hard. Overexpansion, lawsuits, rising costs, and a failure to stand out in the crowded fast-casual market led to financial trouble.

In 1998, Kenny Rogers Roasters filed for bankruptcy, and U.S. locations quickly dwindled. The brand actually still exists today—but mostly in Asia, where it has found surprising staying power, particularly in Malaysia and the Philippines.

While Americans remember it as a brief fad, it lives on as a nostalgic brand overseas. _Were you a fan of Kenny Rogers Roasters? Let us know your thoughts by replying to this email._

Dermatologists can’t explain why works so well, yet over 16,500 women swear by the stunning results. Discover the easy steps below: | Whatever happened to Kenny Rogers Roasters? In the early 1991, country music legend Kenny Rogers teamed up with former Kentucky Fried Chicken executive John Y. Brown Jr. to launch Kenny Rogers Roasters, a chain specializing in wood-fired rotisserie chicken. At the time, America was shifting toward “healthier” fast food options, and roasted chicken felt like the perfect alternative to greasy fried buckets. The restaurants were brightly lit, casual, and family-friendly, and by the mid-1990s, the chain exploded to over 350 locations worldwide and was even parodied in a famous episode of Seinfeld. . By the late ’90s, competition from Boston Market and supermarket rotisserie chickens squeezed them hard. Overexpansion, lawsuits, rising costs, and a failure to stand out in the crowded fast-casual market led to financial trouble. In 1998, Kenny Rogers Roasters filed for bankruptcy, and U.S. locations quickly dwindled. The brand actually still exists today—but mostly in Asia, where it has found surprising staying power, particularly in Malaysia and the Philippines. While Americans remember it as a brief fad, it lives on as a nostalgic brand overseas. Were you a fan of Kenny Rogers Roasters? name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Semper Fi. Always faithful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely.

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhr6/?__vbtrk=MzI0MTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0MTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) Semper Fi. Always faithful.
I often get asked, “Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren’t even born in? [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhr6/?__vbtrk=MzI0MTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0MTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) And to that, I say absolutely.
Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don’t often make promises, but I can promise you this: I’m not your typical politician, and I’m not like the others who normally send you these messages:
-I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women’s homeless shelter and a men’s prison ministry.
I’ve lived a full, rewarding life – and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America.
And now, I’m running for Governor of Virginia – to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way – a beacon of hope.
But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children.
Not on my watch.
[So, consider this a humble invitation to join my campaign: Will you chip in today—even if it’s just a few bucks—to ensure that we have the means needed to beat my Democrat opponent and win this thing?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhr6/?__vbtrk=MzI0MTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0MTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) [ CHIP IN HERE >>
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhr6/?__vbtrk=MzI0MTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0MTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) [ HELP WINSOME WIN HERE >>
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhr6/?__vbtrk=MzI0MTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0MTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) We have a long journey ahead of us, but we will be better off with you on our side. [ CHIP IN HERE >>
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhr6/?__vbtrk=MzI0MTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0MTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) Thank you & God Bless, Winsome Earle-Sears Candidate for Governor of Virginia
* * *
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhr6/?__vbtrk=MzI0MTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0MTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) I’m Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn’t over yet!

It’s going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. [_**So please, chip in if you can today!**_](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhr6/?__vbtrk=MzI0MTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0MTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) [ CHIP IN NOW >>
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bhr6/?__vbtrk=MzI0MTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI0MTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) | Paid for by Winsome for Governor

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1903, geophysicist [M. King Hubbert](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUxfGnwVusCwbHGRi6WJWqdO2I-LjYVyU4AhInb18lr9DxLD8d_X_O5mwpUV6-7QV1e8TNZNxrwtawmIYPW1db3a1SxloxLJhxL9YIEOrA4QDKBEvpaWQXtINw4h1qflSncRQcVLdqG5UPchIiRu-kCjaOg3JeTAMfJHjekX5hHEBxDlwO_SAnD4DSTZNHJ09MAgZqW-nbiu9LMT23O5beb5cu6bW1a2XDBxMzEzPmfqdfumIg229lYWJ-bSbmc2--KC_m8-YcltYVHa47pUR1PDIJy8VSepPtfyHuWvwFAAD__4bvcsU), born in San Saba, predicted in 1956 that U.S. oil production would peak in 1970 and then begin to decline. That trend continued until fracking's rise in the 1990s revived production. ## Texas No. 3 State For Doing Business
Texas was ranked as the [third-best state](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1urDAQRp_GdEbjH1goXNyrK7q9TSKlRAMewJLBxHaW3bePWCXKA6Sa5mh0vvN27a_ovNvm_7iSyfcp9BsdyVPOFPtMd0wLpuEjuY1SIjvTRkfEXoKsuAAOVW_R-UevC2sGsK0oyIhL1da1FFAViyEhoMVGIIoaWrBaqQHHFifVjiMpUThzPhMAlRAgtCqVbkYA0kPTjDTolmkg63KIZV7oqTT5R7hRLMewFt4sOe-JqT9Mdkx2x3GUGAkt3ciHfaUtnxyT3WvY-UvGTIlPIfJ_wW0z__s1jcnuXfHThMnuPInnsPP0w39HKNOSV19EY_fDee9SfWEa5hWdfwrl32W8GfkZAAD__4m1iE4) for doing business in Area Development's annual Top States for Doing Business survey. The list is compiled by a panel of consultants who ranked the states based on three major criteria: strong access to qualified talent, consistent pro-business policy at both the state and local level, and aggressive site development efforts. Texas led the way for site development, coming in as the best state for site availability. Texas ranked as the second-best state for access to qualified labor and the third-best state for cost of energy. States were ranked on multiple other criteria, which you can find with the full survey [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1urDAQRp_GdEbjH1goXNyrK7q9TSKlRAMewJLBxHaW3bePWCXKA6Sa5mh0vvN27a_ovNvm_7iSyfcp9BsdyVPOFPtMd0wLpuEjuY1SIjvTRkfEXoKsuAAOVW_R-UevC2sGsK0oyIhL1da1FFAViyEhoMVGIIoaWrBaqQHHFifVjiMpUThzPhMAlRAgtCqVbkYA0kPTjDTolmkg63KIZV7oqTT5R7hRLMewFt4sOe-JqT9Mdkx2x3GUGAkt3ciHfaUtnxyT3WvY-UvGTIlPIfJ_wW0z__s1jcnuXfHThMnuPInnsPP0w39HKNOSV19EY_fDee9SfWEa5hWdfwrl32W8GfkZAAD__4m1iE4).
## Rare Harvest "Supermoon" Visible
The celestial spectacle known as a "Harvest supermoon" [will be visible](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u4yAUhVdjd1gXDIQUFNOky7RTWhe4tpGwiYDEyaz-Kd7Cq7-j8_fvPt0xprgvf3Ej295znnY6aqLWqEyN3lhXrO5Z4061Ulhop6PgJEAoxoGBmgLG9JlkH6yDcOU9WX5RV60FB9WvVktptAuoLs6M2niNQQkuRpCCZuNDH-3XjAMozoHLcRil8QAknTGenLx2EijElsvQVjorzemTX1QGn7c-2bW1R-3GP524deJ2HMdQH-jpSztxqw3Lgv_jvnzh-mErlhfVxracd3buiJUhK1iIZd-yo8LmZ0qnoC82PI6YUqz60klYNozpzG2_e-tlxU8AAAD__6dqf8k) in Texas tonight starting at 10:48 p.m. The rare phenomenon occurs when a full moon coincides with the moon's closest approach to Earth in its elliptical orbit, making the moon appear larger and brighter than usual. The Harvest Moon has come in October in just 18 of the previous 50 years, adding to the supermoon's rarity. The supermoon will be visible [tonight through Oct. 7](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OgzAQhJ_GdKD1H4HCxTV0ufZKZPASWzI2svdC8vYn8gpXrnY0M9_83Oe7DTGkx7fd0dBry3PCs0YkwjITvmz1ti6_NSSsFd0DE57FzgKEbjm0oGdnQ3zPqnFmATfyBg2_6bHvBQfdeDNsKIBLkJuC23gdUo1a9hK54G7QTTCXGQfQnANXspNqWAFQLcOw4qJGpgBdoFw68viptMV3fmLp1rw30XiiozL5xcTExHSeZ7e_q002UU4hXyImpovq-qIlj4WJyRYKa0QmJm_LEyu1e86p_YAJDr2UveoOfzTFuOMMMYba35iCx25D_CTT__Z6GvEXAAD__00Nfg8), when the full moon will reach its peak. You can read more on what makes this year's Harvest Moon a rarity, and how to watch it [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u4yAUhVdjd1gXDIQUFNOky7RTWhe4tpGwiYDEyaz-Kd7Cq7-j8_fvPt0xprgvf3Ej295znnY6aqLWqEyN3lhXrO5Z4061Ulhop6PgJEAoxoGBmgLG9JlkH6yDcOU9WX5RV60FB9WvVktptAuoLs6M2niNQQkuRpCCZuNDH-3XjAMozoHLcRil8QAknTGenLx2EijElsvQVjorzemTX1QGn7c-2bW1R-3GP524deJ2HMdQH-jpSztxqw3Lgv_jvnzh-mErlhfVxracd3buiJUhK1iIZd-yo8LmZ0qnoC82PI6YUqz60klYNozpzG2_e-tlxU8AAAD__6dqf8k).

The list is compiled by a panel of consultants who ranked the states based on three major criteria: strong access to qualified talent, consistent pro-business policy at both the state and local level, and aggressive site development efforts. Texas led the way for site development, coming in as the best state for site availability. Texas ranked as the second-best state for access to qualified labor and the third-best state for cost of energy. States were ranked on multiple other criteria, which you can find with the full survey . Rare Harvest "Supermoon" Visible The celestial spectacle known as a "Harvest supermoon" in Texas tonight starting at 10:48 p.m. The rare phenomenon occurs when a full moon coincides with the moon's closest approach to Earth in its elliptical orbit, making the moon appear larger and brighter than usual. The Harvest Moon has come in October in just 18 of the previous 50 years, adding to the supermoon's rarity. The supermoon will be visible , when the full moon will reach its peak. You can read more on what makes this year's Harvest Moon a rarity, and how to watch it . List: Top Haunted Houses In Texas Plano's Dark Hour ranked as on a new list of the state's best haunted houses. name: Warning
subject: We are 30 days out from a MAGA electoral coup attempt
body:
If you thought it couldn’t get any more worse, think again.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HdL6VPGX3PJ0N9nUhfw2579ZcsEvjpXx1DIESyce95AeCsrxjn0N3qi07OOyv0eus3d4X_YpZUaV5z5FYAuOkSZcXcrwHMFZHiNS1XFYmurUbcotPnpR_7PphLrNzqHq8bXWM4zk7GWy0gpQNUftkcW0tJHXMiy8P5XS7KDk-GW-A9ODqsVUAa7TN3xz8PHl28z-8dvrZRwKWZSPR5PNGLOAE0LcwmEauscSUYBchBU=&c=7LpDg0VDXGqP9eqob6zEPMC3jBoM_f4Dln2DWcGuG-huptb-kZcgSg==&ch=wnotuWjC7_33Zy2iKdqmUCIY90-qmRmdJeyEXfA66oCQT9SbxX4gAw==)
---
| Friend,
If you thought it couldn't get any more worse, think again.
Today we are exactly 30 days away from election day in the 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election - an election which if MAGA wins will be nothing short of an electoral coup.
If MAGA removes the three supreme court justices that give the court its three vote Democratic majority, Democrats never win Pennsylvania again \- 19 electoral college votes in the most important swing state gone until 2035 (the next time this election will occur). We lose in 2028.
Democrats are rapidly losing ground and if the election were held today MAGA would win. We still have time to turn things around but only if millions of Democrats from across America rush to our side. Which is why we are lighting a distress beacon to call for aid.
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HdL6VPGX3PJ0N9nUhfw2579ZcsEvjpXx1DIESyce95AeCsrxjn0N3qi07OOyv0eus3d4X_YpZUaV5z5FYAuOkSZcXcrwHMFZHiNS1XFYmurUbcotPnpR_7PphLrNzqHq8bXWM4zk7GWy0gpQNUftkcW0tJHXMiy8P5XS7KDk-GW-A9ODqsVUAa7TN3xz8PHl28z-8dvrZRwKWZSPR5PNGLOAE0LcwmEaGymO4jbwFKs=&c=7LpDg0VDXGqP9eqob6zEPMC3jBoM_f4Dln2DWcGuG-huptb-kZcgSg==&ch=wnotuWjC7_33Zy2iKdqmUCIY90-qmRmdJeyEXfA66oCQT9SbxX4gAw==)
---
| The beacons have been lit. We need Democrats everywhere to rush to Pennsylvania's Aid.
This election will be won or lost during these first weeks of October and there is still time for Democrats to make a historic comeback and snatch victory from the clutches of defeat.
Participating in this election as a volunteer, donor, or even as a person posting about it on Facebook, is the most important action we can take right now to stop Trump and his fascist agenda.
If everyone does their part we come back from behind, we win, and we keep this critical court for another decade.
[We need you now more than ever. Can we count on you to make a donation of whatever you are able to? Thousands of fellow Democrats are joining you and whether it is $50, $250, or even just $5, you are doing your part and it will add up.](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HdL6VPGX3PJ0N9nUhfw2579ZcsEvjpXx1DIESyce95AeCsrxjn0N3qi07OOyv0eus3d4X_YpZUaV5z5FYAuOkSZcXcrwHMFZHiNS1XFYmurUbcotPnpR_7PphLrNzqHq8bXWM4zk7GWy0gpQNUftkcW0tJHXMiy8P5XS7KDk-GW-A9ODqsVUAa7TN3xz8PHl28z-8dvrZRwKWZSPR5PNGLOAE0LcwmEaDxswoTuolAM=&c=7LpDg0VDXGqP9eqob6zEPMC3jBoM_f4Dln2DWcGuG-huptb-kZcgSg==&ch=wnotuWjC7_33Zy2iKdqmUCIY90-qmRmdJeyEXfA66oCQT9SbxX4gAw==)

clean_body: If you thought it couldn’t get any more worse, think again. | | | | | == | Friend, If you thought it couldn't get any more worse, think again. Today we are exactly 30 days away from election day in the 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election - an election which if MAGA wins will be nothing short of an electoral coup. If MAGA removes the three supreme court justices that give the court its three vote Democratic majority, Democrats never win Pennsylvania again \- 19 electoral college votes in the most important swing state gone until 2035 (the next time this election will occur). We lose in 2028. Democrats are rapidly losing ground and if the election were held today MAGA would win. We still have time to turn things around but only if millions of Democrats from across America rush to our side. Which is why we are lighting a distress beacon to call for aid. | | == | The beacons have been lit. We need Democrats everywhere to rush to Pennsylvania's Aid. This election will be won or lost during these first weeks of October and there is still time for Democrats to make a historic comeback and snatch victory from the clutches of defeat. Participating in this election as a volunteer, donor, or even as a person posting about it on Facebook, is the most important action we can take right now to stop Trump and his fascist agenda. If everyone does their part we come back from behind, we win, and we keep this critical court for another decade. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | When all seemed lost, you came to Pennsylvania's aid. name: Jennifer Jenkins for U.S. Senate
subject: can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
This will be a different kind of battle. There’s so much on the line.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T88a38cdd-e9b0-4b13-a746-3fd35c873e37/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6fd720ff-52fd-4f7a-b717-171acba40e01/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [I’m Democrat Jennifer Jenkins, and I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate to defeat Trump’s hand-picked MAGA candidate. I’m going to tell you why your $5 will help win this Florida Senate seat and take back the Senate majority for Democrats, but if you don’t have time, can I count on you to rush a donation to me and Blue Amp Action before midnight? Even the smallest amount helps us stick it to Ron DeSantis and Ashley Moody! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1ac75bf0-dd43-4fc3-b438-f9e2bc992c24/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE NOW→](https://default.salsalabs.org/T20de33fa-6499-4873-957f-5dff4c27a8d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| When I first ran for office, I didn’t do it because I wanted a career in politics. I did it because I couldn’t sit back while our teachers were denied fair pay and our kids’ futures were being shortchanged. I stood up. I ran for school board. And I won in a county where Democrats are outnumbered two-to-one. From day one, extremists tried to silence me. They protested outside my home, threatened me, and even cheered when the Governor singled me out as a target. But I refused to let my daughter see me give up while families across Florida – Republican or Democrat – needed someone to fight for them. I’m an educator. My husband is a teacher. Who was gonna fight for us? [Me. That’s who. I refused to quit. That’s why I’m running. Because Floridians deserve a battle-tested fighter in the U.S. Senate. I know a $5 split may not seem like much. But if 10,000 people donate $5, we’ll hit our goal in no time and power this campaign to victory. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T415da4af-279e-4b83-8ebf-9aadeb8caf4b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $5 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T63675310-a618-4db7-b889-e1d18e5388b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $20 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0155a487-d79e-4b07-9c05-febe94317105/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8ab30a47-35ca-4d44-87c4-eb1139d11a1d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| This will be a different kind of battle. There’s so much on the line. MAGA Republicans are stripping Florida Families and seniors from Medicaid, Social Security and critical food assistance. Ron DeSantis and his cronies are redrawing new district lines to flip future elections in their favor – all while wasting millions of taxpayer dollars that should be going to lowering housing costs. Trump is threatening to eliminate vote-by-mail – destroying the democratic tool that keeps our elections safe, secure, and accessible. 3 million Floridians voted by mail in the 2024 election. And Ashley Moody? She wasn’t even elected. And yet she has voted to de-fund PBS, confirm Robert F. Kennedy, cut funding for food assistance, and is a huge advocate for Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill”. But Florida is winnable. I live here. I’m raising my daughter here. And I believe our state deserves leaders who are honest, fearless, and willing to fight for everyday people — not just the powerful and well-connected. This campaign isn’t just about winning one election. It’s about proving that hope, integrity, and courage still matter — and about building a future where our kids can thrive. [I’m ready to fight for that future. But I can’t do it alone. In this grave moment of our democracy, I need your help. If I can raise $50,000, we can prove we have the people power to defeat Ashley Moody and provide a much-needed check on Donald Trump. Can I count on you to split a donation of $1 or $5 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tea823e6c-e2a1-4c6f-b981-71cc945129bc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $1 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3ecc30f7-2da5-4158-ac54-dc1d7cd29179/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| Together, Jennifer Jenkins

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc8782a1-f1e7-439a-b300-e4b5eff00b97/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Warning
subject: We are 30 days out from a MAGA electoral coup attempt
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
If you thought it couldn’t get any more worse, think again. Today we are exactly 30 days away from election day for the 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TA8ORqB5d9izgq4l_AYy71KTamLW9FsU_fo2m4u06oTery4-AYaEftquEhRzQNQ7hzIyjApVy4YJlRtWgDnoDEd_CKsnDV5WDEUL9MvbCK8KCvre0b4tCZo6yoygJ_vdmEbBssdUpoVR1HSJXsfWzIhpLsPVx76u_qW-4IbVDstOxV57MdgmbiUStBSLQn6uv_5m_-1iDIzq6y6MVcT5rvb7Q-0iRVlNF1O0C1C9CB8=&c=bMr7joDeMzsPTIt6luX_QZ7dJhqqsLkZN8XaZH5OVh6n2hjnLa5IqQ==&ch=d49kk3XbwUzdXX3erumCnIDCNtiLgcItIzBx7rjcwouaVvvLVm_HIA==)
---
| Peter,
If you thought it couldn't get any more worse, think again.
Today we are exactly 30 days away from election day in the 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election - an election which if MAGA wins will be nothing short of an electoral coup.
If MAGA removes the three supreme court justices that give the court its three vote Democratic majority, Democrats never win Pennsylvania again \- 19 electoral college votes in the most important swing state gone until 2035 (the next time this election will occur). We lose in 2028.
Democrats are rapidly losing ground and if the election were held today MAGA would win. We still have time to turn things around but only if millions of Democrats from across America rush to our side. Which is why we are lighting a distress beacon to call for aid.
