name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Why I’m fighting for our future.
body:
Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Fellow American,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8d899e28cab74494b8bddbb89c5a1c42&_e=PtCgS9cbvAAz6Gh4jRYYZcxBVJRN9Gv3EwAQFzbEjcLLZVxb7CXL61wMrjtoDksOyHYrdZ8ctFqgucKZCQhIWqbMEiz911wdcH3od8cacopfk0wFmhNzih5RJBotIztqX6CzQI0Tc-6OPeR9Hz7JZmsv8lb4XMjqqeEZx9x5y0L8qdVuJgvgNIl3lxIcuY7oIkSKHEmv4QOKI4BpPXf-ZOWntXusxI9yeDJ9IWP5b0Nrq9BohzaVmAuST39dT9tHMZbcpziSUl39YZ3iNLcg_J2lDzZC7D7Urxb7MausOtuA6n1_0x260NbQPIj7qSN60BLcYXXWVYlxa5t5IHeQXhhLCi3orQ_TJqKABxg56ZgG-RRdF8IMI4qBKs2vCQyZu7pHpjUhZRDFEJoCXO-0i3HF2AUfcL4YwVyyeviaVp0suzYdMIGLZZwY7AETdZm_R0ckkWajQBqmzi80ANowTecyG1rMEi8DOt6X-wLTZbaNohCkec2glLVXc3fkmMKTM6nck5TMb_4nq7DkqMI5pGjG4IW-qJqp_bXU5SFMpD4qLu3DU8ZHcF4C1VZYKXmBEyWYVdrHcMLT9QKA8nNebPkT6l3cHUm0NU8qutzMQPaHzjlJ7TdSuiyR8lt4frkU6q-L-DEFIiaDaBPqWuMC2fw5Ku1ZzrtsZE9aHqfN3Y8%3D)
**I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8d899e28cab74494b8bddbb89c5a1c42&_e=PtCgS9cbvAAz6Gh4jRYYZcxBVJRN9Gv3EwAQFzbEjcLLZVxb7CXL61wMrjtoDksOyHYrdZ8ctFqgucKZCQhIWqbMEiz911wdcH3od8cacopfk0wFmhNzih5RJBotIztqX6CzQI0Tc-6OPeR9Hz7JZmsv8lb4XMjqqeEZx9x5y0L8qdVuJgvgNIl3lxIcuY7oIkSKHEmv4QOKI4BpPXf-ZOWntXusxI9yeDJ9IWP5b0Nk9HjTlXX8xuYSaYiqB83xrxnlvqBKZaii7iXcDQk3vro4NgsmfMM_cPCi7uRIEyBC_0DYJo3_6Kwf17KTnt2_EQdWLZVppMpvNpHCM-T8nedNRkeBu-SQ9qWmHQxfuMzVgfVQh6N4vlK2oKeY3vLIl-5D6r5fajRXrexPXGwub8oOr4WVOnfCbcHr980oGYJUbezWNC4n3piRqplqQwQMRe9Swmc3nayGJIt6PoQBZ0wAArAY0Q9BV7mOJNaHuGT6-FLb4A0vVzlWHjaDTYJBEeyRByKE4yYrhWGAuDNmjw2oIa4L1UdPUVf0TLH8GfMvexlFl0uqvY1xodxIHqSrLjsFqzPezihO0Rp9Bkoq6jLuPksiAMDjyGfe5LYNgwWCtxTecBRXSWgvfybZ8eZ9ktX_QaW5bLnZMTgLGK-9o9qADZF7bCKiZvCxd5vrHmk%3D)
Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with a simple request: if you have a few dollars to spare, would you consider making a contribution to support my campaign by clicking this link or the button below?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8d899e28cab74494b8bddbb89c5a1c42&_e=PtCgS9cbvAAz6Gh4jRYYZcxBVJRN9Gv3EwAQFzbEjcLLZVxb7CXL61wMrjtoDksOyHYrdZ8ctFqgucKZCQhIWqbMEiz911wdcH3od8cacopfk0wFmhNzih5RJBotIztqX6CzQI0Tc-6OPeR9Hz7JZmsv8lb4XMjqqeEZx9x5y0L8qdVuJgvgNIl3lxIcuY7oIkSKHEmv4QOKI4BpPXf-ZOWntXusxI9yeDJ9IWP5b0Msvp7B1LrxwXp68HhgbRU4YrD6HdUkXsfAalo4Uyx_L0sqcEIn1Ems9hMdRovd9oQ3vX-ktOLJjNjxOJXWS33d2-hJ2caPSa72N_NDezjwq610WdcGZfHjBxfov9X3n9W2QT9EwniJjlu0vMqBlaxspUnOorcPCrBircfQM77rFjoE1DxfLHEMwDznhWEUjtOJACZEoxPmWz2R3qDm8cHuXbcPXLJXowd4t2xGaLYl2EaU3Od2ZM7u714octHyiPz3Fyb2aGS1IMa1VHn7BQRkorRGamL0zzOaBM57R9qnKFBjoM7Jm99Jaibr1d5JiOCu3qxJf1b0eQKt1en3xH1eKbnvHeRUNdSjhcWocfSevVkWTQy5uXZy5_7IMIL1YWg_HUhqFlgMxtZaOmgunoapcTe3syKeZ7Vlm0Eo44m-ImbFEL3P19qFXtbUI1uiFUg%3D)**

| [**CONTRIBUTE HERE**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=8d899e28cab74494b8bddbb89c5a1c42&_e=PtCgS9cbvAAz6Gh4jRYYZcxBVJRN9Gv3EwAQFzbEjcLLZVxb7CXL61wMrjtoDksOyHYrdZ8ctFqgucKZCQhIWqbMEiz911wdcH3od8cacopfk0wFmhNzih5RJBotIztqX6CzQI0Tc-6OPeR9Hz7JZmsv8lb4XMjqqeEZx9x5y0L8qdVuJgvgNIl3lxIcuY7oIkSKHEmv4QOKI4BpPXf-ZOWntXusxI9yeDJ9IWP5b0PXuJLJOwymk7FZf5lM95EEHoG-LS54Kccs4zxcwJfil2o7xxlZgMeVr-ZlxNyJfhCumlgRC8Mx8lXIFMOE8MB_LyEnYF0SaLlazpAIFnlrFNpwiunmuBPWo5tDRxreVMYRJ0vtGKQBHMmGgxDcTMTC7v18OYdeqGgPV_i9rFTKdsFDEJClBR-tHG-56udIwOhP3NAbPH0o4J9_qeVE25wkIoWrjzA_59JD8bTajkSnHyJTaQjK2OxLNo4OC3U_6L039DqZj4kA_n8AuILH8QsPwBPDZFMvGsk7LkIwAERp7r1MVbKim-FzGDuQ0HFOU-4iirwk7dsbs8eKDLczxlLkMLCqtRQANQgVJhIv_zoruvLNizBJRrmmNhwNNy5cbcpflJsSQfylNdvIr4TrOrhfkRSwcA6PdSLouYQQLdqSNm9dX4u8cStlNlI3VEa4uYI%3D)
---

If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message.

Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have.

Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message.

Sincerely,

clean_body: Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. | Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses. I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,and I learned many life lessons at an early age. After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq. Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility. But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need. It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on. We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from. Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families. | If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message. Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have. Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is moving
body:
[unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0qw598ptmogx879ug7zoxdpxqbwntp9pbf5jqraav4mzsc2fip03y53pe6gotj354uvh6lm0pn&__stmp=t3nsr9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nsr9&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nsr9&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nsr9&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nsr9&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nsr9&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nsr9&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nsr9&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nsr9&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nsr9&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nsr9&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=qwikcdl711sj22nn1linqaderw0ysgamzpg1vrlnl0tle0ov55q67camxwuksxxlht9bcuzvl4yrx9ltonp0f2jciblrz68rdmuv9cm6k6kw0p04y768u169uldq77i771c&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nsr9&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nsr9&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

Please send them this link: Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, we're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. God is so good. 🙏 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 / / MATERIAL RELATIONSHIP NOTICE: Presume the sender of this email has an affiliate or other material connection with the entities or individuals mentioned and may receive compensation for purchases made through related websites. You should not solely use this email’s information to assess products or services. Always perform independent research before purchasing. © 2025 Rising M Network, LLC. All Rights Reserved. name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Orwellian commission comes to Philly suburbs
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c8d0596709&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Suburban Star Chambers](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=962d477bb3&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Guy Ciarrocchi_
The Star Chamber has been brought to Chester County — and, Delaware and Montgomery Counties. The unstoppable, government-growing, power-seeking Democratic majority ignored questions and concerns to create an Orwellian-named “Human Relations Commission.” To stop “hate.”

If you run a daycare or pre-school, a local sports program, or health club, you should really pay attention. You could be subpoenaed to appear before the “Commission.” If your children attend a daycare or pre-school, play in a local sports program, or you’re a member of a health club, pay attention, too.

And if you work at a daycare, pre-school or health club, or if you volunteer as a coach in a local sports program, you ought to really pay attention — because one slip of the tongue and you could be subpoenaed, too.

The “Commission” could declare you a certified “hater” — and fine you.

**Why It Matters**. There are no professional or life experiences required to be appointed. There’s no training on how to officiate a judicial proceeding; or, how to conduct investigations. No set duration for an investigation or hearing. There’s no clear standard of proof required. (Yikes!)

No experience required. No judicial training. No investigative training. Just “stop hate!”

Get appointed by progressive commissioners to enforce a progressive vision of utopia, using progressive-created terms and standards to impose progressive group-think across the County.

Actual, genuine concerns about bona fide rights are already protected by Pennsylvania’s Human Relations Commission (appointed by Governor Shapiro) — with professional staff, rules of proceeding to protect accusers and the accused, and years of legal precedent. In addition, the state attorney general and local district attorneys are empowered to prosecute actual acts of hate — for which we all have zero tolerance. In addition, the US Justice Department and the US Commission on Civil Rights are there to protect everyone.

This star chamber isn’t about protecting actual rights. It’s about virtue-signaling and misusing government to rally anti-Trump, anti-Republican votes.

**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2bc9fed412&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[The murder of a South Philly barber](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3123df9d1e&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Paul Davis_
Philadelphia police officers responded to a report of a person screaming on 10th and Oregon Avenue on December 2nd, and they discovered Procopio in his kitchen bleeding from his massive injuries. Procopio was rushed to the Jefferson University Hospital in critical condition, according to the police.

Piselli was identified quickly as the suspect and he was taken into custody by the police. The Philadelphia Police said that their investigation revealed that Piselli had been acting irrationally in Procopio’s backyard. A witness to Piselli’s behavior called the police after Piselli entered Procopio’s home and locked the witness out of the home. Police said Piselli entered the home and assaulted Procopio repeatedly.

The witness told police that he saw the attack through the kitchen window. He saw Piselli hitting Procopio while he was lying on the kitchen floor. Piselli left the house and ran down the street. Police searched the area, found Piselli, and arrested him. He was charged with a variety of assault offences.

I’ve covered many murder cases over the years while working as a reporter and crime columnist, but this case is of special interest to me as Santo Procopio was not only my barber for many years, he was also a good friend. I thought of Santo, and his late brother Vince, as my uncles. I have been Santo’s customer and friend since I was a teenager in the 1960s.

Santo retired a few years ago, but he continued to help others. I recently spoke to a mutual friend who told me that Michael Piselli had drug and mental issues, and Santo Procopio had been helping him.
Piselli, it appears, rewarded Santo for his good efforts by brutally beating him to death.

No good deed goes unpunished, as the saying goes. Santo Procopio did not deserve to die this way.
**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fb66c6d0f4&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Christine Flowers: Megyn Kelly’s platform is powerful — but her silence speaks louder](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=12a44b9498&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: Philadelphia high school students struggle on Keystone Exams while the District prioritizes social justice events](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d5ea196e7c&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christian Matozzo: Gauthier’s unconstitutional power-grab](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=956aceda7c&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Ada Nestor: The catastrophic end of militant youth](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cd8a12ee09&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Stephen Gambescia: Electrical silence from college leaders on Kirk’s assassination](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4e69298aaa&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Marines grapple with history and judgment in new play](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=05ff8275d3&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[John Rossi: Old-time baseball in ‘the dump on the hump’](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=aac5e14ae3&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
This week, we’re reading about reading. Or, rather, about the steep decline in reading among that younger generation that grew up in the age of the smartphone. On his Substack, [James Marriott writes about the decline in long-form reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a8a80d2998&e=b7b3eddce2), which is effectively a decline in functional literacy.

Since Broad + Liberty is print media, this naturally concerns us, but the implications are far greater than the fate of one publication. As Marriott notes, “certain kinds of complex and logical thinking simply cannot be achieved without reading and writing. It is virtually impossible to develop a detailed and logical argument in spontaneous speech — you would get lost, lose your thread, contradict yourself, and confuse your audience trying to re-phrase ineptly expressed points.” Modern society is built on the written word and we are rapidly losing our ability to parse it.
---
|
---
|
# **5\. Bring on the Dodgers!**
The Phillies are rested and ready to face their frequent postseason foe, the Los Angeles Dodgers. The Fighting Phils took two out of three last time the teams met — in Los Angeles, no less. Will they repeat that success against Ohtani and company next week? By the time you read this, Game 1 will be in the books, but at least two more will remain. Anthony SanFilippo breaks down the three keys to the NLDS. [Read more about it at On Pattison](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=23658c6faa&e=b7b3eddce2) — a part of the Fideri News Network.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9e76ca0735&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

---

name: John Thune
subject: Democrats shut down the government
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj207nfwtp3qznkuoowo5cg9dmz1fn5smkdr4roh3dpccydxnafktbc33od6vnvzyaq049xxk0goe3wvilz1p&__stmp=t3nthl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nthl&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3dz6nuj5lb4ueiv6ntogwpgnzbuhxb5zl8j6otsjzflqtwerbo8t0fxm90iss503ks4wqb1oarlmf1v2fj2idbla1s9oedlvyofkiw5sicene56s3gj1yb8of3djbocahtxouosm5g&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nthl&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nthl&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nthl&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nthl&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3dz6nuj5lb4ueiv6ntogwpgnzbuhxb5zl8j6otsjzflqtwerbo8t0fxm90iss503ks4wqb1oarlmf1v2fj2idbla1s9oedlvyofkiw5sicene56s3gj1yb8of3djbocahtxouosm5g&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nthl&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nthl&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: So, it only matters when it happens to Democrats?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
Democrats are screaming at the top of their lungs that free speech is under attack - I can assure you, the only thing under attack is idiocy and hypocrisy | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b2a2afb2f5d94f5dad406db54b719b6a&_e=-Rw8OrQCFfc7999vEE7yphKjLf6fUNAZXRAwtQTgPYX3X7WCYODyOuOElyB3oEVlKF4qVgiv1IH9dVVIr4col5_Zr6LLjw06jKb8bIElwCSKuhR2Ocn2G20EhA0sjn7PaMtdnXU4rREt6up_HZnWnGLmDNHpIT2eZRcN8TDFBK5b9RFdAG-zvBWRzYaZgEfOPpx1soGW87SlufvwSn7zrcXoSOLYMaXaWvqIPd28PKkH93NnNwxZlqNsdP3ugtYsGRtsvHHLUgc6vb3WC3aQem4HSLctlYNTV41ZA-1LObKOgjATmUVrFIceCV3lIPiDH-VpaRcVvY_scegIEyKeWPT7sLc45mWmnGfeJnTNEPWwplMhp5MXdx5rA8v0UTfzvjk8OnYC-3Q2FvKDZ71FkaTt2sL2KPRQFE1dQpEH2zkguf1QnqytaxYFs0x22CyViyn2whfkOQnOoFD0PKWa6qQUvBKY8bzt2a_HS39-h4Y9uXbOoGMdEYYPLPmbvzGSYKny6-G8Y6UDMF24jjEBoywbAMWJAkluzY_aJuVpYeHTdgtdezO08WchdPBAe7w3sssMnrF5vcvkx7FIviof14bQwaOGtK04h-0lJUrYN1PEX4By4bYln1Vy0H34bVrD4Sec1aTvSmTRWCjly7m94h3R0NpidxKj7nXAX9mYVohSmIWh6YttuECet7rNuF_8MV0MmYc2nkNg7nYtotEfLfD_uN10MZiRDAAK-656NZVo7Kngb4KMaOegY_ez-cgsyn-D4rbzb3ht_5_k0XAW9lOGunMc5_C7XKo0cwyz_ECjlm-Fgwirb3U-wwJrOTqM)

---

Fellow Conservative,

Democrats are howling at the top of their lungs that free speech is under attack.

The comparisons to Nazi Germany are back in full force, and the constant chatter about a civil war erupting is the new favorite talking point on the left.

It’s hard to escape the absolute hysteria that has overtaken the media and Americans to the left of center since Jimmy Kimmel’s show was put on indefinite hold last week.

_**But here is what I want to know: where was the outrage when Megyn Kelly was fired by NBC for making what they alleged were politically incorrect comments?**_

_**Where was the outrage when Disney abruptly let go of a prominent cast member in The Mandalorian for expressing views on social media at odds with Disney leadership?**_

_**Where was the hysteria when a lunatic leftist tried to assassinate Justice Kavanaugh?**_

_**Where was the outrage when Twitter BANNED President Trump from using its platform in 2021?**_

_**Where was the outrage when Facebook censored conservative views throughout the 2019-2020 COVID-19 pandemic?**_

It’s sad how quickly the news cycle turned from honoring the life of Charlie Kirk, an American who WANTED public debate and respected his opponents, to defending a washed-up comedian who made his entire show about bashing Donald Trump.

**[I want to know what you think about all of this.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=b2a2afb2f5d94f5dad406db54b719b6a&_e=-Rw8OrQCFfc7999vEE7yphKjLf6fUNAZXRAwtQTgPYX3X7WCYODyOuOElyB3oEVlKF4qVgiv1IH9dVVIr4col5_Zr6LLjw06jKb8bIElwCSKuhR2Ocn2G20EhA0sjn7PaMtdnXU4rREt6up_HZnWnGLmDNHpIT2eZRcN8TDFBK5b9RFdAG-zvBWRzYaZgEfOPpx1soGW87SlufvwSn7zrcXoSOLYMaXaWvqIPd28PKkH93NnNwxZlqNsdP3ugtYsGRtsvHHLUgc6vb3WC3aQem4HSLctlYNTV41ZA-1LObJkvvmuGr2l9uglrzVJD-H6JCCFjmQyON50gE_mvolY7WZNe9HnkcllzdX-tFUJYnDqvIeRL-MbtiQgGOzeVBIWy68LQZCNdqzW3EwLDPavOonZJyawJ_-U_DQiw-KUWq3HkRdMcavZOwn9REE1eWe-gWcAzirXTxf8WvJvwAZe9sswKCRbgp_bBHq7kNLpIDm8R_WCjkTVUSOnN8QK9aGTTPGDsZXStG13h-HGoosVgzIj_XW2LcFV3hnlTjQEaxvy8VSLjlm_5VE3HEicbCMMOaiBc2sf4CNN8xFmXVhFWYjrE4PTOLiZUwPJuN8j44HH1zdS8r5tvK85_AxwfpGtz_eG6BPJHkLSagVfRo_zZQZ7CYdO8fXsYgNGYy9-XEIAIs1P2kVdom1pYKGXHCO5H2bogMNVQdmyd--EGC-A2uC5V2f8pw77qRF4OnvsoGRj59tMMGWnpU2l3e13KvnQ-SIdzVjo1IorasRLRWRFmRng2wk4Pgi_TIdD96ey_zvgmTpyQtMT8_Hxg7DM8wMC)** Can you do me a favor and answer a few questions about what’s transpired over the past several weeks? clean_body: Democrats are screaming at the top of their lungs that free speech is under attack - I can assure you, the only thing under attack is idiocy and hypocrisy | Fellow Conservative, Democrats are howling at the top of their lungs that free speech is under attack. The comparisons to Nazi Germany are back in full force, and the constant chatter about a civil war erupting is the new favorite talking point on the left. It’s hard to escape the absolute hysteria that has overtaken the media and Americans to the left of center since Jimmy Kimmel’s show was put on indefinite hold last week. But here is what I want to know: where was the outrage when Megyn Kelly was fired by NBC for making what they alleged were politically incorrect comments? Where was the outrage when Disney abruptly let go of a prominent cast member in The Mandalorian for expressing views on social media at odds with Disney leadership? Where was the hysteria when a lunatic leftist tried to assassinate Justice Kavanaugh? Where was the outrage when Twitter BANNED President Trump from using its platform in 2021? Where was the outrage when Facebook censored conservative views throughout the 2019-2020 COVID-19 pandemic? It’s sad how quickly the news cycle turned from honoring the life of Charlie Kirk, an American who WANTED public debate and respected his opponents, to defending a washed-up comedian who made his entire show about bashing Donald Trump. Can you do me a favor and answer a few questions about what’s transpired over the past several weeks? I value your opinion. Let's get this done, Adam Schwarze Proud Marine Veteran Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Wesley Bell
subject: A thank you and an update:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
I have two updates, Peter.

First, thanks to your support and belief in this campaign, **we met our ambitious FEC end-of-quarter fundraising goal.** We're showing the strength of a grassroots team that's ready to keep moving St. Louis — _and our country_ — forward.

Right now, the GOP is trying to take us backward. Washington sits in a shutdown, and Americans are paying the price. 37,000 Missouri workers are facing lost pay, families risk losing WIC aid within days, and farmers and travelers could face delays. The longer this shutdown drags on, the harder it will hit Missouri communities.

But instead of working with Democrats to reopen the government, Republicans are pushing misinformation. They're claiming Democrats are asking for the sun and moon. That's flat-out false.

The truth is: Republicans are trying to rip healthcare away from _**15 million**_ hardworking Americans and raise costs for millions more. All Democrats want to do is meet at the table and secure a budget that doesn't leave working people behind.

**Republicans are doing everything they can to try and place the blame on anyone but themselves, even using government websites as platforms to spread their lies.** All this fingerpointing gets nothing done for the American people, and it fuels more partisan games while leaving communities behind.

That's why I'm so grateful to have this team. With you fighting by my side, I'm not backing down. I'll keep fighting for a budget that protects working families and puts people over politics.

From the bottom of my heart: _Thank you for your support._

— Wesley

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: The state of this race
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sherrill-2025.jXoHhP&refcode=em251005-1-b&t=1&akid=10936%2E3935704%2E7Pkds6)
---
Hi team, it’s Mikie Sherrill — the Democratic nominee for New Jersey’s governor race.
With just less than a month to go until Election Day, I asked my friends at GIFFORDS to send you an update about where our campaign stands heading into the final weeks of this race. This email is long, but I hope you’ll read all of it.
[**And if you’re already ready to power my campaign to victory, I’d really appreciate it if you split a donation before midnight >>**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sherrill-2025.jXoHhP&refcode=em251005-1-b&t=2&akid=10936%2E3935704%2E7Pkds6)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly between GIFFORDS and Mikie Sherrill:_
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sherrill-2025.jXoHhP&refcode=em251005-1-b&t=3&akid=10936%2E3935704%2E7Pkds6)**
**The Polls Are Tied** Anyone who believes this race is anything but a toss-up needs to wake up. A new major poll was just released showing me deadlocked with my opponent, and with New Jersey becoming more competitive every year, this race is going to be close. **But 11% of voters are still undecided, and I’m making it my personal mission to reach every single one of them before Election Day.**
**Ballots Are Already Out** As of last week, the first votes have been cast in our race for governor. Last governor's election, 22% of voters sent in their ballots by mail — and if those numbers stay the same, that means that a decisive margin of voters are going to be making their final decision in this race _before Election Day._ **That’s why I’m going to spend these last weeks trying to reach as many voters as I can, and share with them my vision for our state.**
**The Stakes Couldn’t Be Higher** There is so much on the line for the Garden State in this election — lowering the cost of living, improving education for our children, fixing our public transportation, keeping our communities safe from gun violence and more. But the way I look at it, we aren’t just deciding New Jersey’s future this November. This is our chance to show the **entire nation** that the people reject the Trump administration’s incompetence and authoritarianism. They’re shown time and time again that they’ll do anything to stop me — _and that’s why meeting our fundraising goals is so important._
[**Team, I’m relying on the strength of our grassroots team to help us meet our fundraising goal and win this toss-up race. Can I count on you to split a donation between my team and GIFFORDS before midnight?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sherrill-2025.jXoHhP&refcode=em251005-1-b&t=4&akid=10936%2E3935704%2E7Pkds6)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly between GIFFORDS and Mikie Sherrill:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-sherrill-2025.fVd5De&amount=3&refcode=em251005-1-b&t=23&akid=10936%2E3935704%2E7Pkds6)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-sherrill-2025.kI0fLn&refcode=em251005-1-b&t=24&akid=10936%2E3935704%2E7Pkds6)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-sherrill-2025.NZG9hd&refcode=em251005-1-b&t=25&akid=10936%2E3935704%2E7Pkds6)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-sherrill-2025.pygYcW&refcode=em251005-1-b&t=26&akid=10936%2E3935704%2E7Pkds6)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-sherrill-2025.oqLACv&refcode=em251005-1-b&t=27&akid=10936%2E3935704%2E7Pkds6)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-sherrill-2025.fVd5De&refcode=em251005-1-b&t=28&akid=10936%2E3935704%2E7Pkds6)**

****
Thank you. Let’s get to work.
— Mikie Sherrill

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: My decision:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
As you know by now, Donald Trump ordered the governor of Texas, Greg Abbott, and the Republican majority in the State House to literally find him five more Republican seats.

**Let me lay this out, clear as day:**
We are getting outspent, there are polls showing us under 50%, and as you read this Election Day is less than one month away and people are already voting.
This is going to be an expensive homestretch, because nothing less than Democrats getting a fair chance to take back the House is at stake.
If you are outraged at Donald Trump's efforts to rig the next election -- and you are ready to fight -- [**please make a $3 contribution to help me pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em251005&refcode2=2640_4767699_OnA16O&akid=2640%2E4767699%2EOnA16O)**
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em251005&refcode2=2640_4767699_OnA16O&akid=2640%2E4767699%2EOnA16O)
Otherwise, let me remind you of how we got here -- and why this moment is so urgent.
The truth is, I wasn't sure whether or not we'd get to this moment. Even when talk started about Trump calling Greg Abbott for the five seats he said he was entitled to.
But as time went on, and I heard the calls for Democrats to "Do Something!" I agreed. No more holding hands. No more talk. It was time for action. Concrete action.
So we made the decision to move forward.
And folks, we simply have to be successful. We have no choice. It is the only chance to counteract even part of what Republicans are doing to redraw maps. We'll be talking about nothing less than guaranteed total Republican control.
The pundits said we'd never get to this point. Then many said we'd lose if we tried. But we are building the strongest grassroots campaign Democrats are waging anywhere.
And if we're in this together, we're going to win. But I can't do it alone. So I am asking.
[**Please make a contribution to help me pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California. Give $3 or any amount that works for you today. clean_body: As you know by now, Donald Trump ordered the governor of Texas, Greg Abbott, and the Republican majority in the State House to literally find him five more Republican seats. Let me lay this out, clear as day: We are getting outspent, there are polls showing us under 50%, and as you read this Election Day is less than one month away and people are already voting. This is going to be an expensive homestretch, because nothing less than Democrats getting a fair chance to take back the House is at stake. If you are outraged at Donald Trump's efforts to rig the next election -- and you are ready to fight -- Otherwise, let me remind you of how we got here -- and why this moment is so urgent. The truth is, I wasn't sure whether or not we'd get to this moment. Even when talk started about Trump calling Greg Abbott for the five seats he said he was entitled to. But as time went on, and I heard the calls for Democrats to "Do Something!" I agreed. No more holding hands. No more talk. It was time for action. Concrete action. So we made the decision to move forward. And folks, we simply have to be successful. We have no choice. It is the only chance to counteract even part of what Republicans are doing to redraw maps. We'll be talking about nothing less than guaranteed total Republican control. The pundits said we'd never get to this point. Then many said we'd lose if we tried. But we are building the strongest grassroots campaign Democrats are waging anywhere. And if we're in this together, we're going to win. But I can't do it alone. So I am asking. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | | | ** Thank you for being part of this team. Gavin Newsom

### Nathaniel Rios is building a family business, dressing DC's MAGA crowd in bold, quality and affordable suiting...
| | [Matthew Miller](https://substack.com/@mattmiller737)

| Oct 5

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/80aa75c8-6ac9-4534-a505-546b972e4f87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVjYXBpdGFsaXN0bWFnLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.G9HXuaS56hx42FS10VhNnmdmkWY0MR1HIgiS7VaE9q0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=175201570)
### A Man with a Clear Mission
Nathaniel Rios never intended to be the go-to tailor for the MAGA movement in Washington D.C.
The 47-year-old Pentecostal pastor from Mississippi was introduced to tailoring 15 years ago when he needed extra income to support his family after starting a church. What began as a sales job at Jos. A. Bank has evolved into **[the Blue Thread Project,](https://substack.com/redirect/46970b06-daab-4e74-bca5-49927fc75a46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Washington's go-to custom suiting for the new Republican establishment.
"We wanted to create a $10,000 experience at a Jos. A Bank price point," Rios explained.
Operating out of a beautiful Capitol Hill row house, Rios and his sons have carved out a unique niche serving lawmakers, White House aides, and Trump administration staff, with other locations in Palm Beach, FL and Oxford, MS.
He is known for modern, slimmer cuts, favored by his younger clientele, and his bold custom suit linings featuring political and historical imagery like President Trump holding up his fist defiantly after being shot in Butler PA, Trump's now-famous mugshot, and even George Washington crossing the Delaware River.
Rios says custom suiting is an opportunity to tell a personal story, and it's important to him that he can continue to provide a bespoke experience at a reasonable cost amid tariffs affecting his supply chain.
## Watch my conversation with Nathaniel Rios about building the bedrock of his suiting empire:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2ccacfd2-ace2-4156-bfee-d8d621779045?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### God and Family at the Core
God and family are at the center of Rios' ethos as an entrepreneur. Blue Thread is truly a family business, as several members of the family serve in crucial roles, including his sons, to whom he wants to impart the values of hard work, grit and perseverance.
"I don't want to do business with anyone else," Rios says. "They always say 'family businesses don't work,' and its only true because people don't understand how to create that space,..."
When asked about how he handles hardship and challenges in his business, Rios says he immediately turns to God and credits his strong faith for reassurance in his ability to succeed and overcome.
"And I think of my family. I've got to fight for my family and I'm going to do whatever I can to make sure we can get better," he said. "We just gotta keep doing this, keep trying to do our best to be the best that we can in this space."
### The Future and Plans to Scale
Rios says he is looking to scale his business by opening other locations around the country and hiring more staff to meet the already impressive demand for his product. He mentioned looking to the Chic-fil-A model as a possible option for growth while maintaining premium quality.
"By the end of this year we will have everything we need in place to start putting 21 places across the country that will be strategic," he explained.
* * *
# [More than a Suit - Book a fitting](https://substack.com/redirect/533f7023-fd8b-4bf9-a1d4-bc520cf16234?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/533f7023-fd8b-4bf9-a1d4-bc520cf16234?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Book a fitting](https://substack.com/redirect/533f7023-fd8b-4bf9-a1d4-bc520cf16234?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
### The Dream Client
Before wrapping up our interview, I had to ask Rios who his dream tailoring client would be if he could choose anyone to make a custom suit for.
"I think the one person that I would love to do is Donald Trump," Rios said with a big smile. "First of all, he is very particular about his suits. I have been studying his suits, how he wears them,... I think he's such an incredible human being."
Rios theorized that Trump strategically wears certain color ties to project an intended image as well as the shades of blue he chooses for his suits.
"You'll see how he wears his blues, if he is wearing a lighter blue he is usually traveling,... every move is calculated."
### Final Thoughts
The most valuable piece I took from our conversation was the reassurance that no matter how hard or dark the situation feels as an entrepreneur trying to build a business, or in any given life situation, there are guiding lights, like faith and family that can give you the strength to keep moving forward.
This is clearly evident in Rios' journey to build the Blue Thread Project into what it is today.
He encourages young entrepreneurs to take risk and to commit to building something greater than oneself, in spite of the inevitable struggles that come with it. That advice, if heard and adhered to, will keep the gears of America turning long into the future.

| Peter,
Trump cracking down on free speech and targeting Democrats for arrest and persecution. ICE kidnapping our neighbors off the streets without due process. The military deployed on the streets of Los Angeles, Memphis, Washington DC, and Portland.
Our democracy is dying. And in exactly one month, Trump could deal the killing blow.
The November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election is life or death for democracy. If Trump topples the 3 Democrats on the court, he will have control of the body overseeing elections in the most important swing state in the upcoming '26 and '28 elections. Allowing him to outlaw mail-in ballots, prevent Democrat ballots from being counted, or even ban Democrats from being on ballots altogether.
This would all but secure a third term for Trump and MAGA control of the White House for at least another decade.

And in exactly one month, Trump could deal the killing blow in this obscure PA election. | | | | | == | Peter, Trump cracking down on free speech and targeting Democrats for arrest and persecution. ICE kidnapping our neighbors off the streets without due process. The military deployed on the streets of Los Angeles, Memphis, Washington DC, and Portland. Our democracy is dying. And in exactly one month, Trump could deal the killing blow. The November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election is life or death for democracy. If Trump topples the 3 Democrats on the court, he will have control of the body overseeing elections in the most important swing state in the upcoming '26 and '28 elections. Allowing him to outlaw mail-in ballots, prevent Democrat ballots from being counted, or even ban Democrats from being on ballots altogether. This would all but secure a third term for Trump and MAGA control of the White House for at least another decade. | == | | | | Trump and his fascist collaborators are hoping their coup unfolds in the dark, but Defend Our Courts is shining light on this plot. We are working tirelessly to save Democracy. Having raised nearly 2 million dollars in grassroots donations from Democrats all across the country, we are one of, if not, the largest Democratic organizations involved in this race. name: Rep. Ilhan Omar
subject: ICE is out of control and should be abolished
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1869%2E791427%2Ejf29uk)
Friend — Almost every day we see a new viral video of ICE agents hurting people, threatening people, and terrorizing entire communities.
Just this week we saw a video of an ICE agent throwing a distraught mother to the ground in an NYC courthouse. A journalist was slammed to the ground by an ICE agent and taken to the hospital in that same courthouse later in the week.
There was another video where an ICE agent in Maryland drops his gun during a violent arrest in the middle of a busy intersection, then picks up the gun and points it directly at bystanders who are watching from the sidelines.
On Thursday we learned that an entire team of ICE agents swarmed a Chicago apartment building with vans and helicopters and arrested every family who lived there until they proved their citizenship.
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4626?t=2&akid=1869%2E791427%2Ejf29uk)
**ICE is out of control and should be abolished.**
Donald Trump has turned immigration enforcement into the kind of secret police we see in other far-right authoritarian societies. The Republican party’s constant dehumanizing rhetoric — along with the MAGA Supreme Court’s ruling which legalized racial profiling — has opened the floodgates of hatred and allowed for the violence we are seeing in our cities today.
And it should not be lost on us that as the Trump administration uses this shutdown as an excuse to fire federal workers en masse and defund critical federal programs, ICE is completely untouched by any budget cuts. Your health care, on the other hand, is on the chopping block.
That’s because mass deportation is this administration’s number one priority, and they don’t care how many people get hurt, terrorized, or even killed in the process. They don’t care about civil rights, civil liberties, or the very idea of freedom from tyranny.
**ICE is out of control and should be abolished.**
America has been a country of immigrants for hundreds of years, even before its founding. I’m one of them. ICE was created in 2003, just two decades ago. It’s abundantly clear that we can have a smart, humane, and organized immigration system without a group of violent thugs behind it.
**[If you agree, please consider chipping into my campaign today to help reelect one of the few members of Congress who understands the need to reimagine our immigration system and do away with ICE. I am not afraid to face down the far-right and their authoritarian agenda, but I need a grassroots team to have my back for the tough fights ahead.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct25.q9Ch2B&refcode=em251005-1-180&t=3&akid=1869%2E791427%2Ejf29uk)

And it should not be lost on us that as the Trump administration uses this shutdown as an excuse to fire federal workers en masse and defund critical federal programs, ICE is completely untouched by any budget cuts. Your health care, on the other hand, is on the chopping block. That’s because mass deportation is this administration’s number one priority, and they don’t care how many people get hurt, terrorized, or even killed in the process. They don’t care about civil rights, civil liberties, or the very idea of freedom from tyranny. ICE is out of control and should be abolished. America has been a country of immigrants for hundreds of years, even before its founding. I’m one of them. ICE was created in 2003, just two decades ago. It’s abundantly clear that we can have a smart, humane, and organized immigration system without a group of violent thugs behind it. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | In solidarity, Ilhan Omar PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

name: No Kings via Our Revolution
subject: Show Trump we are united
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1012&refcode=email-20251005_v&akid=9458%2E5885482%2EYJeXqs ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Every day, Donald Trump takes yet another step towards unchecked
authoritarianism.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31295?source=email-20251005&t=1062&akid=9458%2E5885482%2EYJeXqs ]Headline: Trump is steadily pushing the Republic toward the edge of
oblivion

He’s declared war on the “enemy within”, directing military leaders to use
OUR cities as “training grounds.” He’s cracked down on our freedom of
speech by seizing control of the mainstream media to turn it into his own
propaganda machine. He’s signing memos authorizing the FBI to come after
his political opponents – including us.

The list goes on. And on. And on.

At moments like this, it’s easy to feel completely overwhelmed – and even
scared. But that’s part of Trump’s plan. Which is why on October 18, we’re
taking to the streets – for the loudest and biggest No Kings Day YET – to
reject Trump’s attacks on our freedoms and show him that there are
MILLIONS of us, united in our opposition to his authoritarianism and his
hate.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1058&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251005nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9458%2E5885482%2EYJeXqs ]Our team is working around the clock to organize dozens of actions and
turn out the largest crowds EVER across the country. But we can’t do it
without grassroots support from people like you. Will you chip in now to
help us reach every city and bring in thousands more voices to stand up to
Trump during this pivotal moment?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20251005nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9458%2E5885482%2EYJeXqs ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1044&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20251005nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9458%2E5885482%2EYJeXqs ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20251005nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9458%2E5885482%2EYJeXqs ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20251005nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9458%2E5885482%2EYJeXqs ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1048&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20251005nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9458%2E5885482%2EYJeXqs ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1049&amount=9&refcode=email-20251005nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9458%2E5885482%2EYJeXqs ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

What Trump is doing is clear: he’s trying to overwhelm and distract us –
then scare us into silence.

Last week, he quietly signed a memo giving himself a sweeping new mandate
to crack down on the very people who’ve been organizing, resisting, and
exposing the corruption of his regime. Then, he froze $26 BILLION in funds
that were slated for Blue states.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31295?source=email-20251005&t=1061&akid=9458%2E5885482%2EYJeXqs ]Headline: National security directive declares war on those who don't
support Trump agenda

The goal is clear: punish the opposition so NO ONE dares to stand up to
his authoritarianism.

It isn’t going to work.

Instead, our movement is coming together on October 18 with a massive,
unified response. But to pull it off we need field organizers to get
first-time protestors out into the streets. We need digital ads and texts
to reach new activists. We need video work to broadcast it everywhere. And
we need legal support for frontline activists to make sure everyone stays
safe.

Together let’s respond to Trump’s threats by putting MILLIONS of people on
the streets. Let’s make it impossible to ignore the resistance. Let’s show
the country – and the world – that we WILL NOT live under a king.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1055&amount=22&refcode=email-20251005nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9458%2E5885482%2EYJeXqs ]This is our moment to draw a line in the sand and show Trump that the
opposition is united against his authoritarianism. Can you chip in to help
fuel a record-breaking No Kings Day protest with a grassroots donation
right now?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

P.S. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34243?t=1011&akid=9458%2E5885482%2EYJeXqs ]RSVP here to join a No Kings Day protest on October 18

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23464%2E4449941%2EORrnHN) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23464%2E4449941%2EORrnHN) **THIS JUST IN:** [**The Trump Administration Ordered the National Park Service To Take Down Some Materials on Slavery and Native American History**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69340?t=3&akid=23464%2E4449941%2EORrnHN) **10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED FROM YOUR AREA:**
[ **Stop Trump from erasing American history and dismantling our federal institutions → ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69340?t=4&akid=23464%2E4449941%2EORrnHN) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69340?t=5&akid=23464%2E4449941%2EORrnHN)
| [ADD MY SIGNATURE >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69340?t=6&akid=23464%2E4449941%2EORrnHN)
---

This is **TERRIFYING,** team...

The Trump administration is FORCING National Park Service sites to remove materials related to slavery and Native American history, including an 1863 photograph of a formerly enslaved man that became one of the _most compelling images of the Civil War era._[ **ALL BECAUSE THEY DON'T LIKE THE HISTORY.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69340?t=7&akid=23464%2E4449941%2EORrnHN)
[ **In other words, team, Trump wants to white-wash and gloss over incredibly important parts of American history. ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69340?t=8&akid=23464%2E4449941%2EORrnHN)
We refuse to let Donald Trump take over our institutions and erase history, team, but we can’t do it alone.

[ **We need to prove that Americans NATIONWIDE want to see Trump’s racist fever dream brought to an end! ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69340?t=9&akid=23464%2E4449941%2EORrnHN)
[ **If you’re with us, add your name to our petition ASAP!! **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69340?t=10&akid=23464%2E4449941%2EORrnHN)
[ADD MY SIGNATURE >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69340?t=11&akid=23464%2E4449941%2EORrnHN)

Your signature has never been more important, friend.

Fight For Reform

name: Dirty trick
subject: GOP using vile tactic to dupe pro-women voters in key race
body:
Thousands of Dems are going to inadvertently vote for the Republican cause because of this disinformation.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00141ZkKKRav7DUKHz7lbY-X8kUVGLRcpqVLKHHPq6hzA0C0v-wMNF8o1uKEnqbJGvyOo7sW-mD_3ZC2UfYMJZFa_PxdAY1275MgtvNIhN_iHadH6axBsLOJ3f3pJTEGiPEP45-ffB_YJruQDS-uc5gTKxvCJ3kiG5dlBGXGqHH2GAwkneQkpJPu9Tp4TI9n7-pfD7vQAALaNayo1vUC5gIicL7WcemhDdgObGNQAN4MYEs_2LPoblMIA==&c=UowDYGde8cmwlfsQPuTvJwiAw7mIBzdBx19zXXY-8EJhHWwP1kYwng==&ch=mPsFykLizc1gjxWg7x7s4r8N2TyQsgfFAXxtIob6POWITXchjpOMrg==)
---
| Friend,
The flood gates of dark money spending have opened in the run up to the obscure but massively important November, 2025, Pennsylvania Supreme Court Retention Election.
If Democrats lose this court and Republicans successfully get a majority of Pennsylvanians to vote no on retaining the justices who give the courts its 3 vote democratic majority, here's what's at stake:

* MAGA can rig the 2026 and 2028 elections to ensure Pennsylvania and its 19 electoral college votes go red.
* Trump will push for a redistrict of Pennsylvania's Congressional map erasing blue seats.
* An extreme abortion will be upheld.

Voting yes on retaining the justices ensures the court's Democratic majority guaranteeing fair elections, no gerrymandering, and no extreme abortion ban.
Which is why MAGA is especially depraved for using this vile tactic to dupe pro-women voters:
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00141ZkKKRav7DUKHz7lbY-X8kUVGLRcpqVLKHHPq6hzA0C0v-wMNF8o1uKEnqbJGvyOo7sW-mD_3ZC2UfYMJZFa_PxdAY1275MgtvNIhN_iHadH6axBsLOJ3f3pJTEGiPEP45-ffB_YJruQDS-uc5gTKxvCJ3kiG5dlBGXGqHH2GAwkneQkpJPu9Tp4TI9n7-pfD7vQAALaNayo1vUC5gIicL7WcemhDdgy6wNRqXaSigk47kbKjJw-g==&c=UowDYGde8cmwlfsQPuTvJwiAw7mIBzdBx19zXXY-8EJhHWwP1kYwng==&ch=mPsFykLizc1gjxWg7x7s4r8N2TyQsgfFAXxtIob6POWITXchjpOMrg==)
---
| One of the hundreds of MAGA dark money ads that Pennsylvania social media users are being saturated with on a daily basis.
The above ad is being pushed by the innocuously named, Citizens for Term Limits, an insidious MAGA dark money PAC, which is urging voters to: "term limit the court" a reasonable sounding proposition which will "protect women's rights" and can be accomplished by voting no.
Voting no will not protect women. It will guarantee an abortion ban.
These ads are meant to target Democrats and unless we can counter their propaganda, thousands of Dems are going to inadvertently vote for the Republican cause because of disinformation.
Defend our Courts has a solution:
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00141ZkKKRav7DUKHz7lbY-X8kUVGLRcpqVLKHHPq6hzA0C0v-wMNF8o1uKEnqbJGvyOo7sW-mD_3ZC2UfYMJZFa_PxdAY1275MgtvNIhN_iHadH6axBsLOJ3f3pJTEGiPEP45-ffB_YJruQDS-uc5gTKxvCJ3kiG5dlBGXGqHH2GAwkneQkpJPu9Tp4TI9n7-pfD7vQAALaNayo1vUC5gIicL7WcemhDdg5sz__vnzM0TUM4TWVqeOAg==&c=UowDYGde8cmwlfsQPuTvJwiAw7mIBzdBx19zXXY-8EJhHWwP1kYwng==&ch=mPsFykLizc1gjxWg7x7s4r8N2TyQsgfFAXxtIob6POWITXchjpOMrg==)
---
| The most effective way to counter disinformation is one on one conversations with voters. This past weekend alone the Defend our Courts field team spoke with over 3500+ voters at their doors ensuring that they would vote yes.
It's a start but if we want to counter MAGA's disinfo at a strategic level we need to scale our scrappy team of fifty canvassers into the hundreds--rapidly.
[We have 30 days left until E-day to get the real facts to PA voters before they are drowned out by disinfo. Can we count on you to rush a donation of $55 (the average cost to earn one vote in this race) or whatever you can spare?](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00141ZkKKRav7DUKHz7lbY-X8kUVGLRcpqVLKHHPq6hzA0C0v-wMNF8o1uKEnqbJGvyOo7sW-mD_3ZC2UfYMJZFa_PxdAY1275MgtvNIhN_iHadH6axBsLOJ3f3pJTEGiPEP45-ffB_YJruQDS-uc5gTKxvCJ3kiG5dlBGXGqHH2GAwkneQkpJPu9Tp4TI9n7-pfD7vQAALaNayo1vUC5gIicL7WcemhDdgfQpyx7__00ixbbighLHm8g==&c=UowDYGde8cmwlfsQPuTvJwiAw7mIBzdBx19zXXY-8EJhHWwP1kYwng==&ch=mPsFykLizc1gjxWg7x7s4r8N2TyQsgfFAXxtIob6POWITXchjpOMrg==)

clean_body: Thousands of Dems are going to inadvertently vote for the Republican cause because of this disinformation. | | | | | == | Friend, The flood gates of dark money spending have opened in the run up to the obscure but massively important November, 2025, Pennsylvania Supreme Court Retention Election. If Democrats lose this court and Republicans successfully get a majority of Pennsylvanians to vote no on retaining the justices who give the courts its 3 vote democratic majority, here's what's at stake: MAGA can rig the 2026 and 2028 elections to ensure Pennsylvania and its 19 electoral college votes go red. Trump will push for a redistrict of Pennsylvania's Congressional map erasing blue seats. * An extreme abortion will be upheld. Voting yes on retaining the justices ensures the court's Democratic majority guaranteeing fair elections, no gerrymandering, and no extreme abortion ban. Which is why MAGA is especially depraved for using this vile tactic to dupe pro-women voters: | | == | One of the hundreds of MAGA dark money ads that Pennsylvania social media users are being saturated with on a daily basis. The above ad is being pushed by the innocuously named, Citizens for Term Limits, an insidious MAGA dark money PAC, which is urging voters to: "term limit the court" a reasonable sounding proposition which will "protect women's rights" and can be accomplished by voting no. Voting no will not protect women. It will guarantee an abortion ban. These ads are meant to target Democrats and unless we can counter their propaganda, thousands of Dems are going to inadvertently vote for the Republican cause because of disinformation. Defend our Courts has a solution: | | == | The most effective way to counter disinformation is one on one conversations with voters. This past weekend alone the Defend our Courts field team spoke with over 3500+ voters at their doors ensuring that they would vote yes. It's a start but if we want to counter MAGA's disinfo at a strategic level we need to scale our scrappy team of fifty canvassers into the hundreds--rapidly. == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | Help us ensure that the truth wins out in the life or death battle for this critical court. Friend, We’re in the midst of a fight for the soul of our nation. When Republicans passed their Big Budget Betrayal, they handed trillions of dollars of tax cuts to billionaires and corporations on the backs of everyday people by slashing healthcare, food assistance, and more. When Republicans shut down the government, they further enabled Trump’s dismantling of government agencies, which are meant to serve our communities and keep us safe. When Trump started sending masked ICE agents into our communities, he trampled our due process rights and blatantly violated the 14th Amendment, which ensures our right to equal protection. When Trump sent troops into Chicago, Portland, and Memphis this week, it was with the express intent of silencing dissent, terrorizing our communities, and using our cities as “training grounds” for U.S. troops. **This is just a small piece of how Donald Trump and Republicans are tearing apart our country and our Constitution.** But we are not powerless in the face of this lawless administration. **On Saturday, October 18th, millions of people from across the country will rise up and in one voice to declare: No Kings in America!** [**Click here to find a No Kings rally near you. Friend,
The very foundations of our society are not just being eroded, they’re being torn to shreds.
From Trump’s government shut down, which he is using to further dismantle our government and enact his cruel agenda―to troops in our streets, from Portland to Chicago to Memphis, illegally violating the _Posse Comitatus Act_ ―to ICE’s racial profiling, which is a violation our 14th Amendment right to equal protection―to dark site detention camps where our right to due process is being ignored, we cannot stay silent.
**This week, Trump even told an auditorium full of military brass that he and Defense Secretary Hegseth plan to use our cities as “training grounds” for the U.S. military.**
We cannot remain on the sidelines.
[**That’s why, the next round of No Kings rallies on Saturday, October 18th are so critical to defending our democracy. Click here to find one near you.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbIwXrUx9efdTq_vbf4FLD36_-vdRJmYfwIvLLYmVGMq4uz0l9eW17xRUlmqyGXPnBmnz2pUDl1dtbRPdsc-hT86YY2Wb4CxeRiIy0cyUOXpAdU89ngQEc_U6xyneymahOIteUTzb6Pj5yxXOYiwddwjWhDyIVYOvhDKVaL77yfFYfN6e_gzaCF8EfvuuOTAQPjLFNWpS47vbNEGk74e3mn8DejGPuYbP-jQlubypo71AfkyzjRj-ZyhG5TCnZQ6GQ/4kh/F-lUapUgRDS_hRYBQFtKvw/h11/h001.p3ZSdSfaViB5qse_MZrjNBbxvAdeegjrIG3GyLV55aU)

In June, 5 million people across the country stood up and said in one clear voice that in America, there are No Kings. But since then, Trump has continued to shred our Constitution, Republicans have shut down the government at Trump’s urging, and he’s sent troops into even more cities to silence dissent and terrorize our communities.
**I will never stop standing up to billionaire bullies and speaking truth to power. I’ll continue speaking out for our rights and our humanity, even if my voice shakes.**
Please, use the link above to find a No Kings rally near you. There are also additional resources on the website, including a training this coming Monday on protest safety and de-escalation and knowing your rights. clean_body: When Republicans shut down the government, they further enabled Trump’s dismantling of government agencies, which are meant to serve our communities and keep us safe. | | | Friend, We’re in the midst of a fight for the soul of our nation. When Republicans passed their Big Budget Betrayal, they handed trillions of dollars of tax cuts to billionaires and corporations on the backs of everyday people by slashing healthcare, food assistance, and more. When Republicans shut down the government, they further enabled Trump’s dismantling of government agencies, which are meant to serve our communities and keep us safe. When Trump started sending masked ICE agents into our communities, he trampled our due process rights and blatantly violated the 14th Amendment, which ensures our right to equal protection. When Trump sent troops into Chicago, Portland, and Memphis this week, it was with the express intent of silencing dissent, terrorizing our communities, and using our cities as “training grounds” for U.S. troops. This is just a small piece of how Donald Trump and Republicans are tearing apart our country and our Constitution. But we are not powerless in the face of this lawless administration. On Saturday, October 18th, millions of people from across the country will rise up and in one voice to declare: No Kings in America! | During Trump’s first term in office, I proudly led the fight to impeach the fascist-in-chief―twice. While congressional Republicans will continue to allow this administration to break the law with impunity, we must not stay on the sidelines. We cannot allow Trump to normalize his fascist takeover of our government and our cities. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | With every executive action, Trump’s cruelty is on full display. We will not stay silent. We will hold the billionaire bullies to account. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Oct 4, 2025 Subject: RSVP: No Kings, Oct. 18th To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, The very foundations of our society are not just being eroded, they’re being torn to shreds. From Trump’s government shut down, which he is using to further dismantle our government and enact his cruel agenda―to troops in our streets, from Portland to Chicago to Memphis, illegally violating the Posse Comitatus Act ―to ICE’s racial profiling, which is a violation our 14th Amendment right to equal protection―to dark site detention camps where our right to due process is being ignored, we cannot stay silent. This week, Trump even told an auditorium full of military brass that he and Defense Secretary Hegseth plan to use our cities as “training grounds” for the U.S. military. We cannot remain on the sidelines. In June, 5 million people across the country stood up and said in one clear voice that in America, there are No Kings. But since then, Trump has continued to shred our Constitution, Republicans have shut down the government at Trump’s urging, and he’s sent troops into even more cities to silence dissent and terrorize our communities. I will never stop standing up to billionaire bullies and speaking truth to power. I’ll continue speaking out for our rights and our humanity, even if my voice shakes. Please, use the link above to find a No Kings rally near you. There are also additional resources on the website, including a training this coming Monday on protest safety and de-escalation and knowing your rights. And, if there isn’t yet a No Kings event in your community, you can also use the link above to register your own No Kings event.
