subject: Republicans couldn’t beat me at the ballot box. So now they’re trying to change the rules.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I need you to read this, Peter.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96309?refcode=em20251005-9523&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9523%2E614464%2EWeko-z)
**[Peter, this is Sharice Davids, Democrat from Kansas’ 3rd Congressional district. Extreme Republicans in the state legislature are traveling to Washington this month to speak directly with Donald Trump. His orders? Gerrymandering me out of office. Please, can you chip in a split donation between Heartland Patriots and my campaign to make sure Trump doesn’t turn Kansas into a one-party state?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96309?refcode=em20251005-9523&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9523%2E614464%2EWeko-z)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96309?refcode=em20251005-9523&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9523%2E614464%2EWeko-z)**
There are two very different kinds of politicians in our government right now: The ones who treat elected office like a job — and the ones who treat it like an audition.
I’m proud to be part of the first category, Peter. For years, I’ve worked hard in Congress to ignore all the DC distractions and make progress on the issues that matter most.
But today, far too many politicians belong to the _other_ category. Instead of placing their constituents’ needs first, they’re more interested in proving their loyalty to Donald Trump.
And that’s exactly what’s happening right now in the Kansas legislature. Instead of lowering costs and helping families pay their bills, Republican politicians in Topeka are focused on one thing, and one thing only: Kicking me out of office — all because Donald Trump told them to.
**But Peter, I’m not going down without a fight.**
**[I don’t care how many Republican politicians stand in my way. Whether it’s dozens of Republican politicians or the President himself, I won’t stop working to make sure Kansans’ voices are heard — but I need you by my side. Please, can you chip in a split donation before midnight to help me keep fighting back against Trump’s gerrymander?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96309?refcode=em20251005-9523&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9523%2E614464%2EWeko-z)**

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Shutdown Update →
body:
Republicans own this shutdown
---
Derek, **FIRST:** Trump and his allies put forward a government funding bill that failed to protect millions of Americans from the health care cuts in Trump's budget bill. **THEN:** Democrats refused to vote for it — standing together to try to reverse the cuts, lower costs, and save health care for their constituents. **NOW:** The government has officially shut down, and Trump is threatening to **permanently lay off more federal workers** — putting thousands of hardworking people out of work instead of sitting down with Democrats to address our country’s health care crisis. Republicans control the White House. They control the House and Senate. **_They own this shutdown._** But we still have a say in this, Derek. You can make a difference — whether you’re organizing in your community, contacting your representatives, or using the power of your wallet, your voice matters. And that’s exactly why we’re asking you to consider making a $7 donation to the DNC today. [**Your donation will help us invest in more state and local parties that will elect Democrats who will advocate on behalf of ALL Americans and who will use their power to protect necessities like health care. name: are you ignoring our petition? (Fight for Reform)
subject: Electoral College (we've extended our petition)
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23471%2E4449941%2EUd0hS2) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23471%2E4449941%2EUd0hS2) Team, we just checked our records and we’re [**STILL MISSING your signature on our critical Electoral College petition...**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69358?t=3&akid=23471%2E4449941%2EUd0hS2)

Elizabeth Warren is calling for an END to the [**unfair and undemocratic**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69358?t=4&akid=23471%2E4449941%2EUd0hS2) Electoral College and we need to show Congress that Democrats across the country agree →→→

[**We’ve extended our petition for another 10 hours just for you, team. **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69358?t=5&akid=23471%2E4449941%2EUd0hS2)

[ **Please, sign our petition before 11:59PM TONIGHT or we’ll have to move on to a less informed Democrat in your area >> **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69358?t=6&akid=23471%2E4449941%2EUd0hS2) | [SIGN NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69358?t=7&akid=23471%2E4449941%2EUd0hS2)
---
Counting on your response,

Fight for Reform

[ **\------ FORWARDED MESSAGE ------
From: Trump TAKEOVER! via Fight for Reform
Subject: (re: Electoral College) your signature is needed...
To: YOU ** ]()

**BREAKING via _NBC_ :** "Trump just realigned the entire political map. Democrats have 'no easy path' to fix it."
[**Elizabeth Warren is calling for an END to the Electoral College now. Without 125,OOO signatures, ****we won 't be able to show Democrats in Congress there's a critical mass. Please sign the petition now:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69358?t=8&akid=23471%2E4449941%2EUd0hS2)
[SIGN NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69358?t=9&akid=23471%2E4449941%2EUd0hS2)
---
This petition is registered to you only.

Donald Trump only became President in 2016 because of the outdated Electoral College.

_Hillary Clinton won the popular vote by nearly 2.9 million. But the Electoral College overruled her popular vote victory._

**Now, Sen. Elizabeth Warren is urgently pleading with Democrats:**
We couldn't agree more. But now that Trump is in office, he and his Republican cronies will do everything in their power to uphold the Electoral College.

**So we need to act now -- because we must prevent unpopular, unqualified candidates from EVER becoming President again.**

[**_If every Democrat reading this signs our petition, we will reach our 125,OOO signature goal within minutes and gain traction for this urgent legislation in Congress. Please add your name immediately:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69358?t=10&akid=23471%2E4449941%2EUd0hS2)
[SIGN NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69358?t=11&akid=23471%2E4449941%2EUd0hS2)
---
Thank you,

_Fight for Reform_

clean_body: Trump could throw his billion-dollar war chest behind Winsome Earle-Sears at any moment. = Peter, will you help us respond to some breaking news? Donald Trump is coming to Virginia today. First, he took to the Oval Office to hammer Abigail Spanberger live on TV. Now, he's traveling in with less than one month until our election. It's clear he's terrified by what our victory would reveal — that most Americans are sick and tired of the chaos. But we're in uncharted territory here. Trump could throw his billion-dollar war chest behind Winsome Earle-Sears at any moment, and we're asking top supporters to have Abigail's back right away. = = = = = = = Thanks so much, Spanberger for Governor HQ By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Dear Peter,
Trump mega-donor Michael Minogue just launched his campaign for governor of Massachusetts.
And today, we’re launching our response — an ad that exposes him for exactly who he is: a MAGA Republican who’s spent years bankrolling Donald Trump and pushing his extremist agenda to take away health care, ban abortion, and slash lifesaving medical research.
Watch and Share [https://www.facebook.com/reel/1638381600455137/]
Minogue used his fortune to help Trump and J.D. Vance implement policies that raised costs, gutted health care, and empowered extremists like RFK Jr. to spread dangerous lies about vaccines.
Now, he’s trying to buy his way into the governor’s office, s tarting with a six-figure ad buy , hoping Massachusetts voters forget his record.
But here’s the truth: Michael Minogue is responsible for the damage Donald Trump’s agenda has done — taking health care from Massachusetts families, halting research into cures for cancer and Alzheimer’s, banning abortion access, and driving up costs for everyone.
We can’t let him buy this race.
So I’m asking you, NAME: will you help us make sure Massachusetts voters know exactly who he is?
Watch and Share [https://www.facebook.com/reel/1638381600455137/]

name: Peter Ohtaki
subject: Final day to sign Save Downtown Menlo petition!
body:
Final day to sign Save Downtown Menlo petition! Peter Ohtaki — October 5, 2025 Menlo Park’s City Council is pushing affordable housing developers to build 6+ story high-density apartments on three hea | | | [](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68e28812e721581d98a310a3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mainstreamrevolution.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D68e20629e086ac58f2ff7e4b%26ss_email_id%3D68e28812e721581d98a310a3%26ss_campaign_name%3DFinal%2Bday%2Bto%2Bsign%2BSave%2BDowntown%2BMenlo%2Bpetition%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-10-05T15%253A01%253A22Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68e20629e086ac58f2ff7e4b&l=en-US&s=ryQZvn1iTBWo9P5qpyuqz0yENSg%3D)
---
|
## Final day to sign Save Downtown Menlo petition!
---
Peter Ohtaki — October 5, 2025
---
Menlo Park’s City Council is pushing affordable housing developers to build **6+ story high-density apartments on three heavily-used, downtown parking lots** **despite** **widespread opposition** from residents and businesses._[**Save Downtown Menlo**](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68e28812e721581d98a310a3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.savedowntownmenlo.org%2F&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68e20629e086ac58f2ff7e4b&l=en-US&s=XCioSJN4_hhZQn2P_0026ibSaPA%3D)_ , a grassroots coalition of residents and business owners, is fighting back with a **ballot measure** that would require **voter approval** before any downtown parking lots can be repurposed.**If you’re a Menlo Park voter** and haven’t signed the petition already**, please sign today at these locations:**
Sunday, Oct. 5, **11am-1pm** \- _**Cafe Zoe**_
Sunday, Oct 5, **3pm-5pm** \- _**Sharon Heights Safeway**_**Several large**[**Alternative Sites**](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68e28812e721581d98a310a3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.savedowntownmenlo.org%2Falternativesites&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68e20629e086ac58f2ff7e4b&l=en-US&s=I7xKAAcobPyRB0x8oQK5CKdp2J4%3D)**for housing don’t sacrifice our downtown.** Let’s build on the [Alternate Sites](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68e28812e721581d98a310a3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.savedowntownmenlo.org%2Falternativesites&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68e20629e086ac58f2ff7e4b&l=en-US&s=I7xKAAcobPyRB0x8oQK5CKdp2J4%3D) BEFORE irrevocably changing our charming Menlo Park downtown.
---
| [](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68e28812e721581d98a310a3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.savedowntownmenlo.org&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68e20629e086ac58f2ff7e4b&l=en-US&s=VAGEkqBWLRqJKHawaFjXmPK0ypU%3D)
---
| Once the parking lots are gone, our welcoming downtown character will be GONE.
---
**Stand up for local control and common sense** If we lose Downtown Menlo Park, what comes next? _**Your Peninsula city may be next for your downtown parking lots!**_ ✅ [**Donate here**](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68e28812e721581d98a310a3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.efundraisingconnections.com%2Fc%2FSAVEDOWNTOWNMENLO&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68e20629e086ac58f2ff7e4b&l=en-US&s=rnkxBO9dPMYjco4nxWpYGTBkB8s%3D) to support the campaign
✅ **Volunteer** to help spread the word by emailing [savedowntownmenlo@gmail.com](mailto:savedowntownmenlo@gmail.com)
---
[View original post](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68e28812e721581d98a310a3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mainstreamrevolution.com%2Fblog%2Flast-day-to-sign-save-downtown-menlo-petition%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D68e20629e086ac58f2ff7e4b%26ss_email_id%3D68e28812e721581d98a310a3%26ss_campaign_name%3DFinal%2Bday%2Bto%2Bsign%2BSave%2BDowntown%2BMenlo%2Bpetition%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-10-05T15%253A01%253A22Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68e20629e086ac58f2ff7e4b&l=en-US&s=YY0IobSz7z8nRDaSsCKWxhcSyqY%3D)
---
| [](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68e28812e721581d98a310a3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mainstreamrevolution.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D68e20629e086ac58f2ff7e4b%26ss_email_id%3D68e28812e721581d98a310a3%26ss_campaign_name%3DFinal%2Bday%2Bto%2Bsign%2BSave%2BDowntown%2BMenlo%2Bpetition%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-10-05T15%253A01%253A22Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68e20629e086ac58f2ff7e4b&l=en-US&s=ryQZvn1iTBWo9P5qpyuqz0yENSg%3D) 8 Politzer Drive, Menlo Park, CA 94025, USA Powered by [Squarespace](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68e28812e721581d98a310a3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.squarespace.com%3Fchannel%3Dproduct_refer%26subchannel%3Dcustomer%26source%3Demail_campaigns_button%26campaign%3D6619ff0a31aa07375378c596%26utm_medium%3Dproduct_refer%26utm_source%3Demail_campaigns_button%26ss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D68e20629e086ac58f2ff7e4b%26ss_email_id%3D68e28812e721581d98a310a3%26ss_campaign_name%3DFinal%2Bday%2Bto%2Bsign%2BSave%2BDowntown%2BMenlo%2Bpetition%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-10-05T15%253A01%253A22Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68e20629e086ac58f2ff7e4b&l=en-US&s=o0XrGBradvwpS8Q7d88-dEB1Vik%3D) [ Unsubscribe ](https://g3j1.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68e28812e721581d98a310a3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fcampaign-preferences.com%2Funsubscribe%2FfPt3UTNlfCosxdv7HCEiy5_ghGCFcbw_7hxBSER4PVak0AsgK7F5mtpUaCkXp7W0bKEl5k6F0pT47TGkxdOLaJmdlb0ggpSByrsKu1R1BCd1fOr3OOPJy5o6SkpG6b7AmczZ6unq_6V_62nb_p1qZimu_vmroIqlde0gqsJzR1jRxtCvPJaSA4tDiXPD5-p0UmxlxnEuOhoqJs9iaVWUV8YpZ9FlRg4khslXbdOsEw5rMBp2K2Nm97gD1UqAftbqV8X-7jzzGRmHHR-Ps2duDUlee7aFEjN8At_wiROmItnvopI8K_dIRmzisxi9qtDHnzgkfZhLSKddKVpiq-7p_kc6qjybtq9Cw1gkvqJXjVcgPRih-QwBe3U%3D&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_68e20629e086ac58f2ff7e4b&l=en-US&s=ttXzu0TWGxdP2uWFb1_bghsugDc%3D)

name: Tim Walz
subject: Celebrating Farm Aid 40
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
I’m keeping up the fight for Minnesota family farms.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116642699/574036995/191659326?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODk3NDlkNC1mY2ExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=esPnHKokBEVEoQc-uhugt0v5qTHWsxbDabM-0IpaS64=)
---
Hi Peter,
In case you missed it, Minneapolis had the honor of hosting Farm Aid 40 last month.

This year, I was honored to introduce the great Willie Nelson four decades after he, Neil Young, and John Mellencamp founded the annual Farm Aid music and food festival to make sure those who feed, fuel, and clothe the world get a fair shake.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116642701/574036996/191659326?refcode=image&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODk3NDlkNC1mY2ExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=esPnHKokBEVEoQc-uhugt0v5qTHWsxbDabM-0IpaS64=)
I saw Willie in Texas for the second-ever Farm Aid during the 1980s farm crisis. He’s always been there to lend a hand to our family farmers, and I was grateful to see how many Minnesotans showed up to this iconic, impactful event.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116642703/574036997/191659326?refcode=image&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODk3NDlkNC1mY2ExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=esPnHKokBEVEoQc-uhugt0v5qTHWsxbDabM-0IpaS64=)
The hard truth is, with Donald Trump and Republicans controlling Congress and the White House,**our farmers are not getting the support they need from Washington right now.**
In Minnesota, we produce more than we use ourselves. We don’t just feed our state or America – _we feed the world_! Our farmers have an incredible soybean harvest this year, but it’s at risk of going to waste if we can’t sell enough of it here and abroad.
So far, Trump has screwed over our soybean farmers with his failing trade war with China, one of our top agricultural buyers. He’s been more worried about bailing out countries like Argentina than making deals to ensure our agricultural products are sold and farmers are taken care of here at home.
Family farms are also in need of more affordable, accessible health care, and greater investment in rural schools and community infrastructure. Thanks to Trump and the GOP’s Big Beautiful Bullsh*t budget bill passed this summer, countless Minnesotans — including farmers and their families — will face drastic cuts to Medicaid, SNAP, and other federal programs in the coming days, adding further financial strain on working people just to pay for tax cuts for the wealthiest few.
**As Governor, I’m committed to doing whatever is in my power to counter these cruel cuts and bad leadership from DC, while keeping family farms alive and well across our state.**
**[If you’re with me, pitch in a buck or two to support our reelection campaign so I can keep up the fight for Minnesota farmers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116642704/574036998/520374287?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODk3NDlkNC1mY2ExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=esPnHKokBEVEoQc-uhugt0v5qTHWsxbDabM-0IpaS64=)**

body:
and that made me a target
I aspired to be a good husband and a good dad — the American Dream.
| | Fellow Patriot,It often comes as a surprise to people I meet on the campaign trail that I didn’t grow up with aspirations of becoming an Ambassador or U.S. Senator growing up.**_I aspired to be a good husband, and a good dad. I aspired to have a happy family life and live the American Dream._** I had a challenging upbringing. My mom was married and divorced 4 times, and my dad was married and divorced 3 times. My dad was not always there to help guide me and all my stepfathers told me that I would never amount to anything.
---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c51456545b59428a8bf85d78a8959511&_e=UL8CssfG07u0OMQVbBCKFFeWw0tsa_LxQXOwM4wFwfOX9lYjnGfZqS5wpjWY8Kxw57ON3eX8-UWieZCd4HyQdgx6Z861IuKlnO6xvUks7hF2AvRreUlYN-t74545ucq-A4UVp_Hp62Dym6Gk1f42-7AfYDyjvuBwoo3TRRzxfl5lB6i-exgMJ-Fh3eN_eOf6Y1aHK43_veHPnElgVKw44PtbL-JBKsF-i-4fHuABTA9ScORK4Jq3imNKvEdfteCiB2DewfhayUZtLNQreiTnmd2lZkmEvAKCe8_P0DAEA5uie1Y1mmsWyoQ7-3KxKuTS33WOOqv7hoGWfTl9YQbC3zvcFFLkKXHu-MvPp3xptGMw6GXKTZb5lSHsIJ_N2yLKy_GwlCxkpvu-9s8sT0RSKaavyaYkkqv7BFcspduSXwZ5RiFEa1sefaNIoqAGysddZoT0H0Qf0Wdi582OQxvsfqP_UCqor04kq4dNjf2qzPom-NxL1RLheDbabsLtBvqwVJFv37ouFWBkzCFiEliSDFSdW9FgX_H609H1NuHwhMM1hOrcHWc1rBp9JafcP6_qv0nRqgi5sNaivsAaiHBwW0k3LS5_AEYWur44FVnxb0Y7y03jhFtoQmNswem7U314-GmVwG3apj82FgwdKp3pyXmVxkQclcesWQxPXDMkQ3myWekJVFkixY8Tu0VVg9oXR2KHoqMVqtwEIN59LMOB6qaWuQ0pu_-zIx0ugcuriDSC1udckYuf6PN8qWdvibpIkunyNZxg9QDu23t48XTy_HWpuLnvK5vxuQaMZ_La-JHFUS9_SecpzXWazGZfGErpjveNHE3KppjBLGKtXfhH4Fecr9bSnF6kpaM1cxHmBCxNZZe8L3w2OPwbOZOXzQS18nwvdUoLxzTozr3kb6vA_goyvfHhSSy_yfAB9gCkgzgFvxvsd1IiTiU1EzzgZ-u4)

It’s fair to say they were not support systems. But I really wouldn't change a thing. Those early struggles taught me grit, resilience, and the value of hard work.**_Nothing was ever handed to me._** I worked my way through college and law school, and at 19 I joined the Army National Guard, where I served proudly for nearly 40 years before retiring as a Colonel.

In 2010, I took a leap of faith and ran for U.S. Senate. With grassroots supporters like you and a lot of miles on my old GMC truck, we shocked the political world with a historic upset. I was the guy that STOPPED the Democrats’ supermajority in the Senate. In Washington, I refused to play insider games—and that made me a target. clean_body: and that made me a target I aspired to be a good husband and a good dad — the American Dream. | | Fellow Patriot,It often comes as a surprise to people I meet on the campaign trail that I didn’t grow up with aspirations of becoming an Ambassador or U.S. Senator growing up.I aspired to be a good husband, and a good dad. I aspired to have a happy family life and live the American Dream. I had a challenging upbringing. My mom was married and divorced 4 times, and my dad was married and divorced 3 times. My dad was not always there to help guide me and all my stepfathers told me that I would never amount to anything. | It’s fair to say they were not support systems. But I really wouldn't change a thing. Those early struggles taught me grit, resilience, and the value of hard work.Nothing was ever handed to me. I worked my way through college and law school, and at 19 I joined the Army National Guard, where I served proudly for nearly 40 years before retiring as a Colonel. In 2010, I took a leap of faith and ran for U.S. Senate. With grassroots supporters like you and a lot of miles on my old GMC truck, we shocked the political world with a historic upset. I was the guy that STOPPED the Democrats’ supermajority in the Senate. In Washington, I refused to play insider games—and that made me a target. Democrats poured millions into defeating me, and eventually, they did. But I never stopped serving. I became a grandfather, poured myself into my New Hampshire community, and later represented America as U.S. Ambassador to New Zealand and Samoa. If we’ve learned anything over the last few years, it’s this: when Democrats are in control, things fall apart FAST.> >Inflation spikes, our borders are left WIDE OPEN to criminals and terrorists, our standing on the world stage weakens, and hardworking families are left behind. >>That’s why I’m stepping back into the fight — because we must keep the Senate in Republican hands, and we must keep electing strong, conservative leaders who will stand up for American values. know the value of a dollar, and how hard you and I have worked every day of our lives to create prosperity for ourselves and our families , so I wouldn’t be asking you today if your URGENT donation did not make a BIG difference in flipping this Senate seat. The New Hampshire Senate race could tip control of the entire U.S. Senate and finally halt the “lawfare” targeting President Trump, his team, and YOUR freedoms. If we win in New Hampshire, we can stop the Left’s agenda in its tracks.If we lose... they’ll have free rein for years to come.Every patriot’s support is critical. If we win, we keep President Trump’s majority. If we lose, the Democrats will seize the Senate and launch a relentless campaign to cripple his presidency – political lawfare, sham investigations, and a total blockade on his policies.We have no time to waste if we’re going to show the Radical Left they don’t stand a CHANCE of flipping the Senate majority. I understand money can be tight these days, Fellow Patriot. That’s why I would not ask if it was not absolutely necessary to raise early funds NOW in order to win this seat. Your support means the world to me, and I’m so grateful. If you’re unable to give at this time, I understand. But if you can spare any amount, now is the time to do so.Thank you for your time, for reading my story, and for joining this fight for the future of America. P. Brown Candidate for U.S. Senate New Hampshire Paid for by Scott Brown for New Hampshire, Inc. Scott Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Army or the Department of Defense. PO Box 606 Rye, NH 03870

body:

**The next big test for our campaign is coming up quickly.**
We hit our last public fundraising deadline of 2025 TOMORROW. As we head into the election year, the media, our opponents, and right-wing super PACs will scrutinize just how much we’ve raised and how many people have pitched into our campaign so far.
**[Will you chip in $5 — or more — before our last 2025 major deadline to help show our strong grassroots momentum? We still need a lot of supporters to chip in within the next 24 hours to show we have what it takes to win.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20251005_1_tomorrow?amount=5&refcode=em20251005-4825&refcode2=4825_400544_QeJ2Gl&akid=4825%2E400544%2EQeJ2Gl)**

**It’s no secret that Donald Trump and National Republicans have their sights on New Mexico.** They would love _nothing_ more than to flip our state red, and I don’t need to tell you why that would be an absolute disaster.
If there’s any sign we’re starting to lose energy, they won’t miss the opportunity to pounce on us, flooding this race with dark money and attack ads.
**That’s why we need all hands on deck to prove we’re here to win and fight for the bright future we deserve.**

Thank you for your help!
Be fierce,
Deb
P.S. I know the Republican shutdown is impacting tens of thousands of New Mexicans and folks across the country. If you’re not able to donate today, I completely understand.

body:

---
**Dear Friend,** **I am writing to you today with a deep sense of urgency.** What we are seeing in states like California is a warning for the entire nation. A breakdown in election integrity is a national crisis, and it's**coming for a ballot box near you.** The left-wing media and the establishment will deny it, but we know the truth: **our sacred right to vote is being threatened by fraud and a broken system.** We cannot afford to wait for a corrupt system to fix itself. clean_body: The system is broken. You can help fix it.| | | Dear Friend, I am writing to you today with a deep sense of urgency. What we are seeing in states like California is a warning for the entire nation. A breakdown in election integrity is a national crisis, and it'scoming for a ballot box near you. The left-wing media and the establishment will deny it, but we know the truth: our sacred right to vote is being threatened by fraud and a broken system. We cannot afford to wait for a corrupt system to fix itself. The only way to combat this threat is by By filling out the short survey below, you will affirm your voting status and directly contribute to our national voter verification efforts. Take action now and stand for election integrity. Thank you, – Conservative Updates via Team Hilton Authorized by Steve Hilton for Governor 2026 | | | ---|---|---

name: Team Ossoff
subject: Jon's campaign is powered by the people, not by corporate PACs and federal lobbyists
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter, we’re seeing MASSIVE momentum in Georgia. Check it out:
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251005-1-a&t=1&akid=871%2E5691347%2EvxQ424)
This is just a one-hour snapshot of folks like you donating from across Georgia, and the country, to reelect Jon Ossoff.
Jon’s campaign is powered by people chipping in what they can — not by federal lobbyists and corporate PACs. Every dot on that map represents folks coming together to show that they know the stakes of this race and are ready to take action.
But this is going to be the most expensive and competitive election in the country in 2026 and we need everyone to step up and do their part to secure victory.
[**So please, Peter, will you join our growing grassroots team by chipping in just $3 — or whatever you’re able — to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign today? Every dollar helps us build the strongest campaign possible.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251005-1-a&t=2&akid=871%2E5691347%2EvxQ424)
**[JOIN THE TEAM](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251005-1-a&t=3&akid=871%2E5691347%2EvxQ424)**
Thank you for your support and for having Jon’s back.
Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=4&akid=871%2E5691347%2EvxQ424) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=871%2E5691347%2EvxQ424) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Why I want to serve in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Hear me out. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116644328/574040706/823540626?refcode=ea.47613b3d-fea1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.47613b3d-fea1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzYxM2IzZC1mZWExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3-8_N2ycobE_ffGAidjtNhhU43NV6UY7i3vLle2mans=&emci=52b325ef-9aa0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=47613b3d-fea1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=17205535)
Peter, **[I love North Carolina and I’ve served the people here for most of my life. I would like to tell you a bit about why it’s time for me to serve in Washington, but first, I have to ask you to make a donation to our campaign for Senate by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116644329/574040707/-1743631236?refcode=ea.47613b3d-fea1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.47613b3d-fea1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzYxM2IzZC1mZWExLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3-8_N2ycobE_ffGAidjtNhhU43NV6UY7i3vLle2mans=)** I was born and raised right here in North Carolina. I’ve worked to give back to the home that gave me so much. Together, we achieved a lot of good: bringing thousands of jobs to NC, boosting our economy by investing in clean energy, giving public school teachers a raise, and — in what may have been our most impactful achievement as Governor — expanding Medicaid to more than 650,000 people. **I never really wanted to go to Washington, but so much progress is in danger now, and not just for North Carolinians._That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate._** I’m running because **every American deserves access to health care** — and that means we need to preserve Medicaid, not slash it to give billionaires a handout. I’m running because the **right to reproductive freedom is fundamental** — and we need to fight to restore abortion access nationwide. I’m running because **our planet is in jeopardy** — and right now the people in power would rather allow companies to pollute our air and water than find new directions. **Peter, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I still believe that our best days are in our future — not our past. But only if we fix what’s broken in Washington now. I can’t do that without your support.** **We know that Republicans are going to target our race. They’re ready to go to any lengths to defeat us. clean_body: Hear me out. | Peter, = I was born and raised right here in North Carolina. I’ve worked to give back to the home that gave me so much. Together, we achieved a lot of good: bringing thousands of jobs to NC, boosting our economy by investing in clean energy, giving public school teachers a raise, and — in what may have been our most impactful achievement as Governor — expanding Medicaid to more than 650,000 people. I never really wanted to go to Washington, but so much progress is in danger now, and not just for North Carolinians.That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate. I’m running because every American deserves access to health care — and that means we need to preserve Medicaid, not slash it to give billionaires a handout. I’m running because the right to reproductive freedom is fundamental — and we need to fight to restore abortion access nationwide. I’m running because our planet is in jeopardy — and right now the people in power would rather allow companies to pollute our air and water than find new directions. Peter, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I still believe that our best days are in our future — not our past. But only if we fix what’s broken in Washington now. I can’t do that without your support. We know that Republicans are going to target our race. They’re ready to go to any lengths to defeat us. But together, we can take them on. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = I know that we can do this together. name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmd5fi2bt1ih0k7r7eqlb3hstxv5macu0h501ultbhwap5ttmqsttth7i6dmhia7oa88nxrki924qijp6zd5bclj2w89v5snmggsfuxr&__stmp=t3nzzi&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

| | | | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nzzi&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nzzi&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nzzi&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nzzi&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nzzi&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nzzi&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nzzi&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nzzi&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nzzi&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nzzi&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=34017q10ity9kei78n9apw47zs05uwvghdgkio6yyiu9jimzkos4v5t73i04uswfv7op4rx5vnrbk3cu9wwquooczan5jf4jz3t5w6o0d463o1lmcpuhlb5q3agrt40688r655p1r4wyzomhrkrepv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nzzi&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3nzzi&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

clean_body: Please read the message below from Turning Point USA. Steve Thompson, Editor | | | | Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter: God is so good. ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Friend, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, "What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it**. Also... Here's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, we're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. God is so good. 🙏 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 / AFFILIATE RELATIONSHIP NOTICE: The sender of this communication likely has a financial or material connection to the companies or individuals mentioned and may receive commissions from purchases you make through related sites. body:
Your monthly roundup of climate wins, tools, and tributes

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116648197/574043693/1328794144?refcode=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhNGI1OTkxLTAyYTItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TlVb3X1UWJOlAZNbHSnxKd15FUWUCSRZqcTvXj017vo=&emci=afc34288-cb9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---
You're reading the October edition of **_The JanePAC Monthly_** , and we have some incredible updates to keep you fired up for the fights ahead. From Jane taking center stage at Climate Week NYC to strutting the runway at Paris Fashion Week, our fearless leader made her presence known everywhere it counts. We’re also celebrating a historic win in Arizona, sharing powerful new tools to track pollution in your community, and honoring the profound legacy of a conservation legend. Let’s dive in! 👇
* * *
**JANE IN THE NEWS** | **🗣️ Jane Fonda and Attorney General Rob Bonta at Climate Week 🗣️**
---
Jane joined JanePAC-endorsed climate champion California Attorney General Rob Bonta at Climate Week NYC 2025 for a powerful conversation about taking on Big Oil through the courts and mobilizing collective action.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116648198/574043694/1652848784?refcode=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhNGI1OTkxLTAyYTItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TlVb3X1UWJOlAZNbHSnxKd15FUWUCSRZqcTvXj017vo=&emci=afc34288-cb9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
Bonta broke down his office's lawsuits pushing back against fossil fuel giants and reversing Trump-era rollbacks, while Jane made the case that we can't win the climate fight without protecting democracy.
Their powerful message resonated across social media and reinforced a critical truth: real climate action requires both grassroots organizing and holding polluters accountable in court.
[**SEE WHAT JANE AND AG BONTA HAD TO SAY →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116648200/574043695/1652848784?refcode=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhNGI1OTkxLTAyYTItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TlVb3X1UWJOlAZNbHSnxKd15FUWUCSRZqcTvXj017vo=&emci=afc34288-cb9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---
**👠 Jane Fonda Takes the Runway 👠**
---
Climate Week wasn’t the only place Jane made headlines last month. She also hit the runway at L’Oréal Paris’s “You’re Worth It” Womenswear Spring/Summer 2026 show during Paris Fashion Week, bringing her signature activism and energy to one of fashion’s biggest stages.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116648201/574043696/651496770?refcode=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhNGI1OTkxLTAyYTItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TlVb3X1UWJOlAZNbHSnxKd15FUWUCSRZqcTvXj017vo=&emci=afc34288-cb9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
**📺 Jane on CNN 📺**
---
**ICYMI:** Jane appeared on The Amanpour Hour on CNN alongside Zimbabwean activist Dr. Mela Chiponda to discuss advancing a green agenda and how the climate crisis impacts not just our environment, but our democracy, our health, and our future.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116648203/574043697/1573127554?refcode=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhNGI1OTkxLTAyYTItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TlVb3X1UWJOlAZNbHSnxKd15FUWUCSRZqcTvXj017vo=&emci=afc34288-cb9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
When asked about shifting from activism to electoral work, Jane explained why she founded JanePAC after years of protesting, lobbying, and even getting arrested without seeing change at the scale science demands:
**_“We weren’t getting it. And we realized the reason is that so many people elected to office in Washington take money from the fossil fuel industry, and so we thought: well, if you can’t change the people, CHANGE the people. So we started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, and we elect climate champions all over the country.”_**
[**WATCH THE FULL INTERVIEW HERE →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116648206/574043698/1573127554?refcode=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhNGI1OTkxLTAyYTItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TlVb3X1UWJOlAZNbHSnxKd15FUWUCSRZqcTvXj017vo=&emci=afc34288-cb9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---
* * *
**MAJOR CLIMATE WIN**
History was made on September 23rd when JanePAC-endorsed climate champion **Adelita Grijalva won her special election for Arizona’s 7th Congressional District,** becoming the first Latina ever elected to Congress from Arizona.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116648208/574043699/2105508926?refcode=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhNGI1OTkxLTAyYTItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TlVb3X1UWJOlAZNbHSnxKd15FUWUCSRZqcTvXj017vo=)
Adelita has been a progressive leader for over two decades. As Pima County Supervisor, she protected thousands of acres of open space, demanded justice for communities left behind, and stood up for tribal sovereignty.
Now, she's taking that same fearless fight to Washington, continuing the legacy of her late father, Congressman Raúl Grijalva. Adelita's win proves that when we invest in bold leaders who refuse to back down, we can make history.
[**DONATE TO ELECT MORE CLIMATE CHAMPIONS LIKE ADELITA**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116648210/574043700/2105508926?refcode=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhNGI1OTkxLTAyYTItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TlVb3X1UWJOlAZNbHSnxKd15FUWUCSRZqcTvXj017vo=)
---
* * *
**ADVOCACY & ORGANIZING UPDATE**
The JanePAC Advocacy team was hard at work this month. After Trump’s FCC tried to pressure ABC into silencing Jimmy Kimmel, the JanePAC Advocacy Team joined millions of people across the country to fight back. We sent over 9,300 letters to ABC and Nexstar executives to demand that they protect freedom of expression from the attacks of this administration, **_and we won! ABC quickly put Jimmy Kimmel Live back on the air, and Nexstar has officially stopped preempting the show on its affiliate stations._**
Meanwhile, the JanePAC Organizing team is firing on all cylinders. Between now and Election Day, volunteers in states across the country are knocking doors, calling voters, and more to help elect climate champions at every level. **[Click here to find out more about how you can get involved!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116648211/574043701/-1641872660?utm_source=em_JPC_OTH_TheJanePACMonthly:Octoberedition_100525&refcode=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhNGI1OTkxLTAyYTItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TlVb3X1UWJOlAZNbHSnxKd15FUWUCSRZqcTvXj017vo=&emci=afc34288-cb9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)**
* * *
**NECESSARY READING**
Want to know who's polluting your community? A new interactive map from Climate TRACE — a nonprofit coalition partly funded by former Vice President Al Gore — tracks air pollution and identifies the biggest polluters in 2,500 urban areas worldwide.
The tool reveals everything from power plants to shipping ports that are pumping dangerous PM2.5 pollutants and greenhouse gases into the air.
“PM2.5 exposure over time can prove lethal to individuals with preexisting conditions like asthma or cardiovascular illness, along with very young or elderly individuals... Such pollutants are responsible for nearly **9 million deaths per year globally** , studies show.” – CNN, 9/24/2025
---
[**READ THE FULL STORY →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116648212/574043702/1019113536?refcode=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhNGI1OTkxLTAyYTItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TlVb3X1UWJOlAZNbHSnxKd15FUWUCSRZqcTvXj017vo=&emci=afc34288-cb9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
---
* * *
**💚 REMEMBERING DR. JANE GOODALL**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116648213/574043703/1795568594?refcode=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhNGI1OTkxLTAyYTItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TlVb3X1UWJOlAZNbHSnxKd15FUWUCSRZqcTvXj017vo=&emci=afc34288-cb9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)
This week, we lost a giant. The profound legacy of Dr. Jane Goodall reminds us that empathy and paying attention to the world around us can shift our whole, wild world.
Her groundbreaking work with chimps revealed the intimate lives of our genetic fellows, forever changing how we view animal intelligence and our place in the natural world. Through the Jane Goodall Institute and Roots & Shoots, she inspired global action for conservation, and maybe more critically, for compassion.
Her gentle wisdom will be missed, her work will be remembered, and she will remain deeply loved by all who care for the planet and the beings on it — even in her absence.
* * *
That's it for this edition of **_The JanePAC Monthly_**.
If you want to stay plugged in between newsletters, follow us on social media for daily updates and behind-the-scenes moments with Jane and the team:
[**INSTAGRAM**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116648214/574043704/458897881?refcode=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhNGI1OTkxLTAyYTItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TlVb3X1UWJOlAZNbHSnxKd15FUWUCSRZqcTvXj017vo=&emci=afc34288-cb9f-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=7a4b5991-02a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)

clean_body: Your monthly roundup of climate wins, tools, and tributes | You're reading the October edition of The JanePAC Monthly , and we have some incredible updates to keep you fired up for the fights ahead. From Jane taking center stage at Climate Week NYC to strutting the runway at Paris Fashion Week, our fearless leader made her presence known everywhere it counts. We’re also celebrating a historic win in Arizona, sharing powerful new tools to track pollution in your community, and honoring the profound legacy of a conservation legend. Let’s dive in! 👇 JANE IN THE NEWS | 🗣️ Jane Fonda and Attorney General Rob Bonta at Climate Week 🗣️ Jane joined JanePAC-endorsed climate champion California Attorney General Rob Bonta at Climate Week NYC 2025 for a powerful conversation about taking on Big Oil through the courts and mobilizing collective action. Bonta broke down his office's lawsuits pushing back against fossil fuel giants and reversing Trump-era rollbacks, while Jane made the case that we can't win the climate fight without protecting democracy. Their powerful message resonated across social media and reinforced a critical truth: real climate action requires both grassroots organizing and holding polluters accountable in court. 👠 Jane Fonda Takes the Runway 👠 Climate Week wasn’t the only place Jane made headlines last month. She also hit the runway at L’Oréal Paris’s “You’re Worth It” Womenswear Spring/Summer 2026 show during Paris Fashion Week, bringing her signature activism and energy to one of fashion’s biggest stages. 📺 Jane on CNN 📺 ICYMI: Jane appeared on The Amanpour Hour on CNN alongside Zimbabwean activist Dr. Mela Chiponda to discuss advancing a green agenda and how the climate crisis impacts not just our environment, but our democracy, our health, and our future. When asked about shifting from activism to electoral work, Jane explained why she founded JanePAC after years of protesting, lobbying, and even getting arrested without seeing change at the scale science demands: “We weren’t getting it. And we realized the reason is that so many people elected to office in Washington take money from the fossil fuel industry, and so we thought: well, if you can’t change the people, CHANGE the people. So we started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, and we elect climate champions all over the country.” MAJOR CLIMATE WIN History was made on September 23rd when JanePAC-endorsed climate champion Adelita Grijalva won her special election for Arizona’s 7th Congressional District, becoming the first Latina ever elected to Congress from Arizona. = Adelita has been a progressive leader for over two decades. As Pima County Supervisor, she protected thousands of acres of open space, demanded justice for communities left behind, and stood up for tribal sovereignty. Now, she's taking that same fearless fight to Washington, continuing the legacy of her late father, Congressman Raúl Grijalva. Adelita's win proves that when we invest in bold leaders who refuse to back down, we can make history. = ADVOCACY & ORGANIZING UPDATE The JanePAC Advocacy team was hard at work this month. After Trump’s FCC tried to pressure ABC into silencing Jimmy Kimmel, the JanePAC Advocacy Team joined millions of people across the country to fight back. We sent over 9,300 letters to ABC and Nexstar executives to demand that they protect freedom of expression from the attacks of this administration, and we won! ABC quickly put Jimmy Kimmel Live back on the air, and Nexstar has officially stopped preempting the show on its affiliate stations. Meanwhile, the JanePAC Organizing team is firing on all cylinders. Between now and Election Day, volunteers in states across the country are knocking doors, calling voters, and more to help elect climate champions at every level. NECESSARY READING Want to know who's polluting your community? A new interactive map from Climate TRACE — a nonprofit coalition partly funded by former Vice President Al Gore — tracks air pollution and identifies the biggest polluters in 2,500 urban areas worldwide. The tool reveals everything from power plants to shipping ports that are pumping dangerous PM2.5 pollutants and greenhouse gases into the air. “PM2.5 exposure over time can prove lethal to individuals with preexisting conditions like asthma or cardiovascular illness, along with very young or elderly individuals... Such pollutants are responsible for nearly 9 million deaths per year globally , studies show.” – CNN, 9/24/2025 💚 REMEMBERING DR. JANE GOODALL This week, we lost a giant. The profound legacy of Dr. Jane Goodall reminds us that empathy and paying attention to the world around us can shift our whole, wild world. Her groundbreaking work with chimps revealed the intimate lives of our genetic fellows, forever changing how we view animal intelligence and our place in the natural world. Through the Jane Goodall Institute and Roots & Shoots, she inspired global action for conservation, and maybe more critically, for compassion. Her gentle wisdom will be missed, her work will be remembered, and she will remain deeply loved by all who care for the planet and the beings on it — even in her absence. That's it for this edition of The JanePAC Monthly. If you want to stay plugged in between newsletters, follow us on social media for daily updates and behind-the-scenes moments with Jane and the team: Together, we are building a movement they cannot ignore. And we're just getting started. – Team JanePAC = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

clean_body: The next Supreme Court term starts Monday. Here’s which of our rights are coming up for debate. | | Peter, The next Supreme Court term starts Monday. The MAGA justices have had a busy summer quietly blessing Trump’s worst authoritarian impulses with shadow dockets and emergency rulings. Now, they’re coming back to erode our democracy even further. What’s on the docket? LGBTQ+ rights, presidential powers, voting rights, and more. The damage the corrupt Supreme Court has already wreaked on our democracy will take decades to repair. But millions of Americans have no idea that the justices have worked hand in hand with MAGA extremists to strip their rights, declare Trump king, and silence dissent. The MAGA justices are putting our rights directly on the chopping block. Decisions this term could promote dangerous conversion therapy for LGBTQ+ youth, give Trump unlimited power to wantonly set tariff policy, open the door to more billionaire money corrupting our politics, and virtually end the Voting Rights Act. These are the moments MAGA extremists have been building for. Our rapid response needs to be just as strong. We need activists, organizers, academics, and working Americans from across the country to hear exactly what’s going on and speak out. Our Substack is the first step. When you subscribe today, you’ll get up-to-date announcements and analysis as soon as we hear a peep from the Supreme Court. Thank you for defending our rights, Stasha Rhodes United for Democracy Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from United for Democracy, please .

name: Team Moore
subject: They’re going to throw everything they’ve got at Wes…
body:
There’s a new social media campaign that is attacking Wes.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=711%2E1086043%2EIp5jsm)
There’s an anonymous account using AI to smear Wes, Peter.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251005-1?refcode=em-20251005-1&refcode2=711_1086043_Ip5jsm&akid=711%2E1086043%2EIp5jsm)**
The “No Moore” PAC is a new group on the attack against Wes and everything we’re fighting for, _and frankly, it’s just creepy._ They’re posting AI-generated video after AI-generated video, photoshopping fake calendars for misleading attacks, and even combing through emails like these. 😬
Look, this only means one thing: **Some of our opponents are desperate.**
They’ll do anything to try to unseat Wes. And with Republicans already in the race against us, we have to build our movement now.
**[Peter, we can’t stop the AI-generated attacks, but we can prove that our movement is strong enough to drown them out. Will you chip in any amount this weekend to prove you’ve got Wes’ back?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251005-1?refcode=em-20251005-1&refcode2=711_1086043_Ip5jsm&akid=711%2E1086043%2EIp5jsm)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251005-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20251005-1&refcode2=711_1086043_Ip5jsm&akid=711%2E1086043%2EIp5jsm)**
Thank you for all that you do,
Team Moore

The “No Moore” PAC is a new group on the attack against Wes and everything we’re fighting for, and frankly, it’s just creepy. They’re posting AI-generated video after AI-generated video, photoshopping fake calendars for misleading attacks, and even combing through emails like these. 😬 Look, this only means one thing: Some of our opponents are desperate. They’ll do anything to try to unseat Wes. And with Republicans already in the race against us, we have to build our movement now. Thank you for all that you do, Team Moore

### America's focus on the Western Hemisphere is increasing.
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ee023c14-b2b4-4a3e-8fdf-14b1778c96a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Rising tensions in the Caribbean Sea and with Venezuela have led pundits and policymakers alike to ask questions about the coherence of the Trump Administration's foreign policy. Many are confused, noting the seeming inconsistency of an America First rhetoric and the use of military force against an adversary. The [declaration](https://substack.com/redirect/8f2ba4ab-5eb2-4e8b-8d3d-1e9981b0bce2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of war on drug cartels, [designation](https://substack.com/redirect/241f5d95-bdaa-43a5-bde6-1419ecccc9eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of these groups as terrorist organizations, and [military strikes](https://substack.com/redirect/761dcbde-acd0-4673-a30e-942e1a7402b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) against them is the precise type of foreign policy that agitates Trump's base of supporters. There has even been talk of [regime change](https://substack.com/redirect/3968b18c-7823-4103-b53d-9257cb9367f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the _bete noire_ of the populist right.
Trump's posture towards Venezuela has always prompted charges of [inconsistency](https://substack.com/redirect/68706bf9-8719-4028-9d29-655085baaf93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [incongruity](https://substack.com/redirect/34c6d955-5ca3-44ea-a4e2-9d0aa660dd59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [incoherence](https://substack.com/redirect/435247b5-71c1-4666-8375-e00964a4237f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and critics now argue that his [War on Terror approach](https://substack.com/redirect/3785721a-c8e5-49d1-ba20-d5b91bbb71d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) smacks of interventionism. Why Venezuela but not Ukraine? South America but not Europe? How is the never-ending War on Drugs different than the endless War on Terror? Are we just swapping one Forever War with another?
The fundamental disconnect between these views and the Administration's actions is that "America First" is better understood as "American Interests First." America First has never been about interventionism versus isolationism, engagement versus abandonment. It has instead been about retrenchment and selective intervention, pulling back from far-flung corners of the globe (where our interests are indirect, and possibly limited) to focus on our neighborhood and direct interests.
Fentanyl and illicit drugs have an enormous impact on Americans, so targeting drug cartels is consistent with an American Interests First agenda. It also means Europe should care more about Ukraine (American interests are indirect) and that America should care more about drugs and violence emanating from Venezuela (a direct threat to America).
* * *
## [America's Evolving Global Role](https://substack.com/redirect/c51e44e5-1854-4ceb-a7af-b71c57c24c73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Feb 27
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c51e44e5-1854-4ceb-a7af-b71c57c24c73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Since the day he descended an escalator to upend American politics, President Donald Trump has consistently delighted his supporters and confounded his critics. Seemingly on separate planets, these t...](https://substack.com/redirect/c51e44e5-1854-4ceb-a7af-b71c57c24c73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/c51e44e5-1854-4ceb-a7af-b71c57c24c73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Far from being contradictory or hypocritical, the administration's approach to Venezuela fits neatly under an America First strategy. As Trump sees it, these [kinetic actions](https://substack.com/redirect/6ddb188e-aa29-441d-8f5c-35458503891a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) against drug cartels are defending American lives; illegal drugs, after all, have killed more Americans than Al Qaida ever did. It is easy to see how the drug boats off the coast of South America might be a greater threat to Americans than Russian tanks firing into Ukraine, [Islamists in Syria](https://substack.com/redirect/8127829f-06d2-4863-b0ff-ba5d023a3e93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), or [Houthi rockets](https://substack.com/redirect/1dd0f19b-26d3-4e40-b6f5-7c0c27cb95e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Yemen. Utilizing tools from the War or Terror ([Designation of Foreign Terrorist Organizations](https://substack.com/redirect/f1c38552-c1a7-411c-a7ac-8c56d15b82d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Authorization for Use of Military Force](https://substack.com/redirect/777f2169-1b34-4adb-8fe2-b1889710ef96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and enhanced special operations and intelligence capabilities) and redirecting them from faraway deserts to nearby jungles doesn't run counter to MAGA's position for the past decade, it encapsulates it.
* * *
## [The Global Split Accelerates ](https://substack.com/redirect/560b00c2-a604-4a58-bc84-d0f0cf3e725c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Apr 26
[](https://substack.com/redirect/560b00c2-a604-4a58-bc84-d0f0cf3e725c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[I have long been thought the world is in the process of bifurcating into two economic ecosystems, one led by America and the other by China. As is now obvious to the world, the split is accelerating ...](https://substack.com/redirect/560b00c2-a604-4a58-bc84-d0f0cf3e725c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/560b00c2-a604-4a58-bc84-d0f0cf3e725c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Trump's retrenchment and refocus on our neighborhood may create power vacuums in other parts of the world, but at heart seems to be an underlying acceptance that America can't do everything everywhere. The corollary to this thinking is that the United States appears willing to do anything here to keep the Western Hemisphere free of foreign influences--a 21st century version of the Monroe Doctrine. This strategy is hastening the [bifurcation of the world](https://substack.com/redirect/e445010f-c3f6-45bb-80f6-2ac6dd71183d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) into two global ecosystems--one led by a China-Russia-Iran alliance and the other led by the United States and its Western allies.
It's long been said that "actions speak louder than words" and in this regard it's worth paying attention to America's actions. They seem to be indicating a coherent strategy, even if it's described incoherently.

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/357bbfb1-ac76-4547-9361-3284a44a1143?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/1d17cb7c-67a4-4e8d-9b09-4798cf030c0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/c31772ba-0509-4394-bb6f-01b3fc9e54eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: most people running for office wouldn’t choose to speak candidly about alcohol addiction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Thank you for hearing my story.
#
Peter, Deb Haaland here and I want to tell you about a milestone I’m proud of: **I have reached 35 years of sobriety.**
Most people running for office wouldn’t choose to speak candidly about alcohol addiction. But I’m not like most people running for office. My story is different.
I was about 23 years old when I made the brave decision to get sober. It was a struggle at first, but I persevered because I was committed to doing all I could. I went to AA meetings and probably read 20 books on addiction.
My struggles made me fierce, which is why I chose to speak openly about my sobriety in my very first campaign ad when I ran for Congress 7 years ago. And I’m so glad I did. I'll never forget the day we went to the Marigold Parade in the South Valley, and people came up to me right and left and thanked me for my honesty in my ad. They shared stories about themselves, their parents, and their loved ones struggling with addiction, and it brought tears to my eyes that people felt represented by someone like me.
**My journey to sobriety taught me that you must face hard truths if you want to make change, which is why I’ll never shy away from the tough fights that lie ahead for New Mexico.**
High prices, homelessness, crime, and addiction weigh heavy on our state. As Governor, I will address these head on by investing in addiction services, helping families get the resources to support their loved ones, and requiring health insurers in New Mexico cover drug and alcohol treatment.
**My promise to you, Peter: I will always be honest about topics other politicians might try to sweep under the rug, because I believe if we’re brave, we can heal.**
Thank you for hearing my story. That’s how we’ll win this race — by sharing our stories, lifting each other up, and being fierce enough to fight for the bright future New Mexicans deserve. **[If you can, I’d be so grateful if you’d pitch in a split donation of $5 between my campaign and State Democrats Committee so we can keep sharing our stories across New Mexico and beyond to hear from as many voices as possible and win this race.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96358?refcode=em20251005-9528&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9528%2E614464%2EfcfSPm)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96358?refcode=em20251005-9528&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9528%2E614464%2EfcfSPm)**
Thank you for everything.
Deb
P.S. We know the Republican shutdown is impacting tens of thousands of New Mexicans and folks across the country. If you’re not able to donate today, we completely understand.

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=3&akid=9528%2E614464%2EfcfSPm).
