name: Michael Bennet
subject: Together, we can build an education system for the 21st century
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
We owe our kids solutions for the future – that's why I'm in this race.
| | |
---
Look, friend:
_Teachers are dipping into modest paychecks to buy supplies for overcrowded classrooms.
Reading scores are at a record low.
Kids' mental health issues are going unaddressed.
Graduates are feeling underprepared to enter today's economy._
The problems facing our schools today are issues of national importance – so as the White House strips the Department of Education down to parts, holds public school funding hostage, and injects culture wars into K-12 curriculum,** I'm running for governor because we can't count on D.C. Republicans to fix it.**
**_[As our next governor, I believe Colorado can become the best state to live, raise a family, and educate our children. If you agree, friend, will you chip in to my campaign now to help me make it a reality?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116651692/574049512/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk937-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTg5ZTMxMC0wNWEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-nT8dUSnK2mPbGaJopATRYEjmpBsAOClxcd6-l3kBBk=)_**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116651694/574049513/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk937-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTg5ZTMxMC0wNWEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-nT8dUSnK2mPbGaJopATRYEjmpBsAOClxcd6-l3kBBk=)
---
When I was the superintendent of the Denver Public Schools, I raised expectations for our kids in class, created opportunities for teachers' professional growth, promoted parent engagement, and partnered with philanthropists to put college within reach for more grads – and it was a resounding success.
But I'm not running just to copy-and-paste what worked 20 years ago.
**Coloradans need a governor who will honestly confront the issues facing education in our state,_right now_ ,__ and work to deliver our kids real, actionable solutions for the future.** And _that's_ why I'm in this race.
I'm running to give teachers the fair pay and support they deserve for giving their all to nurture Colorado's young minds – starting by fully funding education.
I'm running to build educational opportunities that empower every child to get ahead, no matter where they live or how much their parents make.
I'm running to put the whole state to work to improve kids’ mental health and make mental health care affordable and accessible for all.
I'm running to help all our kids graduate high school with the skills to earn a living wage and enter the middle class – whether or not they go to college.
And I'm running to partner with businesses in our state to train tomorrow's workers with the skills they need to fill critical, high-paying jobs in IT, health care, biotechnology, aerospace, manufacturing, and finance.
I'm running because our state has a golden opportunity to set an example for policymakers in D.C. – **and I know we can lead the nation in forging a 21st-century education system that creates meaningful opportunity for all.**
**_[If you're ready to help me set up Colorado's students for success, and you're in a position to give, please consider making a contribution of $5, or anything you can spare now, toward my campaign. clean_body: We owe our kids solutions for the future – that's why I'm in this race. | | | Look, friend: Teachers are dipping into modest paychecks to buy supplies for overcrowded classrooms. Reading scores are at a record low. Kids' mental health issues are going unaddressed. Graduates are feeling underprepared to enter today's economy. The problems facing our schools today are issues of national importance – so as the White House strips the Department of Education down to parts, holds public school funding hostage, and injects culture wars into K-12 curriculum, I'm running for governor because we can't count on D.C. Republicans to fix it. = | | = When I was the superintendent of the Denver Public Schools, I raised expectations for our kids in class, created opportunities for teachers' professional growth, promoted parent engagement, and partnered with philanthropists to put college within reach for more grads – and it was a resounding success. But I'm not running just to copy-and-paste what worked 20 years ago. Coloradans need a governor who will honestly confront the issues facing education in our state,right now , and work to deliver our kids real, actionable solutions for the future. And that's why I'm in this race. I'm running to give teachers the fair pay and support they deserve for giving their all to nurture Colorado's young minds – starting by fully funding education. I'm running to build educational opportunities that empower every child to get ahead, no matter where they live or how much their parents make. I'm running to put the whole state to work to improve kids’ mental health and make mental health care affordable and accessible for all. I'm running to help all our kids graduate high school with the skills to earn a living wage and enter the middle class – whether or not they go to college. And I'm running to partner with businesses in our state to train tomorrow's workers with the skills they need to fill critical, high-paying jobs in IT, health care, biotechnology, aerospace, manufacturing, and finance. I'm running because our state has a golden opportunity to set an example for policymakers in D.C. – and I know we can lead the nation in forging a 21st-century education system that creates meaningful opportunity for all. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Michael | Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States Paid for by Bennet for Governor. | | **IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ ...** **[Cruz: Trump Shutdown Job Cuts Will Cause Democrats 'To Scream And Weep':](https://trk.email.tedcruz.) **"Sen. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) said President Trump's threat of job cuts during the federal government shutdown will cause Democrats to "scream and weep," adding that the way it shifted the dynamics around funding talks was "fantastic." "What [Office of Management and Budget Director] Russ Vought has done here has really changed the dynamic, because he said if Chuck Schumer and the Democrats force a shutdown, which they now have, that President Trump is going to use that as an opportunity not to tell people you're furloughed for a few days, but instead..." **[Ted Cruz Calls For An End To'Demonizing' ICE After Deadly Dallas Shooting:](https://trk.email.tedcruz._dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW55cG9zdCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXNvY2lhbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXR3aXR0ZXIifQ/eQkQr06abSRxDe5QbZkofw)** "President Trump, Texas Sen. Ted Cruz and other Republicans impassionately called on lefty pols to stop "demonizing" Immigration and Customs Enforcement officers after a deadly shooting at a Dallas migrant processing facility on Wednesday. "To every politician who is using rhetoric demonizing ICE and demonizing CBP [Customs and Border Protection]: stop," Cruz begged during a press conference about the shooting. "To every politician demanding that ICE agents be doxxed, and calling for people to go after their families: stop." "The Brave Men..." **[How Biden's Autopen Pardons Went Unchallenged As Hundreds Of Hardened Criminals Hit The Streets:](https://trk.email.tedcruz._QRvnPn4Mw)** "Federal prisons swung open their doors this summer and let out a parade of nearly 2,000 criminals pardoned by President Biden, despite President Trump's determination that the autopen pardons were "worthless" and mounting evidence that Mr. Biden was barely in the decision-making loop. Critics say Attorney General Pam Bondi should have tried to stop the early release of hundreds of convicted felons serving long sentences for murder, assault, drug trafficking and other crimes. The Justice Department decided it could..." **[Ted Cruz Urges Trump To Back Older Retirement Age For Pilots:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)** "The Republican chair of the Senate Commerce Committee urged President Donald Trump to support international efforts by an airline trade group to raise the mandatory pilot retirement age to 67, a move opposed by the Air Line Pilots Association, which says it could increase travel risks. Sen. Ted Cruz, R-Texas, in a letter first reported by Reuters Sunday, asked Trump to support efforts at this week's opening of a United Nations aviation meeting in Montreal. "America should lead on the international stage in support of raising, or even abolishing, the pilot retirement age," said Cruz..." **[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-nSYS0PAE-qxGNahoDw)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-PxXhVLEEGjtw)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz._18xzmJWVqHFN6qiw)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz._ZRdRwAEjuwA)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[Send Ted Cruz Support Right Now>>](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-Pg)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-5kNTyHaUg5ng)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz._phfDcWvfIilHd6owDVA)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-VftjUJpUZswK2A)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)[](https://trk.email.tedcruz._7-tQ)**

subject: As it stands, I’m simply out of options.

body:
\-------------------------------------
This is the situation I’m caught in:
| [ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eccec3b3bec84ffa9f7019ea47506b2c&_e=mdzQVqdYxL3SFb1B0EtX3L9oDOkfz_sMNa9d595QrolqS7MeZrJip3MGuYOInMtXt2Adqxqs60dqdEwF4QTvrI7y_OVZmRqYhiZPtYitVA7d45OwrTSPlASx5h5BY_ETff-2gr_uuOYHF-m9cUFOjtLFJZNxCQ9HObr-OjqSTG0cr8aa4zZ7ur41hl2AWCHny2t8gLZdiyTGqaH5oj-GpouEA0SgtnOOriYugWbq84AEEO2-o07RU4IfceSk9utNohxzBSKdVZUnydJoUDZ_8G9hhhcpwhr_8QrZiG4QxdsIky-L4J-shjOOmNr-yTFFKAYuUYu6iEccpCVT_YX15qB5sI8XKmjfNC7EYh_4A3P5Dr_LqOAgZotcVrcoJ9StSTrzs-Bd6Ypgxh6UcFe6le56X5rloPqbLAvZr3ljGgyx3q8P-ywWZUte4T0gzXJLtHpg1xbXyjuasOqHk0iqxqYErpasTpVjo80ZnoXmBHNjxEln9Z7LESpOXzArt9I7f4aiJhd-e0w5FH7ow1Je9asE2gLhIpPWhi1hM5keD5RhzYj98j9h88JYYY4OA1vHzBlIatvEOC64iMCW3gVb09K5JdE7Fu1Rab5bJEySwbi_gYlg-0zqDH8sAUhzWyDV)
---
Friend,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
[ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eccec3b3bec84ffa9f7019ea47506b2c&_e=mdzQVqdYxL3SFb1B0EtX3L9oDOkfz_sMNa9d595QrolqS7MeZrJip3MGuYOInMtXt2Adqxqs60dqdEwF4QTvrI7y_OVZmRqYhiZPtYitVA7d45OwrTSPlASx5h5BY_ETff-2gr_uuOYHF-m9cUFOjtLFJZNxCQ9HObr-OjqSTG0cr8aa4zZ7ur41hl2AWCHny2t8gLZdiyTGqaH5oj-Gplg0L_usl6DbQHk9-TTFXXCTplM9qJFpxHTARR4FHnAxZOAeb3mO-OoWBoun3VdSmDqahQvZ3F8kbQyLOiCwzyFIaBjAv2ZMscpnNbw0J100m3q-ewo4acSB8morvuAZ81aIzDi0uyTH2InU1kWGsL0q2h5cduy53q2NKAHKoQXKiK1z43iSPX5-D_hi6AwABO4ue3_ymWMikz_BoU7_mH1LvvWRGWXedyI3GjTrYLDWiy2F2kI5VIaa5zRSQs2oxPNc1H-GrZLy3BP2R-J6QcQnFuu3UTneeBbg1kGHnbiiip9s45Qh5cOrO8AW39FBMmsTRKlhJXXhYdLBGzqB62Bknpa2TNdNmXLf7eJNtJjHykyyqK1RfxdgTp4s1zInN81qWwqwfDEcG_p5SvgHmNuFm669MhOzkFjXzGl23VtJ) __
---

But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eccec3b3bec84ffa9f7019ea47506b2c&_e=mdzQVqdYxL3SFb1B0EtX3L9oDOkfz_sMNa9d595QrolqS7MeZrJip3MGuYOInMtXt2Adqxqs60dqdEwF4QTvrI7y_OVZmRqYhiZPtYitVA7d45OwrTSPlASx5h5BY_ETff-2gr_uuOYHF-m9cUFOjtLFJZNxCQ9HObr-OjqSTG0cr8aa4zZ7ur41hl2AWCHny2t8gLZdiyTGqaH5oj-Gpk4THoG6P1FadvzPIHFDpDsC2fcOecGxJ43Im7K_KLmjogtxNLE-6ZOdoqPLgDgVU2L2HqTyzoqcYEHLXbabJO8uwSU8xa4qiEZBBWRqpR3MOoEyugI-cLZbzS-x8ANOC8TPsMWg9ux0Hu93NrgAgS6v08L27Bx6L5cYhYbuqif3JKYJF_Rgo5JLkMR0T2ifY0gqnKvizv6uf9Q2cPhM_4Hpzmh74jaEuX_gwaBIntTDX1yFfPepBBJM_Kn43gunvtycf6_JJz0r4qm7Nc9ifvkfQM3QtQehyJCF5XIVulofkBynduGJ8VWN4qEs4gTzT--pPn9P30imLpJ1J95Lg4F_CNIxa6Y2ctHquMRAi7Ou13xmvMdVUVt38JoSLM3Vm61JF01w9rRvYY8JVfOUzQEeCTewIvAeH8HbvzAw_W__)

clean_body: \------------------------------------- This is the situation I’m caught in: | Friend, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: David Hogg (Leaders We Deserve)
subject: Your support helps me sleep at night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I take this job pretty seriously, Peter.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251005-1&t=1&akid=2713%2E587540%2EhCXFZ9)
Peter,
I take this job pretty seriously.
I spend a lot of time thinking about how to help every single one of the candidates we endorse win their elections. And you want to know one thing that helps me sleep at night?
It’s knowing that, since our launch in 2023, **more than 15,000 of our grassroots supporters** have signed up to make monthly recurring donations to Leaders We Deserve.
**[These donations are crucial to sustaining a movement like ours, so today I wanted to reach out and ask if you would set up a monthly recurring donation too.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20251005_1_recurring?amount=5&refcode=em20251005-2713&recurring=1&refcode2=2713_587540_hCXFZ9&akid=2713%2E587540%2EhCXFZ9)**
_Use the links in this email to start a recurring donation to Leaders We Deserve._
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20251005_1_recurring?amount=5&refcode=em20251005-2713&recurring=1&refcode2=2713_587540_hCXFZ9&akid=2713%2E587540%2EhCXFZ9)**
Here’s why these recurring donations are so helpful:
* They allow us to set a baseline for what we bring in each month, so we can budget that money toward our most pressing priorities.

* They help us get to work well before Election Day. A month before the election is too late to hire and train organizers, buy TV ads, and compete with more established, well-financed campaigns.

* They help create a snowball effect for our candidates. A lot of donors and organizations look at how much early money candidates raise to inform whether they should get involved, and recurring donations let us back young, progressive candidates early on to show their credibility.

**[So if you’re ready to elect more of the leaders we deserve, please sign up to make a monthly recurring donation of any amount that works for you today. It will help more than you know!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20251005_1_recurring?amount=5&refcode=em20251005-2713&recurring=1&refcode2=2713_587540_hCXFZ9&akid=2713%2E587540%2EhCXFZ9)**
Thanks again for all your support,
David Hogg
P.S. Can’t commit to a monthly donation today? Not a problem.**[If you can make a one-time contribution of $5 or any amount at all, you’ll make a big difference in helping us reach our goals and elect the next generation of leaders.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20251005_1_recurring?amount=5&refcode=em20251005-2713&refcode2=2713_587540_hCXFZ9&akid=2713%2E587540%2EhCXFZ9)**
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251005-1&t=3&refcode2=2713_587540_hCXFZ9&akid=2713%2E587540%2EhCXFZ9)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=2713%2E587540%2EhCXFZ9)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=2713%2E587540%2EhCXFZ9)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: A video message from James:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter --
We’ve got a bit of a problem. How do we meaningfully thank the more than 125,000 folks like you who have contributed to this campaign?
There’s no perfect answer, but James has a plan and wanted to share it with you:
**[Watch this special message from James. It’s only 90 seconds — but it matters to him that you know how much he appreciates your support.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/740?t=1&akid=94%2E1347274%2EesmotI)
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/740?t=2&akid=94%2E1347274%2EesmotI)
We can’t overstate how incredible this movement is.
In three weeks, this team has already broken records and stunned the political establishment. They were underestimating us and betting against James.
There’s no stopping now.
Team Talarico
**James is running for the U.S. Senate to take on the billionaire mega-donors and their puppet politicians. But he can't do it alone. Flipping this seat will require the largest grassroots movement in Texas history.**
[**If $3 is worth it to you to take back Texas, will you please consider making a contribution today? Right-wing super PACs have pledged to spend millions to buy this seat. It’s critical that we lay a strong foundation now.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251005-1-ak&t=3&akid=94%2E1347274%2EesmotI)
[DONATE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251005-1-ak&t=4&akid=94%2E1347274%2EesmotI)

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=5&akid=94%2E1347274%2EesmotI) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=6&refcode2=94_1347274_esmotI&akid=94%2E1347274%2EesmotI)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=94%2E1347274%2EesmotI).

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh88qpcsbcn9qhk5gvluncwlaigz680v45febnd2e7haqdhamkcwansjtgu6jn1mydmkdyowy3c15i6cjniqo5xhpvak2788pc&__stmp=t3o2uv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *

| | | | [](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o2uv&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o2uv&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o2uv&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o2uv&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o2uv&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o2uv&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o2uv&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o2uv&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o2uv&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o2uv&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=1wduekwl7wti4q7z0ym7kn0rqqjapwr601wolsxiw7p3y16gd6id5919miibgecf7p2bs7kdwoulfzxzwpmuetnlf4t3xses7nh3m4jul5qv3orppch0hpkq41byb4ufgtmlfggcvrncljbw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o2uv&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**

clean_body: Please read the message below from Turning Point USA. | | | | Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter: God is so good. ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Friend, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, "What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it**. Also... Here's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, we're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. God is so good. 🙏 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 / / NOTICE OF AFFILIATE CONNECTION: Be aware that the sender of this email may have a business or affiliate relationship with the parties mentioned and could earn commissions from purchases made through linked sites. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: People-powered politics in action — thanks to you
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251005-1558-foote&t=1001&akid=1558%2E342411%2E3K-26V ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

When we talk about people-powered politics, we mean it — and you’re the
reason it works.

Your continued
support isn’t just a gift. It’s how the Squad can keep
challenging corporate interests, protecting our communities, and pushing
for the bold, progressive change our country desperately needs.

Because of your support, Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida can
continue speaking truth to power, taking on Trump and MAGA Republicans,
and refusing to back down from the fights that matter most — from
defending healthcare and workers’ rights to protecting our democracy and
holding billionaires accountable.

This movement is powered by people like you — people who refuse to settle
for the status quo and demand a government that works for everyone. And
thanks to you, we’re only getting started.

Thank you for being part of this fight and for standing with the Squad
every step of the way.

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

The Squad is on the front lines, pushing back against Trump and MAGA
Republicans’ attacks on our democracy — and they can’t do it alone.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251005-movement.2bks69&refcode=em20251005-1558&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1558%2E342411%2E3K-26V ]Chip in now to stand with the Squad and keep this movement going.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251005-movement.2bks69&refcode=em20251005-1558&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1558%2E342411%2E3K-26V ]Contribute ››

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1558%2E342411%2E3K-26V

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

In a moment, we’re going to ask you to [_**make a donation to Senator Mark Warner’s reelection campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116661994/574056032/-165121341?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EarlyInvestments_251005_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzAyZTMzZC0wYWEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uk7by5HN2khnsuG7wzhUzJrIDnpoeBa3ejleRaq2zwU=)

But first, we want to explain why your support _today_ can help protect this seat and flip the Senate _next year_.

Right now, we’re making big, foundational decisions about the size and scale of this campaign. These are the kinds of decisions that don’t make headlines – but do determine whether we win elections.

We’re talking:
* How many field organizers we hire
* When we go on air with our ads
* When, where, and how to reach voters

**But all of these decisions depend on what we can raise in these early months. If we want to compete with Trump’s allies that could drop a $50 or $100 million super PAC against us at any moment, we can’t wait until next year to build out this campaign.**

[_**That’s why we’re asking: will you make an early investment in this campaign by donating $5, $10, or whatever you can today? body:
There is nothing — absolutely nothing — that will divert my attention from the needs of Virginia families.

Peter, Donald Trump just attacked me on Truth Social.
_But I will not be rattled._
I will not be intimidated by somebody who's fired thousands of Virginians, shut down the federal government, and driven up costs. **In fact, I hope the President answers for the chaos he's unleashed while he's in Virginia today.**
_Why is Donald Trump attacking me?_ It's simple: he feels threatened by me because he knows I'm the only candidate who will stand up to him and the chaos his Administration has brought to Virginia.
There is nothing — absolutely nothing — that will divert my attention from the needs of Virginia families.

| Peter,
The flood gates of dark money spending have opened in the run up to the obscure but massively important November, 2025, Pennsylvania Supreme Court Retention Election.
If Democrats lose this court and Republicans successfully get a majority of Pennsylvanians to vote no on retaining the justices who give the courts its 3 vote democratic majority, here's what's at stake:

* MAGA can rig the 2026 and 2028 elections to ensure Pennsylvania and its 19 electoral college votes go red.

* Trump will push for a redistrict of Pennsylvania's Congressional map erasing blue seats.

* An extreme abortion will be upheld.

Voting yes on retaining the justices ensures the court's Democratic majority guaranteeing fair elections, no gerrymandering, and no extreme abortion ban.
Which is why MAGA is especially depraved for using this vile tactic to dupe pro-women voters:

Voting no will not protect women. It will guarantee an abortion ban.

It's a start but if we want to counter MAGA's disinfo at a strategic level we need to scale our scrappy team of fifty canvassers into the hundreds--rapidly.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: An update on the GOP government shutdown
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
it’s been 5 days — and Republicans still haven’t found it within themselves to work with Democrats and reopen the government.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116668804/574062215/1435897075?refcode=email_100525_shutdown-update&refcode2=sl1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWI3MjE3NC0wZGEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0k3QuqEdmKiXkmLai4k5LrAh4keSMU_opMJuGJEFqIQ=&emci=ca272f5c-87a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=9ab72174-0da2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=7280715) Folks, it’s been 5 days — and Republicans still haven’t found it within themselves to work with Democrats on a budget plan to cut costs for families, restore working people's health care, and reopen the government. Look, when Republicans passed their budget back in July, they kicked off a series of events that will lead to working families paying 28% more on average for their health care premiums — and up to a stunning 75% increase in out of pocket expenses for folks across the country. Not to mention thousands who will lose coverage for their pre-existing conditions like cancer and Alzheimer’s. _Who can afford that? _ That’s why we’re asking Republicans to join us in passing a budget that actually makes life more affordable for working people — _not less._ **Instead, they’ve sat on their hands for weeks, refused to even negotiate with Democrats, and shot down every single attempt we made to fund the government without jacking up costs on Americans.** [_**It’s madness, and it’s clear we need more leaders in the Senate who are willing to stand up to Donald Trump’s nonsense and fight for what matters to working people — _not jack up their costs to push the MAGA agenda._ That’s exactly why I’m running for re-election — and if you’re with me, I hope I can count on your support today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116668808/574062216/1531865432?amount=15&refcode=email_100525_shutdown-update&refcode2=sl1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWI3MjE3NC0wZGEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0k3QuqEdmKiXkmLai4k5LrAh4keSMU_opMJuGJEFqIQ=) | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116668813/574062221/1531865432?amount=15&refcode=email_100525_shutdown-update&refcode2=sl1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWI3MjE3NC0wZGEyLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0k3QuqEdmKiXkmLai4k5LrAh4keSMU_opMJuGJEFqIQ=)

| | We're now in a government shutdown because Republicans refused to fix the health care crisis THEY created. And now, Russ Vought just gave us a glimpse of what's next under Trump's destructive playbook. Vought illegally canceled nearly $8 billion in clean energy projects — but only in blue states like Oregon, Washington, California, New York, and Illinois. Russ Vought is breaking the law, and for what? To apply pressure on Democrats to reopen the government instead of negotiating with them to fix Americans' health care. Let's be clear: ripping funding away from only blue states will raise utility bills for EVERYONE. It's not rocket science. Vought is unfit to serve in this or any administration. This is another example of the Republican plan where families lose and billionaires win. Trump has said out loud that he wants to "hurt" Democrats and Democratic communities — and this is just one way he's doing it. Pulling funding, sabotaging jobs, raising costs, and treating America like his personal political playground. These actions are devastating for families who are already struggling. Democrats are saying HELL NO. I'll keep fighting back against this authoritarian agenda and working to pass a funding bill that addresses the urgent needs of the American people. name: Urgent
subject: One month until Trump deals the killing blow
body:
Our democracy is dying. And in exactly one month, Trump could deal the killing blow in this obscure PA election.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011xlkkQxvAYwa6Hp5vYDi2-YiMLJXQvVUs9D7vNPd1l7B6TkLaiYuCR_jR3pvog6SsGQUYR5h4M5vhjeE-2Q8utYJKRuA3ilnULaOlfx95uLD2A_2smbPs8a1OUiUkAx8fqcfF_3scp7WpVGv60wGFHp0GI8vAT91gHgFppZj9FUEhhpDonqyYB9q08QzvpV6bKZ-qoeRpcfN4lkeZb_AtO5956HGGcysuKJ6comjqEnSCkMlm7G5uA==&c=TA_fN2UF5i7gPdqgh6R8kptSJgezISQGIb7OanrPdmFRl5ft7nYSQg==&ch=Zne5sDpdB_mhUPvPVUv1IWXXStIxJ3Z6cwUxmCXlDhg005_CIDlCTw==)
---
| Friend,
Trump cracking down on free speech and targeting Democrats for arrest and persecution. ICE kidnapping our neighbors off the streets without due process. The military deployed on the streets of Los Angeles, Memphis, Washington DC, and Portland.
Our democracy is dying. And in exactly one month, Trump could deal the killing blow.
The November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election is life or death for democracy. If Trump topples the 3 Democrats on the court, he will have control of the body overseeing elections in the most important swing state in the upcoming '26 and '28 elections. Allowing him to outlaw mail-in ballots, prevent Democrat ballots from being counted, or even ban Democrats from being on ballots altogether.
This would all but secure a third term for Trump and MAGA control of the White House for at least another decade.
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011xlkkQxvAYwa6Hp5vYDi2-YiMLJXQvVUs9D7vNPd1l7B6TkLaiYuCR_jR3pvog6SsGQUYR5h4M5vhjeE-2Q8utYJKRuA3ilnULaOlfx95uLD2A_2smbPs8a1OUiUkAx8fqcfF_3scp7WpVGv60wGFHp0GI8vAT91gHgFppZj9FUEhhpDonqyYB9q08QzvpV6bKZ-qoeRpcfN4lkeZb_AtO5956HGGcysdiT-iUE0NduMlboHCu1Yrg==&c=TA_fN2UF5i7gPdqgh6R8kptSJgezISQGIb7OanrPdmFRl5ft7nYSQg==&ch=Zne5sDpdB_mhUPvPVUv1IWXXStIxJ3Z6cwUxmCXlDhg005_CIDlCTw==)
---
| Trump and his fascist collaborators are hoping their coup unfolds in the dark, but Defend Our Courts is shining light on this plot.
We are working tirelessly to save Democracy. Having raised nearly 2 million dollars in grassroots donations from Democrats all across the country, we are one of, if not, the largest Democratic organizations involved in this race.
Powered by national democrats across the nation who have rallied to our cause, we have sent millions of communications to PA Democrats and knocked on tens of thousands of doors. But with only 30 days until the election, we have to stomp on the gas.
[Will you rush a donation of $100, $50, or even $5 to help us save Democracy and rush a contribution to our desperate last stand in PA?](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011xlkkQxvAYwa6Hp5vYDi2-YiMLJXQvVUs9D7vNPd1l7B6TkLaiYuCR_jR3pvog6SsGQUYR5h4M5vhjeE-2Q8utYJKRuA3ilnULaOlfx95uLD2A_2smbPs8a1OUiUkAx8fqcfF_3scp7WpVGv60wGFHp0GI8vAT91gHgFppZj9FUEhhpDonqyYB9q08QzvpV6bKZ-qoeRpcfN4lkeZb_AtO5956HGGcysoJb3uJCB_J6LW4UAWx8EkA==&c=TA_fN2UF5i7gPdqgh6R8kptSJgezISQGIb7OanrPdmFRl5ft7nYSQg==&ch=Zne5sDpdB_mhUPvPVUv1IWXXStIxJ3Z6cwUxmCXlDhg005_CIDlCTw==)

clean_body: Our democracy is dying. And in exactly one month, Trump could deal the killing blow in this obscure PA election. | | | | | == | Friend, Trump cracking down on free speech and targeting Democrats for arrest and persecution. ICE kidnapping our neighbors off the streets without due process. The military deployed on the streets of Los Angeles, Memphis, Washington DC, and Portland. Our democracy is dying. And in exactly one month, Trump could deal the killing blow. The November 4th Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election is life or death for democracy. If Trump topples the 3 Democrats on the court, he will have control of the body overseeing elections in the most important swing state in the upcoming '26 and '28 elections. Allowing him to outlaw mail-in ballots, prevent Democrat ballots from being counted, or even ban Democrats from being on ballots altogether. This would all but secure a third term for Trump and MAGA control of the White House for at least another decade. | | == | Trump and his fascist collaborators are hoping their coup unfolds in the dark, but Defend Our Courts is shining light on this plot. We are working tirelessly to save Democracy. Having raised nearly 2 million dollars in grassroots donations from Democrats all across the country, we are one of, if not, the largest Democratic organizations involved in this race. Powered by national democrats across the nation who have rallied to our cause, we have sent millions of communications to PA Democrats and knocked on tens of thousands of doors. But with only 30 days until the election, we have to stomp on the gas. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | Only one month until Trump could deal the killing blow to Democracy--we have to act now. Friend, When I took the oath as your Attorney General, I swore to protect **_every_** Virginian.

**That promise still stands.**

I’m running for re-election because the progress we’ve made — _safer streets, stronger schools, a justice system that puts victims first_ — is on the line. The stakes? Nothing less than the safety and security of our families.

We have **just 30 days left** to make sure voters know what’s at risk if we hand this office over to far-Left politicians who would rather go easy on criminals than stand with law enforcement.

This campaign is for **_everyone_** who believes in safety, freedom, common sense, and decency. With your help, we’ll protect what we’ve built—and finish the job we started.

[_**I ask for your help and continued support.**_](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/0IRn_ZcgcqegcEgUBtJY4ITxOKWiGZX6ZarK_cqGEBbmTDvLcwnbg6p3pYu5KnY5CRJCNFxgYtFmuQ-fmIQ8KKWyPORli0CkD3-RFb_Dx-dFR-K-OcROjjGxMYyLCwQVO7cb9RA52VQPO0A_CGI7oWans0Fkj02y1WOwamvWx0W7f-kwFsJypLE4aUHCTls37BUb6bqsACjkPfFqfDCh8jfItExRt4bdW8HaAAj2eUTU5uwVjrHVl5J7QwV0N4Yqgogeac5B3T6dRAD4hJfg0yD2Zpvjx4HSSIDQYK6Kw9dfeZp1PLZuyA_-UmS54sk0DlVJOz8oe_pmltDgCtSNkPEx3CR9JVYcLflgQdeI0ojBv721qmkfF4PzdWqxd3pC08ogTpGHRFG9e4HGN2dx8HavyjEUaXwq-b6_APYnkGTlRURL8akwjvctYOnbwd-5ow-pHZdKozljvgI58apiNEPTLj4JMgMAzZPKXW-Lfhma8BLq30S2VK_Orr5wbX1m_j3MOeyCYcCIBYIBjfzSzIsDPrsfVWtTst5JFCogDuYjPU2YY0Uc327PMr8M7isacqwNM0CZ-dnMvM7G9ZVR/AsfJrMUNlNUwKZ7M2ickUyTUvaMWQJF9/13)

Thank you for standing with me, friend.

Friend, We have a disturbing update: The Trump administration isn’t just suing Maine anymore. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.

clean_body: Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned, I’m turning to you... This is the situation I’m caught in: | | Friend, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Haley S.
subject: I'm ready
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
The people I love are afraid of the chaos and uncertainty

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=931%2E49239%2E_0NZXF)
I’m ready to fight for the people that I love in the state that I love
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6128?t=2&akid=931%2E49239%2E_0NZXF)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6129?t=3&akid=931%2E49239%2E_0NZXF)
null – see that little girl in the photo? That’s me! Way before I had the honor of serving Michiganders in Congress and launching this battleground campaign to be Michigan’s next U.S. senator. I was about 12 or 13 years old there.
But don’t be fooled by school picture day (_and my trendy beaded necklace_). Growing up as the daughter of small-business owners – Mom and Dad had their own landscaping business – I was always around a lot of dirt, grease, grime, and heavy machinery. **I wouldn’t have had it any other way.**
My parents taught me the value of hard work – a value that binds all of us in Michigan together. After all, we’re the state that built America. The state that built the middle class.
In fact, do you know what one of my favorite memories is from growing up? When I got the keys to my first car, a used Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. That car represented the newfound freedom of teenage years. **But it was more to me than just that – it also meant I had a piece of Michigan.**
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6129?t=4&akid=931%2E49239%2E_0NZXF)
I love Michigan. I love the people here. And I love that I’ve been able to fight for my state in Congress. But as I’ve traveled our state recently, it’s clear that the people I love are afraid. They’re afraid because of the chaos and uncertainty that Donald Trump and the GOP are inflicting upon our nation.
All across our state, I hear concerns about rising costs, fear of uncertainty in our auto industry, and worries about the future of Social Security and Medicare. And you better believe people are outright disturbed by Trump’s attacks on our democracy and personal freedoms. **This fear, uncertainty, and chaos – all of it is**** _unacceptable._**
That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. I’m ready to fight for the people I love and help block Trump’s dangerous agenda. But the path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan – and this battleground race is being called a “Toss Up” by elections experts.
**null, I need****your support to continue reaching out to voters and win in Michigan. [ _Will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can to my grassroots campaign?_](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6129?t=5&akid=931%2E49239%2E_0NZXF)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6130?t=6&akid=931%2E49239%2E_0NZXF)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6131?t=7&akid=931%2E49239%2E_0NZXF)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6132?t=8&akid=931%2E49239%2E_0NZXF)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6129?t=9&akid=931%2E49239%2E_0NZXF)
---
Thank you,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6133?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=931%2E49239%2E_0NZXF) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6128?t=11&akid=931%2E49239%2E_0NZXF)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: Can I tell you a story?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
“This isn’t a job for a mom.”
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82b9d061-e76b-4dc9-a35b-864ef7a62f1b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter — I have a story to share with you. It’s a bit of a long one, so if you’d rather support my campaign and Blue Amp Action with a [donation of any amount right now](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d9296b7-3699-4b4c-9ab4-f41f96843634/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), I’d appreciate it.
---
| | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1fb677a5-6ac5-4414-a53e-fe1fc22188bb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c19f87f-9516-4280-9a29-4eb2bf3c7efa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
One day in October of 2018, I knocked on a door in a winding cul-de-sac in Troy. The woman who answered was around my mom’s age. I introduced myself and I told her that I was running to be her State Senator. I handed her my literature, and she turned it over a few times. “Are you married?” she asked. Yes, I told her. Then I pointed to the picture of my husband, Ray, and our dog in the literature. “Do you have any kids?” No — we had just been married the year before at Eastern Market, right before I filed to run for office. “Well, are you going to have kids? And when? And how many?” She told me that her own daughter was pregnant and that it would be her first grandchild. Then she stopped me. “I’m sorry,” she said. “I need to know that my senator is in the office representing me the whole time. I can’t vote for you. This isn’t a job for a mom.” I thought about her own daughter and how she needed an advocate, how she deserved a voice. Of course, women could do this. Of course, moms should do this. But I want to admit something to you, Peter — this can get draining. You see, a few weeks ago was the dreaded gap between the last week of summer school and the first week of regular school for my daughter’s pre-school. Somehow, my husband and I timed it completely wrong. In trying to balance everything, we completely screwed up the dates. We found ourselves scrambling that week for child care, for someone to be with our brilliant and endlessly energetic four-year-old, so that we could maintain two full-time jobs on top of a statewide U.S. Senate campaign. So many women know that gap. I found myself worried about telling my campaign team, about stressing them out, thinking that they wished they worked for any other kind of candidate. One without a kid. One who doesn’t have to worry about who’s watching her young child, knowing how hard they worked to arrange a full schedule of fundraisers, meet and greets, union training facility tours, and events. That week, I found myself deeply understanding why so many women just quit. Peter, we do this work to write a New American Dream and to ensure that it’s not just some relic of the past. We do all of this work knowing that it will mean time away from our families. There will be weeks when you find yourself struggling to find childcare, where you want to tear your hair out. Weeks when you think so much about how much easier it would be to just quit. But you don’t. Because we matter. Our voices matter. Because you know that you can make it easier for the next woman who comes after you. And because you know that there are so many people who know what you are going through and who have your back. [As your Senator, I promise to always have yours. If you’re able, please consider splitting a contribution today between my campaign and Blue Amp Action so we can keep writing a New American Dream together.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c8e31b1-f3a2-423c-a98d-c0a855b06623/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T89069bdf-5b55-4e79-b483-1401362e3498/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: We have to protect mail-in voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
ABC: Trump says he will lead 'movement' to end mail-in voting [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=100525_1&amount=25]
Our time in the barrel has come, Team .
President Donald Trump said that he will lead a "movement" to get rid of mail-in ballots and voting machines , falsely claiming that they lead to voter fraud.
Word for lying word: " I am going to lead a movement to get rid of MAIL-IN BALLOTS, and also, while we're at it, Highly 'Inaccurate,' Very Expensive, and Seriously Controversial VOTING MACHINES, which cost Ten Times more than accurate and sophisticated Watermark Paper, which is faster, and leaves NO DOUBT, at the end of the evening, as to who WON, and who LOST, the Election. "
How is Trump going to do this? He's signing an executive order ahead of next year's critical midterms. Is this just another attempt to distract from a failing economy, rising prices, and his role in the Epstein scandal? Probably, yes. Are we going to fight him tooth and nail? You betcha.
We're going to work in the states to defend our access to cast ballots, as they run elections. We're going to petition members of Congress to stop harmful bills that might attempt to back up this executive order. And we're going to do everything we can to support the efforts to stop this in court.
We'll be blunt: We still need your help to protect our fundamental right to vote. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to defend vote by mail across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=100525_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=100525_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=100525_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=100525_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=100525_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=100525_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=100525_1&amount=35]
Trump has long lied about mail-in voting. He's claimed mail-in voting contributed to his 2020 election loss, though no widespread fraud has been found. In fact, the one case of mail-in ballot fraud in Pennsylvania after the 2020 election was a man who was prosecuted for returning his dead mother's ballot for Trump .
We all know just how safe and secure mail-in voting is. It's use dates back to the Civil War. The use of mail-in voting has become very common across the country and study after study has shown that fraud in mail-ballot voting is rare. There are also several safeguards in place nationwide to protect against fraud, including signature requirements and barcodes to track envelopes sent by officials. States have spent tens of millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing.
Being blunt: There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access. There is no good-faith reason to end the use of mail-in voting, or do the other things in this forthcoming executive order or his previous one attacking vote-by-mail. Just like the wave of redistricting efforts in Texas, Florida, and beyond -- this is a partisan voter suppression exercise meant to codify MAGA's power in perpetuity and end our democracy.
Opponents of voting rights will go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and stay in power. Help us fight back with $25 or whatever you can to protect mail-in voting and stop their suppressive policies >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=100525_1&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=100525_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=100525_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
[unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewvwgoe3stg27ldp0mzygvuehz2d60y7vu25f5s6l6tvmgj0y7jiizsfrhdwlht5g7o553lshi9tnw310&__stmp=t3o81h&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *
| | | | [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o81h&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o81h&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o81h&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o81h&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o81h&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o81h&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o81h&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o81h&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o81h&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o81h&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=edb8w7bac21l1y7kl6g86sarke850k4xcrastrhq90rhmne91ceemp3jkdx29vzs97pm6g1suqe72nmnotmn0nokjrjbphd2y4a06h0pwbnksare77q8tykef6riadoszep2nc7t1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o81h&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o81h&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xul=o5pvyewrzrxe8xiau9slbgewvwgoe3stg27ldp0mzygvuehz2d60y7vu25f5s6l6tvmgj0y7jiizsfrhdwlht5g7o553lshi9tnw310&__stmp=t3o81h&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=qwikcdu20az3phg1bpth69jg58g5wzetc2r1ogdlopbxdoo59nk0rzv7ahf43tj2ja71hssb5w46oxbhug0a3lxbg7ohceplqokmeh0r3tjbd8hpjub971xmcxu68bgtkxw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o81h&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=cyfvpmfkldvrr6dojhxow8ai6ctyx4mesofr35u3wjex8fpyjxldifoubj3k3oe2uflxjotj8vidylt8mv30qwwicfobwltr91i8hjyxs75lgf9tvxdc2d1s&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o81h&__onlt=h)

body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/116676945/574070003/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2I2YzYwY2UtMTdhMi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tyap0KhWoTeVAcNLkNQ1MKufNECbe9YWWeNXyNPVTkw=) The government is supposed to work for _you_. That’s what Janelle Bynum has always believed, and it’s guided her work in Congress fighting to lower costs, protect healthcare, help our communities thrive, and defend the benefits Oregonians rely on. But with Republicans in full control in Washington, we’ve seen them continuously fail to act in the best interest of the American people — voting to strip millions of their healthcare and food assistance, threatening veterans’ earned benefits, and doing nothing to lower costs. **Now, they’ve shut down the government because they refuse to bring forward a budget bill that centers the American people and protects healthcare.** We can’t let National Republicans continue to turn their backs on us while they ram through even more of their disastrous policies. That’s why Janelle’s standing strong for Oregonians to ensure our voices are heard — and she needs you standing with her. [_**Together, we can push back on the GOP’s trash policies and deliver for Oregonians by protecting our healthcare and the critical programs that millions of people rely on. clean_body: = The government is supposed to work for you. That’s what Janelle Bynum has always believed, and it’s guided her work in Congress fighting to lower costs, protect healthcare, help our communities thrive, and defend the benefits Oregonians rely on. But with Republicans in full control in Washington, we’ve seen them continuously fail to act in the best interest of the American people — voting to strip millions of their healthcare and food assistance, threatening veterans’ earned benefits, and doing nothing to lower costs. Now, they’ve shut down the government because they refuse to bring forward a budget bill that centers the American people and protects healthcare. We can’t let National Republicans continue to turn their backs on us while they ram through even more of their disastrous policies. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR

---
