name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

* * *
| | | | [](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o928&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o928&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o928&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o928&__onlt=h)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o928&__onlt=h)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o928&__onlt=h)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o928&__onlt=h)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o928&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o928&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o928&__onlt=h)
---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021yexmo1p4jhqhwxvpt91ysyvglg129x7zhvfnt81lztor5w25rfoq1qd15xfpux80208lsn5uvdqnsgqrhi5bx9rbgtqjcys5uiw6i354teks9xfofxyoau76lboaxvep6&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o928&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o928&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xul=2qq8ny3595o85h60939os39vfjakiltqx5rundkn1b0qe2m4tw0vv89furht5h5fctp0fm2a4j4lke9mkquafuzs05c41ebn4uz2evrjd&__stmp=t3o928&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=2vytyz4021yexmo1p4jhqhwxvpt91ysyvglg129x7zhvcr6rbzlg5z25ukoeuotp0jzal228in0bhzezua186f1jxntj1fdxise5ck8e39zv3kxn7dux45sk7hf7o4w6zbdwj1mdz16&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o928&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=4zp2igrzkq6qd71c9zgvukzynb8hdt3orbezku06qrf5lvd5ytd2mwqid0a5dbs9p32mzkhpmqoswlmqjwcpjtyhwo7y53ju0eaoap44w0rwm2syjdutgkimfn3h625p&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3o928&__onlt=h)

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Your voice matters, take our 2-minute survey
body:
---
Derek, **We’re at a critical moment, and your voice matters more than ever.** While Trump and Republicans are redrawing congressional maps to rig elections in their favor, we’re fighting back and showing up for Democrats in red, blue, and purple states alike. We’re investing in every single state Democratic Party, deploying thousands of organizers across the country, and investing seven figures in both Virginia and New Jersey ahead of their elections this year. As we prepare for the 2026 midterms and beyond, the Democratic Party is listening closely to our base. We want to know what issues matter most to you, where you think we should focus our efforts, and how we can better communicate, organize, and fight for the values we share — _because we can’t move forward without you_. When Democrats across the country take the time to make their voices heard, that is how we create a vision for the future of our Party. That’s why we’re reaching out today to ask for your input. We’ve put together a survey to hear directly from our supporters across the country. Your answers will help guide our strategy, messaging, advocacy, and investments in the months ahead. [**Whether you’re a longtime activist, a first-time voter, or somewhere in between, Derek, your voice will shape the future of this Party and the future of our country. So please take 3-5 minutes to make your voice heard to strengthen our movement.**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/20251003_supporter_survey/?refcode=em_202510005_4731_fr&amount=7&akid=4731%2E22930333%2EKBSpu7) In solidarity, The Democratic National Committee

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Winsome
subject: Better a few hours too soon than a minute too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
clean_body: Please read EVERY word carefully | Please read EVERY word carefully| | | | Please read EVERY word carefully| - This is my final message to you before time expires. Knowing that, will you please read every word carefully? Thanks for opening this email! I wouldn't be reaching out like this if my situation weren't truly dire. Let me explain my predicament: FIRST, while I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session, my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was RAKING IN hundreds of thousands of dollars! THEN, a Soros-backed, liberal group gave my Democrat opponent $500K all in one go! My Democrat opponent has continued to OUTRAISE me by MILLIONS of dollars. NOW , the polls are TIED. But I cannot win with this crippling cash disadvantage. TO MAKE MATTERS WORSE, I'm facing my CRUCIAL End of Quarter Deadline Goal and I'm WAY behind! in a serious bind here, Peter. I'm over $10,000 behind pace to reach my upcoming Goal. I'm asking you as a Christian, a Marine, and a mother: Democrat opponent has Leftist billionaires like George Soros and Hollywood liberals backing her, but I'm 100% relying on you! can't thank you enough for reading this message all the way through, Peter. You are truly a key part of my team! Together, we will close this fundraising gap and beat my liberal opponent in November! Thanks again and may God bless you! -Winsome Earle-Sears . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596

They don’t care if federal workers go without a paycheck. They don’t care if small businesses collapse. _They don’t care about our economy, our jobs, or our communities._
All they care about is **_power_**. They’ll burn down our government if it means scoring political points.

name: Pennsylvania Democratic Party
subject: Why Dougherty deserves your vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Hi Peter,

Justice Kevin M. Dougherty has shown through his decisions and career that fairness, clarity, and respect aren’t optional. Here’s a brief overview of what he’s done that you should know.
* He has a long history working in Philadelphia’s family court system before joining the Supreme Court, specifically focusing on **courts that help vulnerable citizens and youth**.
* He helped flip the Supreme Court in 2015 from Republican control when he was elected, enabling the Court to issue rulings that protect voting rights, public health during emergencies, and other civil liberties.

Republicans see his seat as a chance to claw back control. They’ve got billionaire donors lining up to make it happen.

**_[Your donation today will make a significant difference. It will help us keep Justice Dougherty on the bench and protect Pennsylvania’s future. Thank you, friend.

Thank you for being such an integral part of my grassroots team. **Because of this team, we were able to meet our end-of-quarter goal before the FEC deadline.**

This is a big deal – especially now that Republicans have let the government shut down.

Your generous support for me and other Senate Democrats proves that hardworking Americans are rallying behind us. They're sick of Republicans being unproductive and out of touch.

A pro-Palestine protester, **[Patricia Schuh, 62, allegedly attacked Sara Kennedy,](https://substack.com/redirect/5914caf0-ecb8-4dd9-a621-5b8dc5349de7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** (no relation to her boss) who is a senior advisor to RFK Jr. at the United Nations, last week. White House Deputy Press Secretary Anna Kelly said "this is part of a disturbing and dangerous set of failures by the U.N. security."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5914caf0-ecb8-4dd9-a621-5b8dc5349de7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## What happened?
* **Incident Details** : Patricia allegedly shined a blinding light in Sara's face and yelled "Free Palestine," chasing her across a lobby and into a bathroom while screaming "slut," "fascist," and "Nazi." Patricia continued to film the attack as she followed her into the stall where Sara was trying to hide, which is when Patricia scratched Sara's right eye while trying to force her way into the stall. Medics later treated Sara's eye injury at the UN.
* **Legal Consequences** : Patricia Schuh faces charges including assault, aggravated harassment, attempted assault, and criminal possession of a weapon; she was released Friday night and is expected in court November 13.
* **Security Concerns** : White House officials linked the incident to other security and logistical failures during President Donald Trump's U.N. visit, including the escalator stopping as Trump and the First Lady approached, as well as when the teleprompter malfunctioned during Trump's speech.

### My thoughts - Video recording fuels the far left
Thank goodness they found the person who will soon face charges--we hope, because it is New York City after all.
The way the far left protests with violence, vulgarity, and no sense of decency or respect for other human beings is downright despicable. You would think that with everything being videotaped these days, it would provide a sense of consciousness about one's actions, but unfortunately for the far left, it provides more fuel to elevate their inexcusable behavior.

# Disturbing social media trend: Anti-Trump pregnant women taking Tylenol in protest
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6cecba91-a53e-4cd3-851f-270232988fb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Trump administration has raised concerns about the potential links between acetaminophen use during pregnancy and autism in children. Anti-Trump pregnant women are now filming themselves taking Tylenol as a form of protest and posting it on social media.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d3ca9922-4a9d-4547-89db-3850aa830688?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Trump and Kennedy add to existing concerns about Tylenol
* **[Tylenol's Own Warning Resurfaces](https://substack.com/redirect/6cecba91-a53e-4cd3-851f-270232988fb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after the White House Department of Health and Human Services posted last month on X, "No caption needed," when they shared a post that Tylenol had written on their own social media account back in 2017. It read: "We actually don't recommend using any of our products while pregnant. Thank you for taking the time to voice your concerns today."

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5b5d4d51-103c-494d-909a-7b3b383f5892?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Multiple scientific studies have also suggested potential risks** , including a 2024 Mount Sinai study linking prenatal acetaminophen to autism and ADHD, a 2017 NIH study on infant use, and a 2019 Johns Hopkins study on pregnancy use.
* **Medical professionals are urging women to stop** , with Dr. Nicole Saphier saying "Don't weaponize your pregnancy for a political point" and advising that acetaminophen should only be used when necessary, at the lowest dose and shortest duration.

### My Thoughts - Consider the facts, not the source
How can these women hate Trump and Kennedy so much that they allow their hatred to influence their judgment to put their unborn child at risk? They are more focused and motivated by how much exposure and likes they will get on social media from filming themselves, than they are of the health and safety of their unborn child.
Just because you don't like the messenger does not mean what they say is not true. If these women took a minute to research on their own what Tylenol has ever said about taking it while pregnant, they would have easily found that Tylenol warned against taking it while pregnant and strongly suggested consulting with their doctor.
* * *

---|---
* * *
# RFK Jr. Says Pouches Offer 'Safest' Form Of Nicotine Use
Secretary of Health and Human Services Robert F. Kennedy Jr. stated **[smokeless nicotine pouches are"probably the safest way to consume nicotine,"](https://substack.com/redirect/4ab357c1-fbe7-408f-8f10-de5089da5ac9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** claiming they could save Americans $640 billion annually in cigarette-related health costs and citing potential dementia risk-reduction benefits.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4ab357c1-fbe7-408f-8f10-de5089da5ac9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **Mixed policy reactions**
* **Medical professionals:** Kennedy's stance met resistance from the American Lung Association and other health officials, who argued that nicotine pouches are too new to fully understand their health consequences, and that smokeless tobacco products are linked to cancer and dental problems.
* **Libertarian and tobacco companies** : Some libertarian policy experts welcomed Kennedy's comments as a shift from the previous administration's hostility toward all nicotine products, while tobacco companies praised his "science over stigma" approach to harm reduction. Experts pointed to declining lung cancer rates in Sweden and Great Britain linked to pouch availability.
* **Kennedy shares more about his claim:** In **[a July 30 interview](https://substack.com/redirect/cc0e7d10-d93f-4077-9b82-7d9f1f77100a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** posted on YouTube, Kennedy said, "I think the nicotine pouches are probably the safest way to consume nicotine and vapes are second. But the thing we really want to get away from are cigarettes. Nicotine itself does not cause cancer. There's no evidence that it's carcinogenic."

### My thoughts - You can't have it both ways
Nicotine pouches have been around for two decades now. The American Lung Association argues that nicotine pouches are too new to fully understand their health consequences, but then claims they are linked to cancer and dental problems.
So which one is it? Too new to understand the health consequences, but not too new to claim they are linked to cancer and dental problems? Everything has side effects. Kennedy is simply saying that nicotine pouches are a healthier option than cigarettes--a lower health risk for people.
* * *

subject: Desperate call for all Democrats to come to Pennsylvania’s Aid

| | |

---
| Friend,
The very fate of our Democracy and the electoral future of the Democratic party rests upon a Democratic victory in the sleepy and often overlooked 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court Retention Election.
If we lose this court, MAGA will seize control of Pennsylvania and will implement an extreme abortion ban, redistrict the PA congressional map making it blood red, and rig the '26 midterms and '28 presidential in the penultimate swing state - 19 electoral college votes down the drain.
Republicans pulled off a shocking lightning breakthrough last month and early polling now shows that a catastrophic loss is exactly what Democrats are on track for. These three factors explain why the GOP is winning:
---
| 1.) Voter registration \- over the Summer, the Pennsylvania GOP shrunk the million voter registration gap that Democrats once held over Republicans to just a 50,000 vote lead. If these trends continue they will surpass Democrats before our November 4th Election Day.
2.) Spending \- bankrolled by the likes of Jeff Yass, the richest man in Pennsylvania, Elon Musk, and Tristan Tate, accused human trafficker and brother of masculinity influencer Andrew Tate, the GOP effort to seize this court boasts a 10-1 spending advantage over Democrats.
3.) Voter Persuasion \- because of their spending advantage Republicans are flooding airwaves, mailboxes, and social media, with disinformation. The Democratic persuasion program is overextended and struggling to contain the GOPs massive breakthrough with has no resources to go on the offensive.
---
| There is however a tangible path for Democrats to regain our advantage on each of these fronts and mount a comeback.
Defend our Courts, the Democratic organization coordinating the defense of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court's liberal majority, is working to contest the GOP on each of these fronts but we need to rapidly scale our program in the remaining 30 days until election day.
The short runway and millions that will be required to salvage this race may seem daunting but our movement has done it in the past and we can do it again.
In 2021 millions of Democrats from across the nation poured in small dollar donations to support Senators Ossoff and Warnock pull off stunning victories in the Georgia Senate runoffs. And in Spring 2025, Dems rallied around the Wisconsin State Supreme Court race, a race with near identical stakes to ours, and successfully outraised and defeated Elon Musk and MAGA.
This is a desperate call for all Democrats to come to rally around Pennsylvania like we did Georgia and Wisconsin. [Can we count on you donate $50, $25, or even $5, to help prevent a catastrophic defeat and propel a historic Democratic win? Whether you can give big or can only give a little - the donations will add up.](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010eEq2dfSdOk7rlo67W0WlkxUydnkOFcUbBtsnt9AEgzFuqtp8tgrE5y-glFrjAjclDPaeo97CWGBf1WQkd0N1xIA0Ozj2c-tkM0Mn0oYRKeAsXA_4i0aTIu-u658JQitjbuaW9brfEWIlRUUaULuANjQLoOaWT-W0KxdGaf82X-F7exLwq_eg1TGEuyB2IhVTNH4Yhyj7qX4n9G57KUzGsWVXVmW3O1i2hhFCkcgBYUAG7CrWmGq3A==&c=AYNAu3ZFKpa9J2TR5-ljHvRI5tI1o2mkZ0ZinZcjHf-kodgPlT4hoQ==&ch=-pMlgZXScn_d2b3RSqqJ1UqRFAw4AsO1b0tzB4nAl6UnPcxyRkWlKg==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Friend, The very fate of our Democracy and the electoral future of the Democratic party rests upon a Democratic victory in the sleepy and often overlooked 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court Retention Election. If we lose this court, MAGA will seize control of Pennsylvania and will implement an extreme abortion ban, redistrict the PA congressional map making it blood red, and rig the '26 midterms and '28 presidential in the penultimate swing state - 19 electoral college votes down the drain. Republicans pulled off a shocking lightning breakthrough last month and early polling now shows that a catastrophic loss is exactly what Democrats are on track for. These three factors explain why the GOP is winning: | 1.) Voter registration \- over the Summer, the Pennsylvania GOP shrunk the million voter registration gap that Democrats once held over Republicans to just a 50,000 vote lead. If these trends continue they will surpass Democrats before our November 4th Election Day. 2.) Spending \- bankrolled by the likes of Jeff Yass, the richest man in Pennsylvania, Elon Musk, and Tristan Tate, accused human trafficker and brother of masculinity influencer Andrew Tate, the GOP effort to seize this court boasts a 10-1 spending advantage over Democrats. 3.) Voter Persuasion \- because of their spending advantage Republicans are flooding airwaves, mailboxes, and social media, with disinformation. The Democratic persuasion program is overextended and struggling to contain the GOPs massive breakthrough with has no resources to go on the offensive. | There is however a tangible path for Democrats to regain our advantage on each of these fronts and mount a comeback. Defend our Courts, the Democratic organization coordinating the defense of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court's liberal majority, is working to contest the GOP on each of these fronts but we need to rapidly scale our program in the remaining 30 days until election day. The short runway and millions that will be required to salvage this race may seem daunting but our movement has done it in the past and we can do it again. In 2021 millions of Democrats from across the nation poured in small dollar donations to support Senators Ossoff and Warnock pull off stunning victories in the Georgia Senate runoffs. And in Spring 2025, Dems rallied around the Wisconsin State Supreme Court race, a race with near identical stakes to ours, and successfully outraised and defeated Elon Musk and MAGA. This is a desperate call for all Democrats to come to rally around Pennsylvania like we did Georgia and Wisconsin. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | Thank you in advance for your critical support. Team Defend our Courts | | | | == | | == | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | == | | | | Defend Our Courts | P.O. Box 45569 | Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | | |

name: NDRC
subject: Our voting rights are under threat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We’ve got to fight back
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116678967/574077471/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5Yjg2OWVhLTI1YTItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A24EccXx8r-vfgn93g8Pe_wlg_SRI9rwycMo266bC6M=&emci=c326ffc1-96a0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=b9b869ea-25a2-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, We need to talk about the Trump administration weaponizing the Department of Justice to carry out its extreme, anti-voter agenda. Here’s some background: Historically, the Justice Department has been a critical check on attempts to deny voters access to the ballot. But now, the Trump administration is using it to subvert the voting process nationwide. NPR reports that the Justice Department has launched legal challenges against eight states, including Maine and Oregon, in an effort to obtain sensitive voter information. This is unprecedented, Peter. Here’s why this is a BIG problem: This is just the latest in a string of horrifying moves to undermine fair representation and the right to vote. Earlier this year, the Trump administration gutted the leadership of the Justice Department’s voting rights unit. The department is also urging the Supreme Court to strike down Louisiana’s fair congressional map and weaken the Voting Rights Act as we know it. This latest anti-democracy attack is incredibly dangerous. If states are forced to hand over voter rolls and sensitive voter data — including driver’s licenses and partial Social Security numbers — the Trump administration could exploit this information for partisan advantage. **[We need your help. Donate to the NDRC so we have the resources to keep fighting back against these attempts to suppress our voting power. The Trump administration needs to know we won’t back down.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/116678968/574077472/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AntiVotingDOJ_email_20251005-NDRC-Tier1-AntiVotingDOJ_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251005-NDRC-Tier1-AntiVotingDOJ_&utm_campaign=AntiVotingDOJ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5Yjg2OWVhLTI1YTItZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A24EccXx8r-vfgn93g8Pe_wlg_SRI9rwycMo266bC6M=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Collapse imminent
subject: Desperate call for all Democrats to come to Pennsylvania’s Aid
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Early polling now shows that a catastrophic loss is exactly what Democrats are on track for.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_iVCXEYO72tQO_w2zu-ESrA485VNEdJsL34ojfgIIOlqeRKBzqS_o46gMqYIGInqJueQojKGxTWYAgIEgf8zTHi01d7p1a8UO9aoi6W0YMAh9uXUKy5lxgDwlUiqhGg9eBq7E_CAUl3Qs9KZsm8S0EXDwMgm0AVH9wLA_ImA2wbQFgjtMgcwAWE8HhhICk12719JjoDAQX3HJK8oU66vxt5hmPxvR-hRLQW6ugHX9Zk=&c=uT7jDB4BnsZaGDkXQRf_bDEA6da1Yb4ZrrbO0EsyRuQIQ7n_P4RexQ==&ch=EDJUMsj0MOLRwjhjPDBxWKePK9wk9hgTE3uYljx05ihuKc8jmWcuaQ==)
---
| Peter,
The very fate of our Democracy and the electoral future of the Democratic party rests upon a Democratic victory in the sleepy and often overlooked 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court Retention Election.
If we lose this court, MAGA will seize control of Pennsylvania and will implement an extreme abortion ban, redistrict the PA congressional map making it blood red, and rig the '26 midterms and '28 presidential in the penultimate swing state - 19 electoral college votes down the drain.
Republicans pulled off a shocking lightning breakthrough last month and early polling now shows that a catastrophic loss is exactly what Democrats are on track for. These three factors explain why the GOP is winning:

1. Voter registration \- over the Summer, the Pennsylvania GOP shrunk the million voter registration gap that Democrats once held over Republicans to just a 50,000 vote lead. If these trends continue they will surpass Democrats before our November 4th Election Day.

2. Spending \- bankrolled by the likes of Jeff Yass, the richest man in Pennsylvania, Elon Musk, and Tristan Tate, accused human trafficker and brother of masculinity influencer Andrew Tate, the GOP effort to seize this court boasts a 10-1 spending advantage over Democrats.

3. Voter Persuasion \- because of their spending advantage Republicans are flooding airwaves, mailboxes, and social media, with disinformation. The Democratic persuasion program is overextended and struggling to contain the GOPs massive breakthrough with has no resources to go on the offensive.

There is however a tangible path for Democrats to regain our advantage on each of these fronts and mount a comeback.
Defend Our Courts, the Democratic organization coordinating the defense of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court's liberal majority, is working to contest the GOP on each of these fronts but we need to rapidly scale our program in the remaining 30 days until election day.
The short runway and millions that will be required to salvage this race may seem daunting but our movement has done it in the past and we can do it again.
In 2021, millions of Democrats from across the nation poured in small dollar donations to support Senators Ossoff and Warnock pull off stunning victories in the Georgia Senate runoffs. And in Spring 2025, Dems rallied around the Wisconsin State Supreme Court race, a race with near identical stakes to ours, and successfully outraised and defeated Elon Musk and MAGA.
This is a desperate call for all Democrats to come to rally around Pennsylvania like we did Georgia and Wisconsin.[ Can we count on you donate $50, $25, or even $5, to help prevent a catastrophic defeat and propel a historic Democratic win? clean_body: Early polling now shows that a catastrophic loss is exactly what Democrats are on track for. | | | | | == | Peter, The very fate of our Democracy and the electoral future of the Democratic party rests upon a Democratic victory in the sleepy and often overlooked 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court Retention Election. If we lose this court, MAGA will seize control of Pennsylvania and will implement an extreme abortion ban, redistrict the PA congressional map making it blood red, and rig the '26 midterms and '28 presidential in the penultimate swing state - 19 electoral college votes down the drain. Republicans pulled off a shocking lightning breakthrough last month and early polling now shows that a catastrophic loss is exactly what Democrats are on track for. These three factors explain why the GOP is winning: 1. Voter registration \- over the Summer, the Pennsylvania GOP shrunk the million voter registration gap that Democrats once held over Republicans to just a 50,000 vote lead. If these trends continue they will surpass Democrats before our November 4th Election Day. 2. Spending \- bankrolled by the likes of Jeff Yass, the richest man in Pennsylvania, Elon Musk, and Tristan Tate, accused human trafficker and brother of masculinity influencer Andrew Tate, the GOP effort to seize this court boasts a 10-1 spending advantage over Democrats. 3. Voter Persuasion \- because of their spending advantage Republicans are flooding airwaves, mailboxes, and social media, with disinformation. The Democratic persuasion program is overextended and struggling to contain the GOPs massive breakthrough with has no resources to go on the offensive. There is however a tangible path for Democrats to regain our advantage on each of these fronts and mount a comeback. Defend Our Courts, the Democratic organization coordinating the defense of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court's liberal majority, is working to contest the GOP on each of these fronts but we need to rapidly scale our program in the remaining 30 days until election day. The short runway and millions that will be required to salvage this race may seem daunting but our movement has done it in the past and we can do it again. In 2021, millions of Democrats from across the nation poured in small dollar donations to support Senators Ossoff and Warnock pull off stunning victories in the Georgia Senate runoffs. And in Spring 2025, Dems rallied around the Wisconsin State Supreme Court race, a race with near identical stakes to ours, and successfully outraised and defeated Elon Musk and MAGA. This is a desperate call for all Democrats to come to rally around Pennsylvania like we did Georgia and Wisconsin.== | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Thank you in advance for your critical support. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. subject: Nearly 50% of California voters are considering voting for a Republican
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
We need to push back fast by getting Katie’s message on the air.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40242%2E3422442%2EOyc5fr)
Peter,
Nearly 50% of California voters are considering voting for a Republican in 2026 — and instead of confronting the far-right’s damage to our state, _a fellow Democrat just launched a TV attack ad against Katie._
We need to push back fast by getting Katie’s message on the air. But here's the challenge: California isn't just any state. We're the most populous state in the nation. We're talking about running ads in some of the most expensive media markets in the country.

name: Tobias Read
subject: “Like living in hell”: President Trump says Portland will be next city to see National Guard on streets
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251005em-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251005em-portland-pet-rs]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
After weeks of attacking our state, President Trump ordered troops to Portland.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251005em-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251005em-portland-pet-rs]
In the weeks leading up to this decision, he has stood in the Oval Office and called Portland “like living in hell.” He has even attacked our neighbors as “paid terrorists.”
The Portland I know is a beautiful, vibrant, and resilient city. It’s a place where families build their futures, where communities come together, and where people stand up for justice.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251005em-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251005em-portland-pet-rs]
Like many other major cities across the country, Portland has faced its share of challenges. Denying this doesn’t help move Portland and Oregon forward.
At the same time, Portland is a city worth supporting — not demonizing.
Let me be clear: we do not need President Trump’s troops in Oregon. And his threats have nothing to do with protecting Oregonians. We do not need fear-mongering from Washington. What we need is support for our communities, respect for our rights, and pride in all that makes Portland strong.
That’s why I’m asking you to join me: Add your name today to say you love Portland and you reject President Trump’s hateful, divisive rhetoric. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LnPIG_b6_0G7mo74o3mtCQ2]
ADD YOUR NAME: I ♥️ PORTLAND [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LnPIG_b6_0G7mo74o3mtCQ2]
Oregon will always rise to meet the moment. And no matter what threats come from Washington, we will stand together, protect our communities, and defend our state’s values.
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Secretary of State, Oregon
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251005em-portland-pet-rs]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=IH5Lx3cfUXiDJSM%2F2uYygeNYOnylPjWLAlO2iZ7cVe%2BaImv4Z0Z8LgB5MKErxUV9BiCeQv%2F%2Bqbb7m%2BIVNItqaDkKhWA8xZKftrCsj1wWCl2vztn7H0m6VH9K0fN4Id4M1fvDMgXUAI%2Fbv2XCUp3LQPKPh39qpsvDVxly3k%2Bect%2BrfhF2PP%2FhlyDMYsbHhVtoq%2FtUoBROagY%2BTnCC5PsO%2FaWP4oH6RggvDAsPlgwzVXyZXxZxs32bWx6dV9IXGGJtkFsmM%2BjTrl0GTVcRUr3AprA5Ps7fA8Qf1h17LCRD8vLMiBd0UlMU1LNE%2FWeEvjLURpCxZbShdiptHRSmiEGQWN72V25ReKf08RFeXMRuRYwbg%2BRbsVrfa1mm2E7Jxnl961GiSOkqgTpu5OANRXTF9KKwkA%2BiY1Kcs1JkaosEMNxQF4LrwMR4USpigY8S6WjZ .

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
[](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xtl=1apjtn1vd0mi7w3lzvxe1ganlz9iy870a4bs6zr5fbekugmj28ro7y1y172ivh2nm96oaklexwpaqkhl8nlz9xjpwu1vemink4eplsbwryot0o290e83rjx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3odqj&__onlt=h) [Mark as Spam](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xul=t2p76x2ul3l184ws2kiv1kps2rotht76pxr4dsw6g03v0od64ur1qryrg5fyqkzmjqhgtlhwyul65qntcatkr77kbqvmuro1q3cv72359r&__stmp=t3odqj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xul=t2p76x2ul3l184ws2kiv1kps2rotht76pxr4dsw6g03v0od64ur1qryrg5fyqkzmjqhgtlhwyul65qntcatkr77kbqvmuro1q3cv72359r&__stmp=t3odqj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *

| | | | [](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3odqj&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3odqj&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3odqj&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?

* * *
| | | | [](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3oe54&__onlt=h)

Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3oe54&__onlt=h)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3oe54&__onlt=h)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _"What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won't be a small task._ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---

---

---

---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---

---
Also... **Here's one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xtl=71kqox8yyg1n0ag6vq3r96p0xdlyhnpvfvgpc47kfqlf8gwpq9profohuzz5z9c763w0mrign88i08c8h77dv7l58w5nqrxrao8hrb3nfrqmr6o5upa7yk03qgl4ukj1ipmmet4b01y277y79f96&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3oe54&__onlt=h)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that's all you can give today, _we're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**

subject: Do you approve of Trump’s top allies?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
Take the MAGA direction survey |
Peter,

We’re conducting a critical grassroots survey to help President Trump and America First conservatives determine the future of our movement.

The Trump Administration is one of the most successful in modern American history — from securing the border, to cutting taxes, to making America respected again on the world stage.

body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Friend -

Let’s speak honestly - I won’t be a cosigner to this tyranny. The Republican-led shutdown is reckless, unnecessary, and hurts everyday Americans. Instead of working together to fund the government and support our communities, Republicans are holding the process hostage—threatening programs that keep families healthy and safe.

They hold the House, the Senate, and the White House. I don’t accept this BS Republican shutdown.

REJECT THE BS REPUBLICAN SHUTDOWN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Oct2025-FR-October?&refcode=E15524-20251001-GovtShutdown-SB-Shutdown&amount=25]

While they delay, families lose vital benefits, veterans go without pay, and small businesses suffer. This is not leadership, it’s dysfunction.

I’m standing up for truth. I’m fighting for accountability, for honest government, and for the values Americans share. If we don’t fight back, we risk letting chaos win.

I need your help. Chip in to help my campaign so I can keep demanding answers, defending democracy, and refusing to cosign Republican extremism.

CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Oct2025-FR-October?&refcode=E15524-20251001-GovtShutdown-SB-Shutdown&amount=25]

Thank you for standing strong with us. Together, we’ll make sure our voices are heard.

- Eric
DONATE TO ERIC » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-aug2025-fr-august?refcode=E15524-20251001-GovtShutdown-footer-Shutdown&amount=25]

subject: I'm unafraid to fight

body:
I am ready to fight - and win - to protect our Texas way of life. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=30d000e53ecb4ba3b948802db895526a&_e=wp0yZ-ghSJe1McVai__TT-_ERWbtXIj9xxOVLQ74ahyy3ci4hwKXXzvDPHD_IBeXY9z9cQZJYC9yr3CIGOqJMzAPnJUB4JGKVScmz7VZIiQCyaKD9iS16kEa6loXELRp_cWF082Qv_KLDM5kljZXAmXJ1VNbWKBMdSIWglG6Gm1KoXQbQZvBp5HZhBSA8GfBF51BQcj7LqYPu5coa0Csid507DAvayMZ1MmfKZJ1doXzY7Avrc6z7RMDIjrS81jyY-thesIjg6zzcgaJHyLFtZ8Ct7gyTZjoNly4WGpCNM5XwNVX-b7paUIDRWKHvjyBOi9Spi2vmpQa1SmG3ZiIUxuAYw2m6Ivbd8QxywJftnQ7mi9-1GLk_fHsnIHxxcMzUNI5OIzw4rZc0baOYZRZFpvGi3Q1_vOc-aEwiHuTruVGsA-uzzE4efRckVWboMwC8j7vwHfjY9NGgE9cbAd-oGcAUwLm4zXqqa_h2XZhQyqvOZLyN_vE_f2bCsViTj7pJRoShTVOwuFg2vTFYMHArTE1k6Cl7NBP-lb6l8lt0mcZlXJpBq64qPQkysxn8mme0b2Aqn2WWERMIuax1BrSXeB80GdRb6hWg-c7drUldrk1MdkpV0GqULulS-lO2zdYVWQcwuvaYxS7mRP1UlIu0SOk9rtEp7pIask4BBC3HRc%3D)
Texas is under assault, Fellow American.

From open-border politicians, radical leftists, and faceless foreign corporations that threaten our sovereignty, safety, and our way of life, **it's time to draw a line in the sand.**

That's why I am running for Attorney General - to protect our Texas way of life.

For so long, Texas was a conservative beacon. We have a proud tradition of rising to defend our homes, our freedoms, and our communities. Texas is anchored by liberty, freedom, and self-determination.

But radical Leftists moving here are threatening to turn Texas blue. Politicians like Colin Allred are flooding our state with Hollywood and Wall Street donors.

_**They will do whatever they can to turn Texas into California or New York.**_

[**DEFEND TEXAS ★**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=30d000e53ecb4ba3b948802db895526a&_e=wp0yZ-ghSJe1McVai__TT-_ERWbtXIj9xxOVLQ74ahyy3ci4hwKXXzvDPHD_IBeXY9z9cQZJYC9yr3CIGOqJMzAPnJUB4JGKVScmz7VZIiQCyaKD9iS16kEa6loXELRp_cWF082Qv_KLDM5kljZXAmXJ1VNbWKBMdSIWglG6Gm1KoXQbQZvBp5HZhBSA8GfBF51BQcj7LqYPu5coa0Csid507DAvayMZ1MmfKZJ1doVReuHW0AhlJgSIrrmKVaBV3MHzSbPVzTJf6sLxCqo5HNJNmLFMuusKVxcnHglYv0BU8h0qkHvnkRTF1tn7iL-RL-IuxKZZ1v_JO00NRiX9DHC1L9_7KtU1j0Q0vPINmPFEUuH1TBovRWT2T7lcIunfh4DT1CiQyzywuhpWK-aeZzYTBpRElHHDfsdhGJSe0OOOqkVosXL_g9RRaYe5y42jEv_f452G6wFbZEwFdM7b8Cj31KIfqPUxmF7XWS-jDlqOCkR23w_yZGzFYIw8vfZlFxvVDYs3WvmMSByBLHoW7-Pzw4NcqaUKDbr34eQmD_6jcX3mekkkbsvwI-azYhbsFKlVmoWbEL-uyCi0BkxPSAt6ZqT8iD_UHUSk1tVIfXxthvJJaie5-CYFS8sZ4TXq0xVuYJjvmMkVA0JM6jfhEIFrKRgYFsE2g2pP6h43ecc%3D)
I will fight every single day for our God-given rights, for our families, and for the future of Texas.

> _No more Soros-funded judges and district attorneys putting criminals on our streets.
> No more judge-made mandates that Texans pay for illegals in our public schools.
> No more communities built on Sharia law._
**[Fellow American, I need your help to carry on our Texan legacy.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=30d000e53ecb4ba3b948802db895526a&_e=wp0yZ-ghSJe1McVai__TT-_ERWbtXIj9xxOVLQ74ahyy3ci4hwKXXzvDPHD_IBeXY9z9cQZJYC9yr3CIGOqJMzAPnJUB4JGKVScmz7VZIiQCyaKD9iS16kEa6loXELRp_cWF082Qv_KLDM5kljZXAmXJ1VNbWKBMdSIWglG6Gm1KoXQbQZvBp5HZhBSA8GfBF51BQcj7LqYPu5coa0Csid507DAvayMZ1MmfKZJ1doW9HQUOT3u-pZ7H5jlXuf4fS9XyXuQcXMAPCIVS2z9a1VZekDHwjxbL3C9ggZCM5gy0oWHbFp9woYpP56KwwCAQIYtLz2o_oy2GyWxIn529Il_44S5HL0FHs_VauWOMUUzFkglRs86Jx5kyVZwBfvtcBcAB0FAsHklzlEctQmkWz5AXN8iyCwDZZ93Bl6AA-cilObZ7FUB8ydyqIptyhcm0TltKZCXryvVnwdOe0iQZe_53LnZ8dg9J6vW9lBc08aUwuJk3atBPg4llM9qOYz0clxXNe1y0nNg8msStMB0qJFcq9N2gWPQ0vvcZcSCKy3WaomW4bZ6kaluCkJRqs_p7N57Vk5vBEEqSHAzFWpuOaURSUHzxLOmxBPDyCrM9QupY7TwAZ0c_q_AdEgPYJUpkoaDW-N_t1K-AmPhxJHaSBe8_HhrDNS-xSb7HJlzRYqU%3D)**

[**JOIN CHIP ROY FOR AG →**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=30d000e53ecb4ba3b948802db895526a&_e=wp0yZ-ghSJe1McVai__TT-_ERWbtXIj9xxOVLQ74ahyy3ci4hwKXXzvDPHD_IBeXY9z9cQZJYC9yr3CIGOqJMzAPnJUB4JGKVScmz7VZIiQCyaKD9iS16kEa6loXELRp_cWF082Qv_KLDM5kljZXAmXJ1VNbWKBMdSIWglG6Gm1KoXQbQZvBp5HZhBSA8GfBF51BQcj7LqYPu5coa0Csid507DAvayMZ1MmfKZJ1doXFylPwb-fxI_b_RhJ524tLPg0RL78Iq8bMpbDGc0uJP7fNWwFKsflSW0-aBjWMXADYt7qHjo9r5h8B9flNdNLhVRodyTeckcTU2zoCr9d6d97QH8Qie9gNnCzO_t1dyHhaqtK1aWQ8jBP-ysO-fm2mNbdy4pG6Btzzv7s8QCzD3aTeQcvoOWUH33S86hr_LQ5tFPTolTI2_Igy8ly8yNQ50bYdCw5t66K_Q2qcEdm6onB8cNUnFZRcaZbwEyHAPfadpm_7Y2RzyYKQepWkohHWn2RLdszcl-yQCHV24378mXMgsXlzNKJeI0usdGqRUb5crZQFi6isg2vEMXpmt-8sY6SoYPaG7LZCcJ20PtAW5ESeAlFUA-zIfwAY0ukk97LgKH5Y7JU3OWSVjVW3pqCe9z8-eUANJLzgjFo1m0MQRifzOQ1LqO1OaMioHu-g-4A%3D)
Texas deserves an Attorney General who is unafraid to fight, unafraid to win, and unafraid to defend Texas.

It was my honor to represent Texas and the 21st Congressional District in Washington and defend President Trump's America First agenda, but it's time for a new fight.

I'll bring the same fighting spirit I brought to the DC Swamp and Deep State in Austin, but I cannot do it without the support of patriots like you.

**[Even if it's just a couple of bucks – _even $5_ – your support today will help us defend Texas.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=30d000e53ecb4ba3b948802db895526a&_e=wp0yZ-ghSJe1McVai__TT-_ERWbtXIj9xxOVLQ74ahyy3ci4hwKXXzvDPHD_IBeXY9z9cQZJYC9yr3CIGOqJMzAPnJUB4JGKVScmz7VZIiQCyaKD9iS16kEa6loXELRp_cWF082Qv_KLDM5kljZXAmXJ1VNbWKBMdSIWglG6Gm1KoXQbQZvBp5HZhBSA8GfBF51BQcj7LqYPu5coa0Csid507DAvayMZ1MmfKZJ1doVTIjT9F1Cv1f3Wso23TB215WUkqwst1qSbjDJiinvc6k1mcYjJCcA9wM0X4QKlnyXeBx-kCqEpz2LZkcCACjgmRk9wEo--ZpWjZucZG9S-XvORF-o3-kwaehA8FmlzsAI3k8sYhCfmeQPIoZ3FeMrKWLWg_V_PFnabpMJgl14vCIFxkWAzzSn0h27uZc_0J4xNgVTmiAN43TOx_KjV0Tfhdu-LARcshBUTAD4eG4USdWkt_G4s7ZCuwKxfFmNuWwMOLO7zXb0YbR3fcRsJn3iXEOVpRb0P8u_rcd1PBbmo9RAStmiU2lOdVBZ2NtzVKmGRCjFIKAU4BRz7vFypUR1KFZWfcaVXNPdJ8sJJo_7UNF1wpBknzWRELJzsC228rkDi08DX2B7oLpt6ik4m1uw_iaOxjXPP1W01-S1rWhF--R0BAPl5Nw3x3Cf2qirEdU4%3D)**

I am counting on you, Fellow American. _**Let's win.**_

Thank you,

Chip Roy

clean_body: I am ready to fight - and win - to protect our Texas way of life. | Texas is under assault, Fellow American. From open-border politicians, radical leftists, and faceless foreign corporations that threaten our sovereignty, safety, and our way of life, it's time to draw a line in the sand. That's why I am running for Attorney General - to protect our Texas way of life. For so long, Texas was a conservative beacon. We have a proud tradition of rising to defend our homes, our freedoms, and our communities. Texas is anchored by liberty, freedom, and self-determination. But radical Leftists moving here are threatening to turn Texas blue. Politicians like Colin Allred are flooding our state with Hollywood and Wall Street donors. They will do whatever they can to turn Texas into California or New York. I will fight every single day for our God-given rights, for our families, and for the future of Texas. No more Soros-funded judges and district attorneys putting criminals on our streets. No more judge-made mandates that Texans pay for illegals in our public schools. No more communities built on Sharia law. Texas deserves an Attorney General who is unafraid to fight, unafraid to win, and unafraid to defend Texas. It was my honor to represent Texas and the 21st Congressional District in Washington and defend President Trump's America First agenda, but it's time for a new fight. I'll bring the same fighting spirit I brought to the DC Swamp and Deep State in Austin, but I cannot do it without the support of patriots like you. I am counting on you, Fellow American. Let's win. Thank you, Chip Roy | | PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

**Let me cut to the chase: New Hampshire’s Senate race could decide whether Democrats take back the majority — _and Republicans know it_.**

Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP see this seat as one of their best shots to expand their power.

They’ve already got a Republican governor in New Hampshire, and they’re betting they can flip the Senate seat next. If they win here, our chances of taking back the Senate drop to zero.

_We can’t let that happen._

Chris is a proven fighter for working families — taking on Big Pharma, defending reproductive freedom, and making sure our government actually works for the people it serves.

I’ve seen what happens when leaders like Chris have the platform and the power to make change — and _I want him in the Senate_.

I know Chris can win, but there’s no way around it: **_This isn’t a safe blue seat, folks._**

The GOP is ready to flood New Hampshire with attack ads and dark money. The only way to beat them is with early, grassroots support. That’s where you come in:

subject: Your thoughts on the new Postmaster General
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
NPR: David Steiner of FedEx is tapped to be the U.S. Postal Service's new leader [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/NPR_PostmasterGeneral.png]
President Donald Trump and the USPS Board of Governors have named former Waste Management CEO David Steiner to lead the Postal Service. Steiner was most recently the lead independent director at FedEx, a USPS competitor.
Brian Renfroe, president of the National Association of Letter Carriers — a union representing nearly 300,000 active and retired letter carriers — called the decision to place Steiner at the head of the USPS " an aggressive step toward handing America's mail system over to corporate interests ."
We want to hear from supporters in your area about this tactic. Will you take our one-click poll right away?
Team: Do you approve of Steiner's appointment to be Postmaster General?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=100525_2yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=100525_2no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=100525_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=100525_2&amount=20]

A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? name: Team Kelly
subject: Mark Kelly is fighting back and Trump is taking notice
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Trump is mad because Mark Kelly just went on Fox News to call Republicans out for shutting down the government and raising Americans’ costs.
#

Team — Mark Kelly went on Fox News this morning to call out Republicans for shutting down the government and raising health care costs — and Donald Trump took notice.
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-oct25.Iw7SM3&refcode=em251005-1-700k&t=1&akid=6209%2E6688874%2ED9-QxT)
Trump doesn’t want Mark on Fox telling the truth about the shutdown because he knows they’re in the wrong.
As many as 24 million Americans could see their health care premiums double or even triple in price if Republicans get their way — and some might lose their health insurance entirely.
Mark is fighting to stop that from happening, and he’s going anywhere and everywhere to make sure people know what’s at stake.
[**So, please. Will you chip in to help Mark keep up the fight to protect Americans’ health care? It’d mean a lot to us, and to Mark.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-oct25.Iw7SM3&refcode=em251005-1-700k&t=2&akid=6209%2E6688874%2ED9-QxT)
**[RUSH A DONATION](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-oct25.Iw7SM3&refcode=em251005-1-700k&t=3&akid=6209%2E6688874%2ED9-QxT)**
Thank you so much,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=6209%2E6688874%2ED9-QxT).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Rob Bonta
subject: States are not Trump’s “training grounds”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-25]
Friends,
President Trump wants to turn our cities into the military’s next “training ground.” That’s not hyperbole — it’s his plan. And it’s a flagrant abuse of power.
This week, I filed an amicus brief alongside Governor Gavin Newsom supporting Oregon’s emergency effort to block Trump’s illegal federalization of the Oregon National Guard. It’s the same unlawful scheme he used to federalize California’s National Guard earlier this year.
Let’s be clear: this is not about public safety.
It’s about intimidation.
It’s about control.
It’s about using the military to stoke fear in our communities.
When Trump federalized California’s National Guard, we saw the consequences firsthand: trust between communities and law enforcement broke down, local economies suffered, and public safety was undermined. National Guard troops — trained for combat, not policing — were deployed into our neighborhoods in violation of the Posse Comitatus Act, which prohibits the use of the military for civilian law enforcement.
Now Trump is trying to do the same thing in Oregon — and we’re standing with them to say absolutely not.
We must not allow this or any administration to wield the military as a political weapon or police force. States have the right to protect their own communities.
I’m committed to continuing to stand against the politicization of our military and their illegal use for civilian law enforcement on American streets — here in California, and across our nation.
Add your name if you agree: Our cities are not training grounds, and our democracy is not a battlefield. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FWJPXZ2hKEC0Qm3gmcB_iQ2?contactdata=FN4/c9wVn0w/3v1N4MxOklUdS57IPocCzDm2phA298DdH1sLJEUHMqOsuircPkpTlOTPRG3slHniJRqvdeTQ8yUpZwKjeDEqou5orJhwiWaWHDvB+yKU6/lEXruzXeUWCaTK7AYmAzRUCzltT0/f7Ny+CWKE3aWY6PF9GY0K8Mc=]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FWJPXZ2hKEC0Qm3gmcB_iQ2?contactdata=FN4/c9wVn0w/3v1N4MxOklUdS57IPocCzDm2phA298DdH1sLJEUHMqOsuircPkpTlOTPRG3slHniJRqvdeTQ8yUpZwKjeDEqou5orJhwiWaWHDvB+yKU6/lEXruzXeUWCaTK7AYmAzRUCzltT0/f7Ny+CWKE3aWY6PF9GY0K8Mc=]
Thank you for standing with us — and with Oregon — in this fight.
In solidarity,
Rob

name: Dana Criswell
subject: Bitcoin’s 21 Million Limit: A Bulwark Against Monetary Madness
body:
Central banks can conjure trillions with a keystroke. Think of it as monetary gold upgraded for the internet age. Gold proved that scarcity preserves purchasing power; Bitcoin keeps the scarcity and adds portability, instant settlement, and easy verification.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bd0483ab-9407-478b-9d60-7718bc08be9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by [micheile henderson](https://substack.com/redirect/87192109-f428-4c7b-8729-510467db1351?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/5f11c136-14ef-4f33-ad50-fac7ac42db2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Central banks can conjure trillions with a keystroke. Bitcoin can't. Its supply is hard-capped at 21,000,000--period. That rule wasn't left to a committee or a "temporary emergency." It's encoded in the protocol and enforced by anyone running a node. New coins are issued on a known schedule and cut in half roughly every four years until the last satoshi is mined around the year 2140. You don't need to trust a press conference; you can verify the math.
Why does that matter? Because money is the measuring stick for value over time. If the stick keeps shrinking, savers get robbed in slow motion. With fiat, the incentives point to quiet devaluation--fund the deficit, rescue the favored, let inflation pick your pocket. With Bitcoin, the incentives reverse. Scarcity restores honesty to saving and pricing. Families can plan without decoding acronyms and tea leaves. Entrepreneurs can hold working capital without a built-in penalty.
Critics warn that a fixed supply invites deflation and hoarding. They're mixing up causes and effects. When productivity rises against a reliable money, prices should drift down--that's progress being returned to the consumer, not a crisis to be "managed" away. And no, we don't need more units to support growth. Bitcoin is divisible to 100 million sats per coin, so the unit scales with the economy just fine.
Think of it as monetary gold upgraded for the internet age. Gold proved that scarcity preserves purchasing power; Bitcoin keeps the scarcity and adds portability, instant settlement, and easy verification. No armored trucks. No assay labs. And unlike gold, nobody can quietly change the issuance policy. If someone tries to inflate Bitcoin, they have to convince the global user base to adopt the change. Good luck. In Bitcoin, the constitution is the consensus of users, not the preferences of rulers.
This cap also disciplines government. When printing is off the table, tradeoffs move back into daylight: tax honestly, borrow transparently, or cut spending. That's how a republic is supposed to operate. Hard money doesn't abolish government; it puts it back within limits.
Is Bitcoin perfect? No. Price swings will scare late adopters. Mining's energy use is real--but increasingly paired with stranded, off-grid, and renewable power that turns wasted energy into secured blocks. Volatility and energy debates are the noise of a new standard competing with an old one. The signal is the rule set: fixed, transparent, and apolitical.
We're living through the endgame of elastic money--record debts, financial engineering, and a creeping tax on anyone paid in dollars instead of assets. Bitcoin's 21 million is the counteroffer: earn it, hold it, and nobody can print you poorer. That's not utopia. That's restraint. If you want money that respects your work and your future, choose the system that can't be bent on a Tuesday afternoon.
_(I feel the need to say this again: I am not your financial advisor, I can barely manage my own finances, so do your own homework and make your own decisions.)_

clean_body: It’s up to the American people to make their voices heard. | Do you support increasing Social Security benefits? | | | | 72 million Americans rely on Social Security to make ends meet. This includes seniors, veterans and people with disabilities. So when Donald Trump’s nominees call Social Security a “Ponzi scheme” and make false claims of fraud and abuse, it’s up to the American people to make their voices heard. That’s exactly why Democrats are fighting to expand Social Security — by increasing annual benefits by $2,400 and ensuring it’s funded through 2096! | | | | Your input matters, Team Gillibrand Opinion Polling * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

name: John James
subject: Yes, Reverend Sharpton, I exist.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
And I won’t be erased just because I’m a Republican.| | | Friend, Al Sharpton went on MSNBC and said **there are no Black members of Congress from Michigan.** _If you don’t know who I am, let me introduce myself._ I’m John James. I’m a West Point grad, Ranger-qualified Apache pilot, combat veteran, and businessman. I have one wife, two master's degrees, and three sons. **I am THE Black Congressman from Michigan.**
---
[](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=a913450768af4d118871a8a066769e1f&_e=ifT2cvjlg6J6b-AgkyySF9q5draqSN3pccJrn3ccaMF0sTdhIE3GeX0xmBzSUX5_RrQdtl3ljzMdaWK0-j9BX8bwLaIfit5EE_oxsA56TJeWnxCFHisTajglbiyqhKi85GLl2oOfiIn5emRD2ujhs0or08bRUfB3aSZwHxkoB92l3Mtrk5zwCuZBs70w2_Oq2Qi29JZ3dEi83VB1Agvjnz5Kx6pAMJXVqs3JKZ8zhNo3O44szsk2CqgKNXXFs6-fz-g6MzdebcPWwRYb-jVlKiN4J9FsU8gT-DkWr3mqUEYFO1okNHXyZrURNB7OGYCuExpNpS6WT4cReqOhSeJCXcflo-877SEo84_r5SK8ZNWaVtJaKWNvgSZTxdzu6wPlKqUmOWvY96XrIgXqa7vaxk7S2ZksSvDMxj-DzG2d_Z0%3D)
---
I was raised to believe I’d be judged by the content of my character. Sadly, with guys like Al Sharpton, there’s only one way to be Black – and that’s to join his party. **_Well, Rev. Al Sharpton is not going to erase me._** I won’t be silent. Michigan is my mission field. Service is my calling. And yes, I’m running to be Michigan’s first Black governor, not for personal glory, but because it’s time to fix what they broke. [**Will you stand with me?**](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=a913450768af4d118871a8a066769e1f&_e=ifT2cvjlg6J6b-AgkyySF9q5draqSN3pccJrn3ccaMF0sTdhIE3GeX0xmBzSUX5_RrQdtl3ljzMdaWK0-j9BX0WD5c458xhd7Hygj6CDgxdXc_yLhn8kmG_QR4TRlsrlTfeyqx1eWkC7DgOT6JxlHNbUbs8CJ-Kvr6tHMAGPGL9fUIX8TPP29gk0fZYAaCUpsVBFvX31xa4-H203BpscMVkkZWgsqBwd-_weNgsZxXSTTc_b1G99GTFnrORf-zME8SF6hX3PNdzWmGwJVgaSlwWE4KluWBCAnONdIF5CZ2u0SYnCEhEf17MntLv6T-aPEiQTwGZziLErC-XtE-BJ0-OL8Ric1glIh645iB7L5K3Q4RNLp4BuU1dQYepZGdhXOvZ6miqhWDyLeBoreO2cF_9sbVDjfQup8a4L9KPkY4k%3D)
---
[ **FUEL THE MISSION** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=a913450768af4d118871a8a066769e1f&_e=ifT2cvjlg6J6b-AgkyySF9q5draqSN3pccJrn3ccaMF0sTdhIE3GeX0xmBzSUX5_RrQdtl3ljzMdaWK0-j9BX-Nhv93FdVeeCTEAYUlrfOa_gxvvV2Xe9rjyBLDItPJJL25SS6ruPSpdcsmqR206V-szyWcC5SQpd1FV9N4oCTG4gG-11NWq9ASTBVOgWzEAZuKfLinlDZ0dA9k_Stnq_jb2V4pahV2J03nYarochXjtD-tqmjxukYBM4Aaag4ur-vM00AdsGaawDD71wmY9NDOVF9uJUwUBX249TFt1h1aw8xlJNc2pglafqDyq42GXakwkgMx6dfu3AF2GkZYJdJuNPVg-i6zGJ5ZZCCyu9dqbfnDRogEO8-Nnln9bZI2yAK9uisttoFK239XLcz1RJAAJbEqBuuuGZTWoAat6zes%3D)
---
The left wants to shame us into silence. But I’ve fought in real battles, and I’m not afraid of mainstream media talking heads like Al Sharpton.
---
Let’s Fly,
John James
---
[](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=a913450768af4d118871a8a066769e1f&_e=ifT2cvjlg6J6b-AgkyySF9q5draqSN3pccJrn3ccaMF0sTdhIE3GeX0xmBzSUX5_RrQdtl3ljzMdaWK0-j9BXwmWLP_mxMoUXxrRr49stdsgnKI9hssdiuJZfS2N8VMSCpHyaWVLua2-rDTLho-yUih44OqsWQzbM7EEZjOXTJSH11a4x7xLCHD0vjWQyFDUNe0Xs4i_J_goDzr83t1o8Eryw_-kOMb8x2JYdO5s9DgfmphhskOfEfkbIhS5wA4W1K1o3dnr2N9O1ppGGhre0NbmB4OzAYfPoiKu47Zug2023nhfFgdeY0X8t_kC7SSZPTUGUki1jEdChVjjoxO6zPYQIjjkH7CMtzSnEcYWGia6Iq73JdTi6tJnqizfWwDvBgmAewd0qVgrKDz0xI0SYGdePGtlkOEmWRnJ4_kC9aU%3D)

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: The long roots of America’s political divide
body:
|
---
[](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xufklqIteknop5I4ITmgegxbm8&s=NNMAIKIEDNICIKEH&req=l%3DD0I2xufjroIteknop5I4ITmgegxbm8%26s%3DFNKGGENDOKNPBOBD)
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *
| | | | [](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xufklqIteknop5I5ITmgegxbm8&s=NNMAIKIEDNICIKEH&req=l%3DD0I2xufjroIteknop5I5ITmgegxbm8%26s%3DFNKGGENDOKNPBOBD)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In recent decades, leaders across the political spectrum embraced a familiar set of priorities: global trade, open markets, and rapid social change.

But as factories closed, borders blurred, and entire communities were left behind, many Americans--particularly in the heartland--began to feel that national priorities no longer reflected their values or interests.
---
|
[](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xufklqIteknop5I6ITmgegxbm8&s=NNMAIKIEDNICIKEH&req=l%3DD0I2xufjroIteknop5I6ITmgegxbm8%26s%3DFNKGGENDOKNPBOBD)
---
| | This shift didn't happen overnight. And its origins reach further back than most realize.

In one of our most popular free eBooks, _Dueling Populisms_ , historian and Hoover Senior Fellow Victor Davis Hanson draws a powerful connection between today's unrest and centuries of political upheaval. And I'd like to send you a digital copy.

Inside, you'll uncover:
* Why two rival populisms are rising at the same time--and why both reject the status quo
* What ancient revolts can teach us about our own political realignment
* How elites ignored the heartland for too long--and what the backlash tells us

Victor Davis Hanson brings his expertise in classical history and military affairs to bear on a question that remains central: What will be the response when millions of citizens feel elites have written them off?

Download your free copy of Dueling Populisms here:
👉 [Get Your Free eBook](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xufklqIteknop5I7ITmgegxbm8&s=NNMAIKIEDNICIKEH&req=l%3DD0I2xufjroIteknop5I7ITmgegxbm8%26s%3DFNKGGENDOKNPBOBD)Best,
Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University
With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world.

Hoover Institution, 434 Galvez Mall, Stanford University, Stanford, CA 94305 USA
---
---

Patriot,

You and I have a few things in common. We work hard for everything that we've earned.

I completed two tours in Afghanistan. I felt a call to service because I love my country and wanted to do anything to repay it for the tremendous opportunities it has given me throughout my life.

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=d2e9543aa0b3403fa7e8cfe9f6cb6f4e&_e=djdD6xSSFzgO8jpCHll06nRqLYc-oFBo2oh9a5eUC-S0-ttupDaatnLeZknJReS1ulw0_9xPRnUjwKMf1661Pe2bM0LY5qTTxYQaBkyHU6ZBK_p-VxsX54Ar6rO_iA5FHo8_8pL-dU79g8Z5WlBok1scS65_F3kXaM8M7WGQTLOTWc5JQCkMh6KEfXFprkHxhGaP2J5-i4pQ1fISPDw9Yrc84UzoHgqbLrw3NnZy_Ik0wB2_ei2dcXo5rCHxVLMrtBEcVJwG0fnuHIcDZohkx8qeGdSzNjLah1qQQlJg2us5-L6EaTqNQQeCcSCasFX0nTNUtKDQlwSSP0RH1Fb2dEqA3N18Kx3raI9h2_mSptmNgzhgaeBLmiqZdKZl6gFfkixXY0LJikrJwiJs5mXnlpGgwMC_SU_L61CoFo4HGHiXwdJov4l_qpU3TpUWzb8rB9R4WerFG-x4eNeFBCJGw9u-_HlebFj9ilFoRf5k_WtF-9I1vn6NCblkTR2CuAlLIJqNY-ApzIjfYScQSGkk1fZjfj9QaNURJwE29ZXCskzEiCrCyJuTBnrl91TPsQ3m)
| [**DONATE NOW**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=d2e9543aa0b3403fa7e8cfe9f6cb6f4e&_e=djdD6xSSFzgO8jpCHll06nRqLYc-oFBo2oh9a5eUC-S0-ttupDaatnLeZknJReS1ulw0_9xPRnUjwKMf1661Pe2bM0LY5qTTxYQaBkyHU6ZBK_p-VxsX54Ar6rO_iA5FHo8_8pL-dU79g8Z5WlBok1scS65_F3kXaM8M7WGQTLOTWc5JQCkMh6KEfXFprkHxsyGNxBbaltkTxvlBc0b1w4EJPkNX-E2nGi097gL3oubfwW4UEaUoRY5SSNwbRqDtrBAZZHyLMAPHCmZaWoXQzLOe0yOt4hy0hU_qRLko0QnvI-dwTsJ9XDir4Zm_GWIz32hOdkTZCj5Kk_cQXWKSaHCfHoFDV8jd60ZOhLhq8jhoexk9nH4dFGHIuLtUemXVh1gMQWgP9zIzqduI0TdlTd8bl02-NfGXSupuD3TZxX0MhTqrfSeIRC1L0XiiXv2SYFdbhUGDUjfb492AmlMQOH_NznvvwtMafSo7yXLlvLYb6dhxT97lpC4B1_5iWFBnLp_3qrSXxVFtchIrO4E-vXTPotOxLNA2X-IzheaZSAj_CIzRW5rdw1atk1v1uiiD)
