**After all, Freedom isn 't free.**

It was the honor of a lifetime to serve alongside my brothers in Afghanistan, and I would do it all again in a heartbeat.

When I left the service, I thought my duty was over. I did my tours, and I suffered every hardship and trial that came along with it.

Then, I watched helplessly as 13 Americans lost their lives in a botched withdrawal.

I felt like I needed to do something to prevent this from happening again. I know firsthand that bad leadership gets soldiers killed. The Biden administration wrote off these living, breathing men and women to statistics on a spreadsheet.

[**These patriots who volunteered to serve their country deserved better, and that’s why I decided to run for Congress.**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=d2e9543aa0b3403fa7e8cfe9f6cb6f4e&_e=djdD6xSSFzgO8jpCHll06nRqLYc-oFBo2oh9a5eUC-S0-ttupDaatnLeZknJReS1ulw0_9xPRnUjwKMf1661Pe2bM0LY5qTTxYQaBkyHU6ZBK_p-VxsX54Ar6rO_iA5FHo8_8pL-dU79g8Z5WlBok1scS65_F3kXaM8M7WGQTLOTWc5JQCkMh6KEfXFprkHx4Xhs2E5Vlzj_kQAvu02AOVnB0a8HmQnur2U1bziW7XQdTCu9H0wHqKl1vdYtIqF_BNON4bvR-o6DJglwkk1-2IYdsVo-vCmh3Zb7Z13vRiRLknWOczCXeA-uU8JMCoDJC_lCSqLxJTzBnZZKs7uw3kXknMs67fS6WAnWHzSb1GFmbnhWvEsE65YYLl7oM-nloRb9uFfOz9qrZBt41PK4VKcbxJQjU7PDpK3SGSMEZn8rVDYla4NDWpIWG3s9ARY5vGCZf6KUIw3DWLK-u_uknMQAa-jokAtQva37aL49dVQDaaZGb4jY5iZ_9E_9zv9jaIaUOxOo9KNQO98B9oz_nyNoA2xwW1OnGDxy__BpedHsVHml34z2QdTw64ZYbT9C)

Sometimes I feel like being a politician is almost as hard as being a Green Beret, especially when these fundraising deadlines peek their heads around the corner.

**I hate asking for money, and my team knows I tend to put off fundraising. I put off these messages until the last possible moment.**

I'll come out and say it.

[**I need your help - I have an upcoming fundraising deadline and we’re far behind our goal.**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=d2e9543aa0b3403fa7e8cfe9f6cb6f4e&_e=djdD6xSSFzgO8jpCHll06nRqLYc-oFBo2oh9a5eUC-S0-ttupDaatnLeZknJReS1ulw0_9xPRnUjwKMf1661Pe2bM0LY5qTTxYQaBkyHU6ZBK_p-VxsX54Ar6rO_iA5FHo8_8pL-dU79g8Z5WlBok1scS65_F3kXaM8M7WGQTLOTWc5JQCkMh6KEfXFprkHxpCG-WhnUMw3zYO1LgWPa0esc1Cu3WUQXzDoZhY8MJNmu5RqbO3CaS3e-mTfY63Xr5qFB5-ySrArI5edgfEyleC07LYCrWBtEjvZQVWgn2p-68Ebfc69iqyLC0Ohwm-ttIer4lPJlYs9l_AgQ9advFi1XayTWka8_FqcfrBH2cj9Tv1dWlblQ0l5HT90OVMkXleAqIsztGDLyEZic6A55hZbfI6Z0mqdPx-6-hvkEOZvAOqfL8eJFqQ1emDQ7RCo8IInWvZKGF52DBBmT9zGYU3okhtqNq3CScsLRUTTXzXlGrwZevwmX9xtOkoPhufW4bsHcpJBoHifiKla5LfkhHOsHOEyW61bV58oe3z_FTJB8cGVfwocd32jv9RsPmuMJ)

If you're half the patriot I think you are, I have no doubt I can count on you.

[**I'd be grateful if you could spare just $15 and skip a few coffees. clean_body: | Patriot, You and I have a few things in common. We work hard for everything that we've earned. I completed two tours in Afghanistan. I felt a call to service because I love my country and wanted to do anything to repay it for the tremendous opportunities it has given me throughout my life. | After all, Freedom isn 't free. It was the honor of a lifetime to serve alongside my brothers in Afghanistan, and I would do it all again in a heartbeat. When I left the service, I thought my duty was over. I did my tours, and I suffered every hardship and trial that came along with it. Then, I watched helplessly as 13 Americans lost their lives in a botched withdrawal. I felt like I needed to do something to prevent this from happening again. I know firsthand that bad leadership gets soldiers killed. The Biden administration wrote off these living, breathing men and women to statistics on a spreadsheet. Sometimes I feel like being a politician is almost as hard as being a Green Beret, especially when these fundraising deadlines peek their heads around the corner. I hate asking for money, and my team knows I tend to put off fundraising. I put off these messages until the last possible moment. I'll come out and say it. If you're half the patriot I think you are, I have no doubt I can count on you. Thank you, Pat Harrigan Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2025 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

Roy Cooper has been a staunch defender of abortion rights and reproductive freedom in North Carolina, and as its next U.S. Senator, he’ll continue that advocacy.
As Governor, Roy vetoed an extreme Republican bill banning nearly all abortion care after 12 weeks of pregnancy. Rolled out during the night, Republicans pushed it through despite knowing that this ban was NOT what North Carolinians wanted.
**A clear majority in North Carolina support access to abortion. But our opponent doesn’t care.**
The extreme GOP wants to get between North Carolinians and their doctors. They don’t care that _folks in states with bans are nearly twice as likely to die during pregnancy or soon after giving birth._**Now compare that with Roy, who will be a trusted ally in the U.S. Senate for reproductive freedom. _Tell us if you stand with him:_**

At long last, a federal judge has called the Trump administration's latest assault on the Constitution exactly what it is: **cowardly, dishonorable, and soaked in the stink of tyranny.**
In a searing, 161-page opinion, Massachusetts-based U.S. District Judge William Young, an appointee of President Ronald Reagan, provided a masterclass in how bad-faith, anti-constitutional arguments should be treated in the age of Trump.
Judge Young ruled that foreign students enjoy the same free speech protections under the Constitution's First Amendment as American citizens do.
**[But it's the language he used or this opinion that was truly stunning](https://substack.com/redirect/f329b053-61fb-4fb1-9f45-a2855f5c0469?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1951f065-da59-401b-b7f5-8cf040955d13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Young had the temerity to begin his opinion by displaying a threatening message he received via a postcard from an anonymous MAGA maniac (whose intellect and handwriting are akin to a troubled 3rd grader.).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a6f78e17-d694-4994-84b2-3b52ce220381?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.BdG1FdI8jJjMHVpMy_rQfvCt_2eQWBQ8Rb1cKfXrkVA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175126044)
"Trump has pardons and tanks...what do you have?" The judge answered with uncommon dignity.
> **Dear Mr. or Ms. Anonymous. Alone, I have nothing but my sense of duty. Together, We the People of the United States --you and me--have our magnificent Constitution.**
The judge wrote that Trump cabinet secretaries, including Secretary of State Marco Rubio and Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem:
> ..**deliberately and with purposeful aforethought, did so concert their actions and those of their two departments intentionally to chill the rights to freedom of speech and peacefully to assemble.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f0c372ca-9022-4f77-ab3e-171901d60675?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Judge Young then proceeded to fillet the Trump administration's argument with the surgical precision and moral clarity of an old-school patriot.
> **The president 's palpable misunderstanding that the government simply cannot seek retribution for speech he disdains poses a great threat to Americans' freedom of speech.**
But Judge Young saved his most caustic venom for [the stormtrooper cosplay antics of Immigration and Customs Enforcement](https://substack.com/redirect/f329b053-61fb-4fb1-9f45-a2855f5c0469?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg),
Their agents, in a move that is sadly no longer surprising, had the audacity to show up masked when arresting student protester **R umeysa Özturk**. As if they were raiding a crack den instead of serving a petty summons.
[Give Me 20% Off!](https://substack.com/redirect/a1c79462-6537-4d18-ad28-f20aa7ccf8fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a1893cff-d8fe-4df3-be54-d877edea6ac5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
> **This Court has listened carefully to the reasons given by Özturk's captors for masking-up and has heard the same reasons advanced by the defendant Todd Lyons, Acting Director of ICE. It rejects this testimony as disingenuous, squalid and dishonorable. **
> **ICE goes masked for a single reason --[to terrorize Americans into quiescence. Small wonder ICE often seems to need our respected military to guard them](https://substack.com/redirect/3cc742c1-5559-46a7-983a-02d0a2fed1be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as they go about implementing our immigration laws. It should be noted that our troops do not ordinarily wear masks. **
> **Can you imagine a masked marine? It is a matter of honor --and honor still matters.**
Not content to merely slap wrists, Young summoned the full weight of American historical revulsion: **" To us, masks are associated with cowardly desperados and the despised Ku Klux Klan,"** he wrote.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3cc742c1-5559-46a7-983a-02d0a2fed1be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.BdG1FdI8jJjMHVpMy_rQfvCt_2eQWBQ8Rb1cKfXrkVA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175126044)
**" In all our history we have never tolerated an armed masked secret police. Carrying on in this fashion, ICE brings indelible obloquy to this administration and everyone who works in it."**
At 85-years old, Judge Young flayed hypocrisy, mocked authoritarian bravado, and defended the tattered banner of liberty against the gaslighting and goose-stepping of the Trump brigade.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/46f92c2b-80d0-4200-a3e0-b85f76a0e72e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Judge Young sees the big Trump lie about immigrants and foreigners for what it is. An attempt to frighten the public into docility by making a spectacle of retribution.
This comes complete with federal agents dressed like bandits, trampling on the Bill of Rights to silence any dissent.
Young's ruling makes clear that this isn't a mere policy dispute; it is a moral emergency.
> **While the president naturally seeks warm cheering and gladsome, welcoming acceptance of his views, in the real world he 'll settle for sullen silence and obedience. What he will not countenance is dissent or disagreement.**
And so the judge declared what should be obvious to any literate resident of this nation.
That the First Amendment _does not vanish_ at the border _._ Lawful non-citizens in the United States enjoy the same sacred protections of speech and assembly.
And [no president--however orange, ornery, or demented](https://substack.com/redirect/b96a2f5f-0173-4562-a811-3e6edda46b8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), may rewrite our Constitution on a whim.
In an age when many organizations, institutions, and jurists bend their knee and grovel to the lunatic King Trump, **here is a judge who still stands tall** and promotes the constitution, _for all of us_.
More of this please.

name: =?utf-8?q?we_need_to_hear_from_you=E2=80=A6_Fight_for_Reform?=
subject: Donald Trump is putting us at RISK
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs) We need to know your thoughts, team...

Donald Trump’s handpicked crony, Robert F. Kennedy Jr., is spewing anti-vaxx conspiracies non stop. [**It’s dangerous and is putting everyday Americans at risk!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69365?t=3&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs)

Now that flu season is rapidly approaching, we want to gauge local Democrats opinions on vaccines. [ **SO, we’re launching an urgent poll to hear from Democrats in your area >>** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69365?t=4&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs) [ **Team: How likely are you to get a Flu shot? **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69365?t=5&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69365?t=6&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs)
| | [Very likely >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69365?t=7&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs)
---
| [Somewhat likely >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69365?t=8&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs)
---
| [Not very likely >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69365?t=9&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs)
---
Health professionals continually criticize the anti-vaxx statements made by the RFK Jr. and the Trump administration, warning of the dangers of this kind of rhetoric.

[ **And don’t forget team – RFK Jr. FIRED CDC’s vaccine advisory committee:** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69365?t=10&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69365?t=11&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs)
[**We MUST trust science, team!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69365?t=12&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs) That’s why we’re working overtime to gauge vaccine support in your area.

[ **With new anti-vaxx policies being adopted nationwide – we need to hear from everyday Americans like you. As one of the most informed Democrats in your area, you have been selected to complete our critical poll. **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69365?t=13&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs)
[ **Please, respond before 11:59PM to validate our local data pool >> ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69365?t=14&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs)
[ **Team: How likely are you to get a Flu shot? **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69365?t=15&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69365?t=16&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs)
| [Very likely >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69365?t=17&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs)
---
| [Somewhat likely >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69365?t=18&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs)
---
| [Not very likely >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69365?t=19&akid=23474%2E4449941%2EMQsRSs)
---
Thank you for your participation,

Fight for Reform

subject: District Round-up 10.5.25

# [District Round‐up 10.5.25](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2025%2F10%2F05%2Fdistrict-round-up-10-5-25%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=7cbc860d09ec64c71abd96f414629317&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
| | By **Elizabeth Farnham** on October 5, 2025
---|---
Dear Neighbor,
Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-fa,rnham-for-congress-1](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=dbc4f5cf85a58e9ccbfb100b11266d77ed9183d151a6b8ef80892e1fd2093aae&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5209&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=9271bbe43f2e96d2ca2157477b44d68e&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=48ad78e3c24b31c4dad313f0980d0b8c)
This past week has been especially difficult as the Trump administration and the Republican-controlled Congress have attacked the norms of our Democracy from a variety of angles. And yet, our US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, said nothing, condoning every rotten action Trump and his cronies took.
On September 29th, the sitting US president posted a racist, AI-generated video on social media which depicted Minority Leader of the US House of Representative Hakeem Jeffries wearing a cartoon sombrero and mustache and Senate Minority Leader Chuck Shumer falsely stating, "There's no way to sugarcoat it. Nobody likes Democrats anymore. We have no voters left because of all of our woke trans bullshit."
And Representative John Joyce said nothing.
On September 30th, Secretary of Defense, Pete Hegseth, rendered vulnerable our leadership by forcing them to gather in one place that was publicly announced to the world, then compelled them to listen to Trump state, "...we should use some of these dangerous cities as training grounds for our military — National Guard, but our military,...". In other words, the sitting US President suggested that US Military should be turned against innocent American People in any city he arbitrarily declares as "dangerous".
And Representative John Joyce said nothing.
On October 1st, the first day of the government shutdown, Trump canceled climate funding to mostly blue states and withheld billions of dollars from New York City infrastructure projects, as he had previously threatened to cut funding to "Democratic agencies" in a memo about the impending shutdown the week before. He repeatedly also threatened mass firings of federal employees.
And Representative John Joyce said nothing.
On October 4th, it was announced that the Trump administration was considering carrying out a flashy arrest and "perp walk" of former FBI Director, James Comey, as a follow-up to his sham indictment by Trump's Department of Justice.
And Representative John Joyce said nothing.
Trumpian lackey, Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson, has still not sworn in newly-elected Democrat Adelita Grijalva (AZ) for no stated reason, but claims he will on October 7th. When sworn in, Representative-elect Grijalva is expected to be the last US Representative to sign the discharge petition to force a vote on legislation to release the purported Epstein Files.
And Representative John Joyce says nothing.
But all week, members of Congress have been lying to the American People, claiming that the Democrats want to extend Covid-era ACA subsidies for healthcare premiums because it extends healthcare to "illegal immigrants." Immigrants who are "lawfully present" may receive ACA healthcare insurance under some circumstances, but the Democrats are holding the line for this line to be included in the federal budget because the doubling of ACA premiums without their valiant efforts would negatively impact millions of American citizens.
Representative John Joyce finally did say something - he doubled down on this lie.
"Senate Democrats chose to hold the federal government hostage in exchange for a massive $1.5 trillion spending package that would fund far-left priorities like foreign climate projects and free healthcare for illegal immigrants."
Meanwhile, I try to meet voters in our beautiful 13th Congressional District.
Yesterday was another gorgeous day for listening to voters from all political parties who are deeply concerned about the erosion of our precious Democracy, our rising cost of living, and threats to their jobs.
Voters in Perry County understand that the Trump administration is actively harmful for our country. Many thanks to Melanie Wertz and Jack Stansbury for manning the tent with me.
And last night, I had the pleasure of speaking to the Somerset County Democratic Committee about the atrocities of the Trump administration and how we fight it. Thank you to Campaign Manager Jack Stansbury who took the photos and traveled with me.
If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
Sincerely,

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | A broken woman. Alone. Ashamed. Cast out. She came to the well at noon, hoping no one would see her. But Jesus did see her. He didn’t shame her. He didn’t cancel her. She was stunned. Jesus said: That story hits me deep— because I was that woman. I’ve been told I wasn’t good enough. At 17, I dropped out of high school. My parents gave me two choices: Go back to school, or get a job. It was humbling. It was hard. But it wasn’t the end of my story. 25 years later, that high school dropout became the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, and the first Republican woman elected to Congress from South Carolina. And I didn’t do it alone— God carried me. He carried me through trauma, heartbreak, single motherhood, public failure, and private grief. He carried me when I was assaulted. When I was raped. When I was diagnosed with PTSD. When I moved four times to keep my children safe. When the world called me unworthy, God called me redeemed. When the Left tried to silence me, God gave me a voice. When I had nothing left to give, God filled me with living water. I know what it means to be broken. And I know what it means to be rebuilt by grace. A fight for our churches , our daughters , our freedom —and our souls. And I won’t sit back while spineless politicians sell out our country for fame and favor. If you believe in grace , truth , and second chances , Because there are millions of women out there still waiting at the well. And America still has fighters who won’t back down. — Nancy Mace P.S. I know what it feels like to be overlooked. Ignored. Counted out. But I also know what it feels like to be used by God for a mission far bigger than myself. | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter. Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained. At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. name: State Democrats HQ
subject: Former President Barack Obama is spot-on about this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
“After years of complaining about cancel culture, the current administration has taken it to a new and dangerous level by routinely threatening regulatory action against media companies unless they muzzle or fire reporters and commentators it doesn’t like..."
#
**Former President Barack Obama is spot-on about this, Peter:**
_“After years of complaining about cancel culture, the current administration has taken it to a new and dangerous level by routinely threatening regulatory action against media companies unless they muzzle or fire reporters and commentators it doesn’t like. This is precisely the kind of government coercion that the First Amendment was designed to prevent — and media companies need to start standing up rather than capitulating to it.”_
**We cannot allow the Trump administration to keep attacking free speech.**
Media companies need to stand against these attacks. Elected officials need to take action to protect the sacred right to free speech. And today, we’re asking grassroots supporters like you to do your part too.
While the GOP lets Donald Trump get away with this, we need your help to elect Democrats who will work to END these attacks and RESTORE the ability for Americans to speak freely and express themselves. So please:
**[Will you join our fight to elect Democrats and protect free speech by rushing a donation of $5 or more today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96354?refcode=em20251005-9527&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9527%2E614464%2ECWMfOc)**
